subject: BREAKING: Fauci Is In Serious Trouble
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U

[unsubscribe](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkEluhDAURE8DS8v298SCRZSk72HATG0btwcaOH3ofaRaluo91dB2IwOq6qWlmBKCqcIYc8YQQayBByfwpYQC8vsNFcPambj02ged47LlQS_2RN7kem4NVWRsZMeJEZL3o8DAMJWGYj0KwZvatdAQTjCI2rZzzqGCr4o-7uSo-yf6d7vf3KcDj6PYCn5WLXEf6LEXUeL7xWc4h4EbkyW4YWmmoHkYrzQVmqxz26lWt8HuswqKnePFnlzNeyQM7zIn60NTemHTXo6rrCb6o9_LZC3OUsbrIp2uqDDLfIOfl1M-5VWE6FbZzZdM6777M70kdHqa69gO4b1YuyQh76Mmd-t_7OvcHigSXzaMCDQBuRJkY5FLwwsAzStm0CF-hlWhUbIBkC_pD_VIhPc)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
Fellow Patriot,

I have big news -- Anthony Fauci is in serious trouble.

The National Institute of Health just admitted that Fauci funded gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab.

_Now it's all spiraling downhill for Anthony Fauci_.

When I called him out for funding gain-of-function research in Wuhan, I was called a lunatic conspiracy theorist by the mainstream media.

Now I'm vindicated. And Fauci has been proven to be a serial liar.

Here's the question now: will Joe Biden's Department of Justice investigate him for lying under oath in front of the U.S. Senate?

_Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci_.

Actions must have consequences. If you or I lied under oath, in any circumstance, we would be immediately hit with perjury charges.

Why do well-connected government officials like James Clapper or Anthony Fauci get away with lying to Congress?

It is now a matter of public record that Fauci's statements under oath were lies.

_And I refuse to let him off the hook_!

Fellow Patriot, I'm proud of the work that I've done exposing Fauci and holding him accountable.

And I promise you this is only the beginning.

If you support the work that I've been doing, I ask you to stand with me.

The threats that I face are constant. And I need proud patriots like you to have my back if I'm going to continue this valuable work.

**[Today is a turning point in the fight against Fauci. Please stand with me by contributing $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkE2SrSAUg1dzHVIHDooOHHT1e3cfIIioKBcRf1bf9rxTGaZS-aJb1XNkdeFaBoxSYDUAlJwTSniD75LiV13VSP9_44uD9Ca6Ti5BpujWpKWbL7KYVAwtGskENxpUXzGjUDf6kaBND53pgBa-xYaWFLAq5nZIKbzw68Xej1OU3UT-7O5W_5vB95nmF_5L4JLVsIYaj9PmXN634PmwWlq5OWHhCJHLMpdmliztVzxU5Y1wsVHbZ4NTXgEU95auFx3UmKEqoctD3Aewu8rNJKSZJnVp6KO_RKJBh-UUvrxsGeZB5blXzVKpPhl-HPPEmTXnlZUe9XncnUOOdHyxyrjhWTvdvl62NFYh-lGo4RbbmPNybR-BStqhiK0Oh5tnt1Xiedf6h_kXuUjtSSJd9hUIxSYQvwfRzMRv-oNIhhE4KlJeYaxJL7hGsuzbDxGZmW4)**.

The news about Fauci made me furious -- but it also made me more sure than ever that the work I am doing is important and necessary.

I was the first one in the U.S. Senate to question Fauci about his ties to the Wuhan lab.

And I led the way in sending a criminal referral against him to the Department of Justice after he blatantly lied to me.

_I know that if I keep telling the truth and asking the right questions, I will be vindicated -- and America will be better off_.

But I've learned the hard way on countless occasions that telling the truth can be a dangerous act, both personally and politically.

That's why I need you to stand with me today, Fellow Patriot.

**[If you support the work that I'm doing, and want it to continue, I ask that you support me with a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkE2OrSAYRFdzHRLg43fgoNPv3X2goKKCiKhXV9_2vJMaVirnlK2bjgFVla8ppoRgqjDGnDFEENPw5gS-lFBA_n_Di2ETXPaticmU7JdijZ8vFF2phroDh5WhDEC6jglNG04c2FY3uhMY2yrUoAknGEQ110Mp6QVfL_p-UrJpJ_TndruE3w68P2V-wb-CfektXpKC89MfB79vyY6zt6Y3m9d8v3Tc29Wud74Tjidsd-M0d721NoqoNiUwncNJUmPiyNe9kyqfvfedI1PKdOaT88Gmgx39YmDNB0xXWeKERX8YVuiUnGygW5XlKsbsHFs-pSipW4fJSmixDycVzg8P7XQHFbcyipTDKJvhltt4HPHaVgmN6Ycq1zadfp79JuTzbh8e51_lqtQflEncF4wI6ITCnqSeUdjsCoCGETNoEL_SqFAnmQUU9-0HgjyXzg)**.

The Left is organizing against me, and getting stronger by the day. I must have help from patriots like you if I am going to continue this crucial work.

In Liberty,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY)

P.S. The NIH admitted they funded gain-of-function research in Wuhan.

This proves that Fauci lied before the U.S. Senate.

_When I first exposed him for funding the Wuhan lab, the media called me crazy -- but now the truth is out and I am vindicated_.

Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci.

And if you support that work, I need you to stand with me immediately. Because the threats against me from the Left are endless.

**[Fellow Patriot, if you want my work to continue, please support me with a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkEGSrCAQRE-jSwIsEFi4mJj_-x4gKigoCk2rpx9nPxG5zMqsl6bTI4VG1K5rcEMIbgTGmFGKCKISXozAl2gFkP_fUFGswnC4Xq1R5cNt2SjnL7QOubbdc8eZZtqQBgYlsZaA5SiYMopryUwdOpCEEQxt7Tubc6zgq2pej_Kh-gX9md1v4dcDrzP7Cv5l7PJk8BYFfM6pFHbfnJbPZNSkkgsZK8bdcPs72-suNJvtkrIHHeTUcHdaPi4-TSGQfQwDjYEkmeg57WEocifBYSqG8RrpKoLctV9Hlcocc-xjKfppPd1sW8Bu8T1z5JofCndue3-dejkO0hJ7zLJq2sHZ59vlDmJNeW7jEWau7c3TXMp6pZ2DVpOtj87Ej_PepZY_607hYf5FrnN3ooOs7w0jAjKi8I5cehSS2QGQnTEFjdgVZ4FGTg2g9Z1-AFKJmVM)**.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Defending Taiwan
body:
Actions speak louder than words... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Defending Taiwan](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-j/)
China's actions against our critical ally Taiwan have gotten more and more provocative lately. Our goal is to defend Taiwan, but avoid a military confrontation with China if at all possible. How to accomplish both? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Another Democrat Says Something Really Stupid](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats have been saying a lot of stupid things lately. President Biden's Chief of Staff was the latest. You can read what he said in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-k/)

In last week's blog, I discussed something really stupid that Joe Biden said. Now he's said something even stupider. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtlbkd-kujkulhluu-b/)

Politicians say a lot of stupid things. Something very stupid was said last week. Read about it in this week's blog. | | Trump has endorsed Glenn Youngkin six times — they’re almost attached at the hip.

I’m almost too afraid to think about what that means to Donald Trump ... but we don’t need a lot of imagination.

**If you want to know what kind of governor Glenn Youngkin will be, just look at what kind of president Donald Trump was.**

The apple doesn’t fall far from the tree.

clean_body: | | | = | | Trump has endorsed Glenn Youngkin six times — they’re almost attached at the hip. So it’s no surprise that Trump told a crowd of Youngkin supporters that Glenn Youngkin would "do all the things we want a governor to do." I’m almost too afraid to think about what that means to Donald Trump ... but we don’t need a lot of imagination. If you want to know what kind of governor Glenn Youngkin will be, just look at what kind of president Donald Trump was. The apple doesn’t fall far from the tree. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Derek, after we worked so hard to stop Trump last year, we can’t let a little complacency get in the way of defending our progress. Rest assured — if Glenn Youngkin wins this race, he’ll do to Virginia exactly what Trump did to our country. We can’t let that happen. This election ends in 5 days. And we need all hands on deck for every single day between now and then. = Thank you, – James Carville =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Do you think Biden cares?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "Scarcity") Peter, _Shortages of people willing to work._ _Gas prices are at an all-time high, and_ America is now begging foreign leaders like OPEC to bail them out of a crisis they created. _Kids will not be able to get Christmas presents._ [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "Chart")**This is Joe Biden 's America, and it is a land of scarcity and want.** Joe Biden is failing this nation, and American families are struggling. **[I will work overtime from now until 2024 to make sure that the Democrats lose the midterms in 2022 and that Joe Biden is kicked out of the White House in 2024. I am putting a team together, and I need you to join as soon as possible.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "I will work overtime from now until 2024 to make sure that the Democrats lose the midterms in 2022 and that Joe Biden is kicked out of the
White House in 2024. I am putting a team together, and I need you to join as soon as possible.")** Is Joe Biden so incompetent that he can't fix the problems he created, _or does he simply not care about the people they hurt?_ **My guess is the latter - _Biden is so out of touch that he simply doesn 't care_ - so long as the radical left elements in his party are happy.** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "Quote")Make no mistake - the left in Washington is happy with how things are going - **_this is all part of their socialist agenda._**
Onerous public health mandates implemented by Democrats for more than eighteen months have limited consumer spending at restaurants, bars, movie theatres, and traveling.
Less spending on the service sector not only decimated local economies but turbocharged the demand for physical goods. This has placed an unprecedented strain on global supply chains and caused our trade deficit with China to surge towards new highs.
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "Christmas Cheer")None of this will get any better until we stand together and take our nation back from the brink, and force Washington to realize that spending our nation into bankruptcy is not the answer to our inflation crisis.
Until then, _expect long lines and disappointed children around the Christmas tree._
**[It's time to get America back on track, take power back from Democrats, and put an END to the issues that seem to multiply under Biden's leadership. If you agree, then join my team and let's bring America back to its global position of economic strength.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "It’s time to get America back on track, take power back from Democrats, and put an END to the issues that seem to multiply under
Biden’s leadership. If you agree, then join my team and let’s bring America back to its global position of economic strength.")**
I need to know if you are with me.
For a better future,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58622932:6LFj9J2NP:m:1:3103520637:7E5F59CD1561AFFF8B0374B8678590F3:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

body:
Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%).

| | | Because no one is above the law! | October 27, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56990&L=26163&F=H&)
---
# [Record-Breaking Mexican Border Arrests, Caravan En Route, Panama Warns 65K More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56990&L=26163&F=H&)
Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end figures provided this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56990&L=26163&F=H&)

clean_body: Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). | | | Because no one is above the law! | October 27, 2021 ---|---|--- | | Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end figures provided this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. | | | The Wall Street Journal Critical race theory dominates college campuses these days, but parents are fighting its spread to K-12 education. Three Massachusetts families are suing Wellesley Public Schools over woke policies they say violate their children’s rights. == Fox News More than 500 pages of internal documents from DC Metropolitan Police concerning the fatal shooting of Ashli Babbitt in the Capitol on Jan. 6 reveal witness accounts stating she was not holding a weapon at the time of her death and how “upset” the officer was after shooting her. == Fox News The city of Asheville, North Carolina, is facing a new lawsuit alleging that it violated the state and U.S. constitutions by designating a scholarship program for Black students. == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

subject: Let's keep Terry scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
We MUST keep up the momentum and KEEP Terry McAuliffe SCARED!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0cssr5s1oilc6k0q5cmtjt38keiu3iretredf98_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s30maqm8dplcgo74cj1cur75dtkslgmcdr6mkp64ttle9r3aotl65pmaor36tjjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbaphlcipm8dtimdj33c5ic8r749fg)
We MUST keep up the momentum and KEEP Terry McAuliffe SCARED!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvohu64fbskqhmn0lcb0fkatvvt25s744ccom4k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh2bs)
---
Friend,

Terry McAuliffe is officially scared.

**Terry knows he can’t win, so he is bringing in Stacey Abrams, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, and even Jill Biden to campaign on his behalf.** He needs the help of corrupt career politicians who campaign on stale political ideas...that do not work.

Terry McAuliffe is officially showing how desperate he is. | [**KEEP TERRY SCARED**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvo0j0fkv8mj7t3vu0cpj3bl0bda9fqk7omn3a40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh2bs)
---
I am campaigning across the Commonwealth of Virginia, as a Virginian. I am here to represent you and no one else, and I am going to work for every single Virginian.**Our momentum continues to grow, but I need your help to continue to keep Terry McAuliffe on his toes.**

[**A very generous donor has offered to DOUBLE every single donation from now until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep up the momentum.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4vn8jn6c5qpaieru1ap9cthc80fot1tt7hl6ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh2bs)

**We are about to make a statement that will reverberate across this great country, and I hope you will join me.** [**DOUBLE YOUR DONATION HERE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvabc079eapgmjhgb78rqro1g12mbhqkllahdc40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh2bs)
---
Let’s shout it from the rooftops. **We can win this together.**

For Virginia,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkn6loffknja1qv7ofnfjrc7n3amp7eke7a9pljo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj6clh2bs)

name: Caucus Room
subject: The thieves in Washington
body:
By now, I'm sure you have heard the news that Joe Biden wants the authority to tax profits on all of your investments - even before you sell them. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8994%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WWqZGIDluIEgTukqDbHgEw&sysid=1)
This is preheader text. Some clients will show this text as a preview.

| | |

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16281%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N5wB%2bAMYlwLxFMm6gUFMZA&sysid=1)
Liberals want even more of your money

Dear fellow conservative-

By now, I'm sure you have heard the news that Joe Biden wants the authority to tax profits on all of your investments - even before you sell them. This incredibly dangerous policy will affect every American who owns a home, invests in a 401k, or even casually trades stocks.

It seems that monitoring our bank accounts with just $600 wasn't enough for these thieves, so now they are going even further to steal the hard-earned dollars from middle-class Americans.

It's time we organize against these destructive policies coming from Washington - that's why we created [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2cjoYdTyG82DURdVYSQWPA&sysid=1).

If we are going to get this country back on track, we must work together.

Join [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2cjoYdTyG82DURdVYSQWPA&sysid=1) today.

This race isn't just about taking back one state from the radical Left, it's about determining the electoral landscape of the entire country for years to come.

_But that should come as no surprise after the destruction we witnessed in Kenosha last year._

We cannot waste one more minute to FIRE Tony Evers.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I just can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zded4mh9riv90b25sdmbs10egb2uqdagjpfl2lko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upomadtme9ie4pjm6hh74d5melge2dbmccpj4dj5eor32p3gedimcsrnmiqbbc77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sllcoqm9cr46upb4phhm2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj2clh2bs)
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Friend,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Now, at the doorstep of my End-of-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-October2021](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi0guc9t83j73dooel6cv5sngvts98irlqpp9248_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj2clh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-October2021")**
---

With urgency,
Marco
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1otacjdhblp7fva3q9jbtgeif5cbaduc7kl1m58_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj2clh2bs "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Friend, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztc91dr4co7nl58hhqfkdamnb8q8nncfmr830ug0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i6aoj2clh2bs "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** Polls show a razor thin margin and the latest reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats.

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgi8vq1t7e0ve342u01a8jjg3med9igbif98an60_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i61o72c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmt3o9ag3mml85o858n3o7f96ppe5rhbq8stksmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i61o72c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7s1dqgbn86u78r3v00lp0gs14u9k3dd757a4tgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i61o72c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6uktccmrutpmol8ih90ct7k0ssjn0q1mh8agsbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i61o72c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg7eekjrcabehvd9rq2k41q7al8e1ca7jvlknug8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hfbc3lckrmasrmchp64o9lmljj1c9je9rb8o3kc1j3ed3me8o63c31ehjj0ob7csp238h1e8he4933cpim2p30s3h60oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zri4qdf4pmrbjjrjc1do6lcoe05odm6aavoin06o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5i61o72c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zakgbqv21ui493sigg6en6325smcdvr1hprbf94g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h60or4c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9av3mi3rn9lt4kfnvdamvl548otaa2fgfjsf1r8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h60or4c5h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6r1qmm5v5m490a5pc120hagf4m3fq2ot75so9mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h60or4c5h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Carleah Summers
subject: Carleah Summers for Congress 2022
body:
Hello from Team Carleah!

Thanks so much for showing interest and signing up with your email on our website. We highly recommend [checking out the rest of our website](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/ba37b2eec028fd3ab2bfb76c58ad3e71fc139120?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.carleahsummers.com%2F&userId=7788844&signature=5ff4ba573b366d9a) to learn more about Carleah and what our campaign is running on!

If you are interested in getting more involved, please take a few minutes to [complete this form](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/6da17fc3b07828c8e4cca10502b70c18b4d5133f?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSd9YiDmO3oC3lb9m53aknXZi387AHInHC-fMsELJKTMzV7-6A%2Fviewform%3Fpli%3D1&userId=7788844&signature=566ceb3ac350cd8e) so that we can keep you informed about our grassroots campaign. This short survey will allow you to request campaign materials (yard signs, t-shirts, etc), note your availability, and share your expertise. I've also included the [link to our donation page](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/0feb881a1ce0c5c73ff1c86d309e6acabec63911?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=bafeb54f236a588c). Again, we are a GRASSROOTS campaign and we're looking for many small contributions to keep our work going- please chip in $10, $20, or $30 if you can!!

Thanks again and I look forward to working with you!

Best,
Kathy Brown
Volunteer Coordinator

\--

**Vote Carleah Summers**
[Website](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/45b220c2b25d527fe63621f003fd8ee380bddda3?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.carleahsummers.com%2F&userId=7788844&signature=90d5c7515677b8cc) | [Facebook](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/c02c693e8ae412a7092a2b046a1f547b66ad5c92?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers%2F&userId=7788844&signature=92b6d5ef40c16e3f) | [Twitter](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/a3e708ba939a470c6ec6f58d7ca07925c0c6cb73?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fcarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=2033619db8c015e0) | [Instagram](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/9b267bfab3286b1e7b006fa25ac86d2d3c834cfb?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=6912a94761881352)

name: Karl Rove
subject: It's Karl Rove I think you should see this....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This came to me today and I thought it was important enough that a Top Conservative Patriot like yourself should see it personally as soon as possible.

It's Karl Rove,

This came to me today and I thought it was important enough that a Top Conservative Patriot like yourself should see it personally as soon as possible.

While Democrats now have the Majority in the House of Representatives, I'm confident that with your help we can win it back so Nancy Pelosi is no longer in charge but instead conservatives lead Congress in helping the American people.

[**If that 's what you want, once you look this over, please make a 500% matched donation today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58632290:6jxEUJ2qN:m:1:3298722022:B29F0C300CB9AEBE1E45096546A2BE2A:r)

Thank you for your time,

Karl Rove

*******Confidential Memo*******
Attn: House GOP Conservatives
Re: Democrats Controlling Congress

With control over both houses of Congress, Democrats are figuring out ways to exercise their power by pushing through bills that harm Americans and satisfy their Radical Left base.

In the House of Representatives however, the Democrats hold a very narrow lead, **as Republicans are only 5 seats away from retaking a Conservative Majority.** This has led the Radical Left to begin aggressively campaigning NOW to keep their majority.

**We aren 't taking this news lightly.** Democrats will fight hard to prevent us from taking back the House, and the Radical Left keeps pouring money into their campaigns at a shocking rate.

| | **_[Stand up to Trump and stop Youngkin by funding our final Get Out The Vote efforts>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38014341/313609184/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.3_TM_10IN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ4ZDFlMi1lYzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iK1H3hv9ssZpLNHQXAG-WCN5wTSBCEyD_PBAUYSbXBQ=)_** Derek, we have just 5 days left in the most important election of 2021.

You know the stakes: We’re standing up to Donald Trump and his acolytes. Trump just announced he’s coming to Virginia to support Youngkin.

This race is about stopping right-wing extremism and protecting our democracy.

Three recent polls tell us that this race is a dead heat — experts are calling it a “toss up.”

So here’s the truth: If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win. If we don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

So right now, I’m launching the final fundraising goal of this campaign. With Donald Trump’s Virginia stop imminent, we have to have our biggest weekend yet.

**_[So, are you with me? Chip in any amount to my campaign to help us reach $2 million. clean_body: Yes, really | | | = | | = Derek, we have just 5 days left in the most important election of 2021. You know the stakes: We’re standing up to Donald Trump and his acolytes. Trump just announced he’s coming to Virginia to support Youngkin. This race is about stopping right-wing extremism and protecting our democracy. Three recent polls tell us that this race is a dead heat — experts are calling it a “toss up.” So here’s the truth: If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win. If we don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country. So right now, I’m launching the final fundraising goal of this campaign. With Donald Trump’s Virginia stop imminent, we have to have our biggest weekend yet. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = =** Thank you for being on my team in this election. | | Peter, Some people said that a gay woman and ordained minister just couldn’t win in the South. Skeptics didn’t think I could pull it off when I was organizing marriage equality campaigns or when I ran for county commissioner. There are still some who tell me I shouldn’t even bother running to be the next representative of NC-11 because WNC is not ready to elect someone who is a gay woman, regardless of any other factor in the race. I disagree. And one of the main reasons is because of what I hear people in WNC saying about their own lives. As I organize across the district, lots of people tell me they’ve heard similar messages -- that they just can’t do something because of who they are -- the color of their skin, their sexual orientation, their education, their job, how much money they make. This kind of thinking is dangerous -- and damaging. It tries to limit what people can achieve and become. And it’s way too common in our politics. Cynicism won’t deter us from doing the right thing and giving everything we’ve got to this campaign. [**I’m running to unseat extremist Madison Cawthorn and help pave a new path forward for Western NC. Will you chip in $10 today to help meet our end-of-month goal so we can take the next step forward together?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38014716/313611531/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211028_FR_EOM5Doubters_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjlhMWRmZi1lZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0D2kqyFIm8q17c6l-qLJuSAWUdDnI-mu_slwjdqbyI=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38014719/313611534/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211028_FR_EOM5Doubters_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjlhMWRmZi1lZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0D2kqyFIm8q17c6l-qLJuSAWUdDnI-mu_slwjdqbyI=)

name: American Update
subject: Former U.N. Economist Issues Dire Warning
body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8902%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1zhI10QMExCmf7qqivC%2big&sysid=1)
| | Dear Reader, Our entire country rests on an unstable foundation. You will be shocked at why our foundation is this frail. Ironically, much of our so-called “prosperity” is linked back to this very problem. You see, this weak foundation is the exact reason we,in America, were able to build our top-of-the-line infrastructure, have our oversized cars and put restaurants on every corner. But this foundation has started to weaken, one grain of sand at a time. And there is nothing -- absolutely nothing -- that can be done to prevent it from continuing to weaken and ultimately collapsing. In the end, the stock market could tumble by 70%. There’s little time left to prepare --[ this collapse has already begun. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O%2fH0mkQ8LBHZu8g4IN%2bstQ&sysid=1) Yet no one is talking about it. Well, hardly anyone... He’s a former U.N. economist, bestselling author and his work has been featured on _Fox Business_ , in _Forbes_ , _Barron’s_ and more. He warned that the stock market was headed for a correction in February of 2020, one week before it started dropping faster than any other time on record. Today he’s making his most controversial prediction in 40 years. **[Go HERE for his full presentation. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16296%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5NFHtjdzGGVBcqISSwvCKQ&sysid=1)** Kind regards,
Angela Jirau
Publisher, _The Bauman Letter_ This ad is sent on behalf of Banyan Hill Publishing. P.O. Box 8378, Delray Beach, FL 33482. If you would like to unsubscribe from receiving offers for Alpha Investor Report, please [click here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2yB3%2b5XTenUes2mIXySqUg&sysid=1)[.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3bpzXMXCiZYccW36PAMTOg&sysid=1)
---

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zou9qd2qn7dnl17tulq35vaqbsd3d8phesdv472g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp65cjmcsr35ctgs9jb3dbheaob8p7264qb0s9gs5pr3dr1maqecptn6lrj8cj7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj3ao5jcdjrcor66pgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6clgm4or0cpge49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt37qpgsavmedq9agsqiejkn4sjmfqf6lcbiqk20_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h66o36c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf2g0j1ghrq2q30a1irmie692r8cmvp4lr9e0a1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h66o36c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zija1f37qng2ua9qqo58bjsqorjdi0i4j9c6rvao_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5h66o36c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: some good news, some bad news

body:
we have a new plan
| | |

Peter,
National Republicans recently announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.
Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.
_**Peter , Youngkin is climbing in the polls, and the experts at The Cook Political Report just moved the race to a toss-up.**_
Here’s the good news: we’ve got a plan to turn out the voters we need. The bad news is that it’s going to cost us a lot of money, and we’re running out of time.
[**We set a rapid response goal of raising $275,000 by midnight tonight – we can’t run our grassroots field operation if we don’t have the funds. Will you split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer so we can build a world class ground game?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38016940/313621000/-688926594?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk357-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlYzc3ZC1mMjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTzh0VNuWZK02rqPclwRUn3A7BX3vV3tbrHYvxH6xCs=)

And the truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference.
With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to **every single corner of Virginia** , get mailers in **every single Virginia mailbox** , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.
**Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their endless resources, I need your help right now.**
**[So, will you help me out today? Split a donation right now before our midnight deadline – your contribution will go directly toward funding the biggest grassroots mobilization effort Virginia has ever seen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38016945/313621005/-688926594?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk357-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlYzc3ZC1mMjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTzh0VNuWZK02rqPclwRUn3A7BX3vV3tbrHYvxH6xCs=)**

name: Emily, Team Martin
subject: RE: A quick favor…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| Did you see Dr. Martin’s note, Peter? **One of the things that sets Dr. Martin apart is his commitment to service.** We see it every time he goes into the ICU to care for his patients, and we see it when he’s out on the campaign trail, talking to Tennesseans about how to make our state one that works for all of us. But that commitment comes with financial sacrifices — since Dr. Martin is working full time in the ICU, he can’t make as many calls to donors as we would like. **We’re worried that we won’t be able to close the gap between our campaign and Bill Lee’s dark money machine.[Can you pitch in $10 or $25 to keep this grassroots campaign going strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38017433/313622915/-103157484?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211028eom2_EC_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ4MDkwMC1mMzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMQed4W2BuQGM9uhsSGHF-THIy65_WuJ-8acDdt3fjI=)** | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38017436/313622919/-103157484?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211028eom2_EC_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ4MDkwMC1mMzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMQed4W2BuQGM9uhsSGHF-THIy65_WuJ-8acDdt3fjI=)
---
Thanks so much for helping us fuel this campaign.
Emily
\--------Forwarded message--------
From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: October 25, 2021
Subject: A quick favor...
Hey Peter.
Reaching out to ask a quick favor — **we set an ambitious fundraising goal of $20,000 in grassroots contributions for this month, and we’re just over halfway with a week to go.****[Can you pitch in whatever you’re able to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38017438/313622922/-103157484?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211028eom2_EC_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ4MDkwMC1mMzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMQed4W2BuQGM9uhsSGHF-THIy65_WuJ-8acDdt3fjI=)**
A little more context for why I’m asking — in short, it comes down to the fact that I’m working full time with patients in the ICU (during an ongoing pandemic!), which means I have much less time to focus on fundraising than my team is comfortable with.
Don’t get me wrong: Serving Tenneseans, whether as an ICU physician or as your next governor, is what defines me. And right now, my patients need me.
It just means that campaigns like ours have to operate a little differently to be able to raise the cash needed to compete against Bill Lee’s dark money machine. Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where I call through a list of reliable Democratic donors and ask them to contribute.
But because I’m splitting my time between the hospital and our 95 County Tour with everyday Tennesseans out in the communities, I just don’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and Bill Lee.
**[So I’m turning to our grassroots supporters to help us close that gap: Can you pitch in $5 or $10 to fuel this campaign for ALL Tennesseans? clean_body: | Did you see Dr. Martin’s note, Peter? One of the things that sets Dr. Martin apart is his commitment to service. We see it every time he goes into the ICU to care for his patients, and we see it when he’s out on the campaign trail, talking to Tennesseans about how to make our state one that works for all of us. But that commitment comes with financial sacrifices — since Dr. Martin is working full time in the ICU, he can’t make as many calls to donors as we would like. We’re worried that we won’t be able to close the gap between our campaign and Bill Lee’s dark money machine.= | = Thanks so much for helping us fuel this campaign. Emily \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Dr. Jason Martin Date: October 25, 2021 Subject: A quick favor... Hey Peter. Reaching out to ask a quick favor — we set an ambitious fundraising goal of $20,000 in grassroots contributions for this month, and we’re just over halfway with a week to go.= A little more context for why I’m asking — in short, it comes down to the fact that I’m working full time with patients in the ICU (during an ongoing pandemic!), which means I have much less time to focus on fundraising than my team is comfortable with. Don’t get me wrong: Serving Tenneseans, whether as an ICU physician or as your next governor, is what defines me. And right now, my patients need me. It just means that campaigns like ours have to operate a little differently to be able to raise the cash needed to compete against Bill Lee’s dark money machine. Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where I call through a list of reliable Democratic donors and ask them to contribute. But because I’m splitting my time between the hospital and our 95 County Tour with everyday Tennesseans out in the communities, I just don’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and Bill Lee. = **= Thank you for your support at every step of this campaign. — Dr. Martin ** | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

2\. Since you’re one of our strong supporters (at least, you read my emails — truly, thank you for reading my emails!), **I wanted to let you in on _why_ we’re making unusual ads like this one.**
Basically, our creative approach — the jingles, the bits, the jokes, The Content — is all about trying to reach voters who are turned off by typical politicians and canned messaging. It’s no wonder that so many people, especially millennials and the Gen Z, feel like there’s no one speaking their language, because no one is!
We need more campaigns that don’t feel like they were grown out of a laboratory in Washington, D.C.
**And guess what? It’s working.** We outraised our opponent last quarter by $50,000, and if we can keep building momentum, we’ll have a real chance of flipping this seat and trading an extreme right, truth-denying, conspiracy-theory-addled Republican for a progressive leader who will work to pass policies that work for ALL of us.
[**Help us build that momentum and make more ads like this one by donating any amount now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38018553/313628173/-1491242738?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211028perfume2_EG_all_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjIxZTJmYy1mNDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7W13FTkPBjODaLqIP_xDeLt-INVnwJdzFgTBDez5dro=)

Hell yes. And we love him for it. Plus (big plus), he’s trying to win this House seat so he can fight for affordable healthcare, bold solutions to the climate crisis, and the preservation of our democracy. So, if we’ve got to make a hundred more =, you better believe we will. — Team Eddie = | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Peter, when I heard that _The Cook Political Report_ shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I knew there was something we needed to do to help win this thing in the final stretch.

For days, everyone from the Associated Press to Donald Trump is claiming that Terry McAuliffe’s opponent has the momentum.

**_And that’s why I’m getting involved and making this ask to you today._**

Let me be very direct right now: Terry needs you, Peter. We NEED to wake up to the threat that Virginia might fall to Republicans -- and losing in Virginia could spell trouble for Democrats in 2022.

Terry McAuliffe’s opponent is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final days of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race.

When I am in the Senate, I am going to do more than just worry about my seat. I’m gonna work to elect Democrats all across Wisconsin and this county.

name: Jay Jones
subject: The most “flippable” district
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihbUb-Tl8QQqAxQ7WvPnUtm9uErwFFccIb1Uepq9H0U=/vd-vB0Y6lxwu59Sy_3sIWwH4GcB2lkd1SrpQ-4ou0bQ=)**
---
Friend -- Virginia's 27th House District in Chesterfield County was decided by less than 200 votes the last two times it was contested. Since 2017, the 27th District has continued to trend blue, and in 2021, I am fired up to flip this seat and send Debra Gardner to the General Assembly -- but we need your help. [**Contribute TODAY and help me protect and grow our majority by electing Debra!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihbUb-Tl8QQqAxQ7WvPnUtm9uErwFFccIb1Uepq9H0U=/83-EjCM5aAMbD8xQMBYZb-JzB1c4V8CSGwkIGBbtXR8=) Debra Gardner is a mother, public servant, and 30-year resident of Chesterfield County. She has worked tirelessly for those in need and has worked both personally and professionally to make a difference for Virginians. Debra Gardner is one of our best chances of flipping a seat blue to secure our narrow Democratic majority on November 2nd, which would solidify and build upon all of the progress we've been able to make over the past few years. The GOP knows the 27th District is in play, which is why they have launched calculated and targeted attacks on Debra. **We can combat them, but I am counting on supporters like you to step up over the final 5 days of this campaign.** [**Will you rush a donation to Debra 's campaign today to help turn Virginia's most "flippable" seat blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ihbUb-Tl8QQqAxQ7WvPnUtm9uErwFFccIb1Uepq9H0U=/83-EjCM5aAMbD8xQMBYZb-JzB1c4V8CSGwkIGBbtXR8=) It's all on the line now, people! body:

The Cook Political Report has labeled this race as a "toss-up" and the latest poll from Monmouth University shows Terry and Glenn tied 46-46. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38020431/313636332/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZGVlODYxLWY3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyguJsCQS8zeZXf1XS3jyziTyZOefA-f0FjvQzPn5Io=&emci=41700752-3137-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fddee861-f737-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) The Virginia gubernatorial election is just five days away, team.

Right now, Democrat Terry McAuliffe is locked in a neck-and-neck race with Trump 2.0, Glenn Youngkin. _The Cook Political Report_ has labeled this race as a "toss-up" and the latest poll from Monmouth University shows Terry and Glenn tied 46-46.

**We can't afford to let Republicans win back this governor's seat.** Youngkin is endorsed by both Donald Trump and Mike Pence and has played into Trump's claims of voter fraud in the 2020 election. To make matters worse, earlier this month at a rally, Youngkin supporters recited the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was carried on January 6.

**That's right -- Youngkin supporters pledged their support to a flag that was used to attack our democracy.**

Virginians need a governor like Terry McAuliffe who will defend our cherished democratic principles, not one whose supporters celebrate a deadly attack on our democracy. But with the race as close as it is, Terry needs a rush of support before polls close on Tuesday to ensure he wins.

The Cook Political Report has labeled this race as a "toss-up" and the latest poll from Monmouth University shows Terry and Glenn tied 46-46. We can't afford to let Republicans win back this governor's seat. Youngkin is endorsed by both Donald Trump and Mike Pence and has played into Trump's claims of voter fraud in the 2020 election. To make matters worse, earlier this month at a rally, Youngkin supporters recited the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was carried on January 6. That's right -- Youngkin supporters pledged their support to a flag that was used to attack our democracy. Virginians need a governor like Terry McAuliffe who will defend our cherished democratic principles, not one whose supporters celebrate a deadly attack on our democracy. But with the race as close as it is, Terry needs a rush of support before polls close on Tuesday to ensure he wins. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Experts are saying my Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin has the momentum. That Democrats don't care about stopping Trumpism anymore. Folks, we're running out of time to prove them wrong. [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and The Way Ahead right now? Your support is crucial right now because every single dollar we raise between now and Election Day goes directly towards our effort to get out the vote and win for Virginia and our Country.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tG7U_htk9hDU8VY2NOsYbyMyf7PSDMF9hb4H4Jq29cc=/WmYkqxWrf5aRY-YY31l7RbCxYzuzjaT5JUkIZxROZbQ=?refcode=20211028_RN_TRM) So here's my final message to you: **What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn 't just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts the future of our entire country.** My opponent isn't afraid to pull pages straight from the Trump playbook. He's pushing the 'big lie.' He is using hateful, racist dog whistles to divide Virginians. _The Washington Post_ even came out and said Glenn Youngkin is 'unfit' to be Governor. Unfit! I'm working my heart out to turn out every single voter we possibly can in these final days. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38022583/313645494/1300596418?refcode=211028_FR_btexmcauliffesplit_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MjhlZDZjLWZiMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VF4NKtY78lONwYc2DT5AAY4pcVpmOwwFQ4iyHYFxfiw=)
---
Peter, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must-win for Democrats in 2021.

Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.

Peter, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. **[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Barrier To Entry PAC>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38022584/313645495/-1412769256?refcode=211028_FR_btexmcauliffesplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MjhlZDZjLWZiMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VF4NKtY78lONwYc2DT5AAY4pcVpmOwwFQ4iyHYFxfiw=)** This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.

We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.

With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. **[Will you split a donation right now between Barrier To Entry and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38022585/313645496/-1412769256?refcode=211028_FR_btexmcauliffesplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MjhlZDZjLWZiMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VF4NKtY78lONwYc2DT5AAY4pcVpmOwwFQ4iyHYFxfiw=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38022586/313645497/-1412769256?refcode=211028_FR_btexmcauliffesplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MjhlZDZjLWZiMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VF4NKtY78lONwYc2DT5AAY4pcVpmOwwFQ4iyHYFxfiw=)** I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected.

The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself.

Now I’ve got to get back on the road, but I’ll ask one last time, **[please, split a donation right now to ensure that we keep Virginia blue this Tuesday.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38022587/313645498/-1412769256?refcode=211028_FR_btexmcauliffesplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MjhlZDZjLWZiMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VF4NKtY78lONwYc2DT5AAY4pcVpmOwwFQ4iyHYFxfiw=)** In solidarity, **\-- Terry**
**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. clean_body: I’m asking for your help to stop it. | | | = Peter, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must-win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Peter, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. = This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. = __= I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Now I’ve got to get back on the road, but I’ll ask one last time, = In solidarity, \-- Terry BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. **Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

Derek,

We’ve got TERRIBLE news. Thanks to Glenn Youngkin’s bottomless bank account and the help of massive donations from GOP mega-donors, the Trump-backed Republican posted MASSIVE fundraising numbers in their final filing deadline.

With polls putting Virginia as **_the biggest tossup of the year_** , national Republicans sending an **_army of organizers_** to Virginia, and Republicans **_pouring millions of dollars_** into the Commonwealth, Virginia could fall into the hands of Donald Trump and his hand-picked candidates.

name: Dr. Mary L Trump
subject: I'm stunned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again.
I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn't gain power again.
_**It seems I was wrong.**_
Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.
Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.
**[Will you split a donation between Terry's campaign and Senator Blumenthal right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1093-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
| | | [RUSH $5](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1093-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5)
---
| | [RUSH $25](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1093-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=25)
---
| | [RUSH $50](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1093-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=50)
---
| | [RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1093-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
---
I'm stunned that more people aren't stepping up.
Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue?
I am counting on you to make sure my uncle can't claim victory by seeing his hand-picked candidate win in Virginia on Tuesday, November 2.
Mary L. Trump, PhD
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pxoZNS%2BeOieduCIP%2B0UtAnWoU1ThC4ND&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

body:

| | Derek, we’re 5 days out.

This team is all gas, no brakes until Election Day, and we need your help. We need to fund our Get Out The Vote program. We need to send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue. And we need to stand up to right-wing extremism.

**We’ve set a goal of raising $2 million by midnight on Sunday. It’s the final fundraising push of this campaign, so right now, I’m asking you directly.**

**_[Can you chip in right now and help me stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38023373/313648553/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.4_TM_10IM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmY1NDRhNy1mZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSNQg09Zdr9cN_9wzN4r1Trs4RzPeh_P_SLCFYbFjEM=)_**

Look, there’s a reason President Barack Obama was in Virginia on Saturday. There’s a reason Kamala Harris and Stacey Abrams were here last week. There’s a reason Joe Biden was here earlier this week.

This is 2021’s most important election. And if Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win. But if they don’t, we’ll lose — and at that point, we can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Early voting is nearly over, and the latest Monmouth poll had this race tied at 46–46. **So your support is _critical_ right now.**

**_[Please, donate now, and help me put an end to extremism in our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38023374/313648566/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.4_TM_10IM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmY1NDRhNy1mZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSNQg09Zdr9cN_9wzN4r1Trs4RzPeh_P_SLCFYbFjEM=)_**

Talk soon,

Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38023375/313648584/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.4_TM_10IM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmY1NDRhNy1mZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSNQg09Zdr9cN_9wzN4r1Trs4RzPeh_P_SLCFYbFjEM=)

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38024916/313656861/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjk3MjlkYi0wMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqAR3rRrCXvqes7L1xSPE1_4x-An8D_sgzsVW9hJY8w=)

Friend,

When we entered this race just two months ago, we told you it wouldn't be easy.

Our GOP opponents are already making moves to try to win this race -- and they've got huge fundraising numbers behind them.

Jeff Bartos, who donated $1,000 to help bus people to Washington on January 6th, received a **$1.5 million** donation to his super PAC. Carla Sands, a major Trump donor, donated **$3 million** of her own money to her campaign.

Meanwhile, **Sean Parnell** , who supports Trump's Big Lie and led the effort to throw out millions of legal votes in Pennsylvania, just got an endorsement from **Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley** , who tried to reject Pennsylvania's electoral college votes on Jan. 6th.

**[Friend, as the competition for this battleground Senate seat intensifies, we need to prove to our opponents that we have the momentum and grassroots support to take us all the way. clean_body: | = Friend, When we entered this race just two months ago, we told you it wouldn't be easy. Our GOP opponents are already making moves to try to win this race -- and they've got huge fundraising numbers behind them. Jeff Bartos, who donated $1,000 to help bus people to Washington on January 6th, received a $1.5 million donation to his super PAC. Carla Sands, a major Trump donor, donated $3 million of her own money to her campaign. Meanwhile, Sean Parnell , who supports Trump's Big Lie and led the effort to throw out millions of legal votes in Pennsylvania, just got an endorsement from Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley , who tried to reject Pennsylvania's electoral college votes on Jan. 6th. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As you can see, the stakes in this race are high for our planet, for our future, and for working families here in PA and across the country. We've seen Republican attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and so much more this past year. It's disgraceful. Now more than ever, our democracy is on the line, and our GOP opponents are all unqualified to represent Pennsylvania in any capacity. That's why we need to step up and show our competitors that we're ready for anything they throw at us. Friend, while our opponents make multi-million dollar donations to their own campaigns, I'm on the ground in our communities working to build real grassroots support. And I'm writing to you today because, if we win this, it will be with a clear mandate from real people in Pennsylvania -- not millionaires and big corporate PACs. = Thanks, Conor Lamb = = *
