name: Sheriff David Clarke (Ret.)
subject: ALERT: Kyle Rittenhouse Trial Begins
body:
ALL funds donated will go directly to his legal defense.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuvg3dcvfvfskeqk386lhqeve3tlj3lpehp64gpo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9c5he9gj2cj0esrj2s76e9gb2orkedo7athhc5oj8plnc1qr8c36ehq64cr66urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaqmcdb2mdh6fchhcpq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpim2pj1c5ie0oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuqsipdnsuprb83d3onhqfrmqmme5ij7si4c7km8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)
---
Friend,

I served nearly 40 years in law enforcement with 15 of those years as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin, less than an hour away from Kenosha. I know the area well.

I, like many of you, watched a bunch of gutless politicians sit on their hands as violent thugs burned that city down last summer. It disgusted me.

But rather than hunting down and punishing the rioters, looters, vandals and arsonists, the state prosecutor launched a politically-motivated persecution of Kyle Rittenhouse, even after he was captured on video clearly defending himself.

As a former homicide detective with the City of Milwaukee police department, I am acutely aware of what is necessary to charge someone with felony homicide. Those elements are not present in Kyle's case. As a detective, I made recommendations to the prosecutor during a charging conference. I would have recommended that no criminal charge against Rittenhouse be issued under his right to self-defense, when considering the totality of the circumstances because how he responded was reasonable under those circumstances.

What's happening to Kyle Rittenhouse is a **blatant miscarriage of justice and an abuse of government authority.** I won't sit by and watch it happen and neither should you.
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0jrf23bk3n9fer1ov3o5o5p68cmopvap0nhk5pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)
|
---
I recently spoke with Kyle. I told him to pray; pray for the strength to endure the horror he's been through and the attacks that followed by the agenda-driven advocates who despise our Constitution, the police, law and order, and the rule of law. I told him that I would do everything I could to make sure he has the resources for his legal defense. I committed to work with his mother, Wendy, who is worrying about their mounting legal defense bill that is leaving them in financial ruin. She is a victim of this atrocity as well.

Nobody should have to go through this after defending his own life. If they can do this to Kyle, they can do it to you! Don't let our God-given right to self-defense die because Kyle Rittenhouse could not afford to defend himself in a court of law. It very well could if together we don't fight for Kyle and fight for him now.

**That leaves us with a clear job between now and trial on November 1 - raise a final $300,000 come hell or high water, and I need your help.**

**[Will you make as large a donation as you can to FreeKyleUSA right now](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu732mf6uvjklh1dors6d1ir43mfcfe214b15018_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl4neh7oll59rmltir1sfatq4n3llig1quq4a3do_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)
|
---
Americans aren't pushovers, and neither is Kyle Rittenhouse. He's a tough kid who risked his life trying to help people that night last summer.

For over a year, tens of thousands of patriots across this country have had his back by donating towards his legal defense, but it's what we do over these next few weeks that really matters. A legal defense against this type of charge is expensive.

**[Kyle 's family believes a final $300,000 should cover their legal costs, so I join his mother Wendy in asking you to help by making a donation now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za6tv98u289aek6v882vbs0g778vqouv0p3uf0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)**

Kyle's future, and the future of self-defense in America are on the line. **ALL funds donated will go directly to his legal defense**.

Let's get this done. Can I count on you?

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3n2k40mjqbuqp4uaoj3s55fgmtgnsd16l89chgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5j62ob4s1h2bs)
| | | _Copyright(C) 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved._ Free Kyle USA PO Box 5322 Reno, NV 89513
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](http://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2zu65e8ipfu7qkjbnjfu9trvjoq29scoelovho85o).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z94r6ltqutmf2seucu1tnll3lkd7jkif6tmfrjc0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6clgmcob1cjg649fg)

name: Team Turner
subject: Tomorrow is Halloween — and our first end-of-month fundraising deadline. 👻
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38025325/313659072/1761773496?refcode=211030_FR_eom1team_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2NjOWE2Mi0wMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XFPc52JGI0DXULXv2aDbYdAfTU0FXeQyZSNrU_0Yh_k=)
---
Tomorrow is Halloween, folks, and there are a lot of spooky things going on in the spirit of celebration for this fun holiday.

**But what’s truly giving us nightmares today isn’t ghosts, goblins, or horror movies. It’s the imminent threat of a far-right takeover.**

**_The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling._** They are struggling to make ends meet because of starvation wages and skyrocketing health care costs. They’re struggling to stay healthy because of polluted air and water. They’re struggling to put food on the table, to put a roof over their heads, to receive a quality education, and so much more.

We’re a part of this team led by Senator Nina Turner because she’s building a movement that brings together like-minded organizers, activists, progressives, Democrats, and leaders to champion the causes that we care about — the ones that serve everyday, ordinary Americans — not the rich and powerful.

**As she says, “ _Our collective success is rooted in organizing._ ” That means that in order to achieve our shared goals, our power is in our voices. And together we are louder, and we are stronger.**

[**But if we’re going to keep mobilizing and engaging with folks whose values align with ours, we need to hit our online fundraising goal of $16,400 by tomorrow’s critical end-of-month deadline. Rush a contribution right now to make sure we get there on time >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38025326/313659073/1761773496?refcode=211030_FR_eom1team_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2NjOWE2Mi0wMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XFPc52JGI0DXULXv2aDbYdAfTU0FXeQyZSNrU_0Yh_k=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$11 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38025327/313659074/1761773496?refcode=211030_FR_eom1team_EL11&amount=11&refcode2=EL11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2NjOWE2Mi0wMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XFPc52JGI0DXULXv2aDbYdAfTU0FXeQyZSNrU_0Yh_k=)********

clean_body: The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling. | | | = Tomorrow is Halloween, folks, and there are a lot of spooky things going on in the spirit of celebration for this fun holiday. But what’s truly giving us nightmares today isn’t ghosts, goblins, or horror movies. It’s the imminent threat of a far-right takeover. The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling. They are struggling to make ends meet because of starvation wages and skyrocketing health care costs. They’re struggling to stay healthy because of polluted air and water. They’re struggling to put food on the table, to put a roof over their heads, to receive a quality education, and so much more. We’re a part of this team led by Senator Nina Turner because she’s building a movement that brings together like-minded organizers, activists, progressives, Democrats, and leaders to champion the causes that we care about — the ones that serve everyday, ordinary Americans — not the rich and powerful. As she says, “ Our collective success is rooted in organizing. ” That means that in order to achieve our shared goals, our power is in our voices. California's Citizen Redistricting Committee just released a "starting point" map outlining where the new congressional district boundaries could be.

**In CA-01, their first visualization shows a _nine point improvement_ for Democrats compared to the previous district. It's still early, but that would put us well within range of flipping CA-01 from red to blue.**

I've met with thousands of voters who are fed up with Doug LaMalfa’s lack of attention to our issues -- choosing to prioritize Trump's "Big Lie" and conspiracy theories instead. That’s why we outraised him, and now that our district could tilt more Democratic, this could be our best chance to unseat him!

clean_body: The map gives Democrats a +9 improvement in CA-01. | = BREAKING: Redistricting Commission’s "Starting Point" Map gives Democrats a +9 improvement in CA-01 = | = This is a game changer, friend. California's Citizen Redistricting Committee just released a "starting point" map outlining where the new congressional district boundaries could be. In CA-01, their first visualization shows a nine point improvement for Democrats compared to the previous district. It's still early, but that would put us well within range of flipping CA-01 from red to blue. I've met with thousands of voters who are fed up with Doug LaMalfa’s lack of attention to our issues -- choosing to prioritize Trump's "Big Lie" and conspiracy theories instead. body:
He's fundraising for our opponent, and we need your help. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1]Dear friends,
Donald Trump is coming to Tampa in 10 days to fundraise for the National Republican Congressional Committee.
Our race is one of the Republicans' top targets, so really, he's here to fundraise directly for my opponent.
Even after leaving office, Trump still directs a huge Republican machine and fundraising apparatus. Tickets for his event are between $5,000 and $255,000, and that money is a major threat to our success.
We need your help to fight back, and I’m asking you, please, will you contribute $15, $40, or more to our campaign so we can beat the Trump machine?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $40 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1?express_lane=true&amount=40&refcode=express_lane_40] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1]We need to show Donald Trump that Tampa Bay does not support his brand of bigotry and hatred. He made our country a more dangerous place, and as new details come to light about the January 6th Insurrection, we cannot allow him to continue having influence over our politics.
Trump has already endorsed our opponent, and I refuse to allow our district to be represented by someone who will follow in his footsteps.
Let’s work together to elect Democrats and end Donald Trump’s disastrous influence on our politics. Please click here to join the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom1]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Rand Paul
subject: My next big step to FIRE Anthony Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbons for Ohio
body:
Let me make something abundantly clear: Anthony Fauci’s career is going down in flames. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8917%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0jgEP0IpFBBf5To1pRSKMg&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhSzCPV2b6PeIdo7cUgJdw&sysid=1)

Friend,

**Let me make something abundantly clear:** Anthony Fauci’s career is going down in flames.

But nothing is guaranteed yet... let me tell you what my next big steps are to FIRING Anthony Fauci from his overpaid job.
* **FIRST:** I will continue to expose Fauci for LYING to me while testifying under oath about funding gain of function research in Wuhan, China.

* **NEXT:** I need reinforcements in the U.S. Senate to ultimately fire this tyrant. **Which is why I am endorsing Mike Gibbons for the U.S. Senate in Ohio.**

* **FINAL STEP:** Together, Mike Gibbons and I can have Anthony Fauci terminated and begin removing the entire Mask Mafia from the federal government. No more mask mandates... no more lockdowns... no more fake science used to justify socialism.

Mike Gibbons is a hardcore constitutional conservative and America-First champion. I am proud to endorse him for the U.S. Senate and look forward to gaining an ally to take down Anthony Fauci, Pelosi, and Joe Biden.

[**Please click here or the image below to make a donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or even more!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Zd7QHsJUWy0vTrk%2b%2bQODg&sysid=1)

**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhSzCPV2b6PeIdo7cUgJdw&sysid=1)**
_(I am proud to endorse my friend Mike Gibbons for the U.S. Senate. I need more allies to take down Anthony Fauci and the Mask Mafia.[ Please donate to Mike’s campaign by clicking here.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HnlFB6xYWOHytB4PzL4deA&sysid=1))_

I believe Mike Gibbons’ campaign for Senate is one of the most critical races of the 2022 cycle. Joe Biden is spending tens of millions of dollars (soon hundreds of millions) to seize the Senate.

_Mike Gibbons is the most hardcore constitutional conservative running in Ohio AND he can win_.

* Mike supports shutting down the Department of Education and eliminating Critical Race Theory in our schools.
* He is 100% pro-life and a champion of the Second Amendment.
* Mike is willing to do battle with the Establishment and has proven he’s a FIGHTER.
* Mike believes in Election Integrity and will not allow Pelosi to manage our election process.

[**Friend, I told Mike I would help him raise $50,000 for his campaign in the next 72 hours. Can I count on your help? Please help me elect Mike Gibbons to the Senate by making an URGENT donation today: **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QRqfrTilEQOXk%2bXbKPk3yg&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhSzCPV2b6PeIdo7cUgJdw&sysid=1)

Once I see your name on the list of donors, I will email or text Mike to tell him you chipped in!

Please consider this both an urgent and personal favor I am asking you.

Mike has become a great friend of mine and I am making it my mission to help elect him to the Senate in 2022.

Together, we are going to FIRE Anthony Fauci, end the Mask Mafia, restore sanity to our education system, and Drain the Swamp.

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

Paid for by Gibbons for Ohio

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8917%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0jgEP0IpFBBf5To1pRSKMg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8917%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0jgEP0IpFBBf5To1pRSKMg&sysid=1)

**This message is just for folks who care about the Virginia elections: **
_(We're a nationwide group, helping educator-candidates running all over the country, and it's OK that some folks are more focused on Congress or school board elections). _ I was out knocking on doors last weekend, and it's clear that we can win these elections if Democrats turn out. But it's also clear that many Democrats are uninspired and frustrated at what's happening in Washington, D.C. We can solve that by talking with voters about the incredible educator-candidates running for office. When they hear about Debra and Schuyler and Kelly and Kim and Shelly, they get excited to vote. That's how we win. **So I'm heading back out to canvass and asking for your help. We are $7,945 from our Virginia GOTV Fund goal. [Please split a donation today and help all five of our candidates' GOTV efforts this weekend.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38026068/313662008/-780405353?refcode=email_fr_20211028VAGOTV_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZGMxNmVkLTA1MzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uGnS4bC-OmgTZq9J8VIxOEcuGmaSgSe28YukLJFoNzM=)** Americans for Prosperity, the Koch brothers' front group, just reported spending another $16,179 to defeat Debra Gardner. That brings them to over $200,000 in just one election. We can defeat that right-wing corporate money with more volunteers, fueled up with more granola bars and water, knocking on more doors this weekend. **[We can't leave any stone unturned, and we can't miss any Democrat voter during GOTV. If you're not able to knock doors this weekend, help out with a contribution now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38026069/313662009/-780405353?refcode=email_fr_20211028VAGOTV_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZGMxNmVkLTA1MzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uGnS4bC-OmgTZq9J8VIxOEcuGmaSgSe28YukLJFoNzM=)** _****_ | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: This message is just for folks who care about the Virginia elections. | = This message is just for folks who care about the Virginia elections: (We're a nationwide group, helping educator-candidates running all over the country, and it's OK that some folks are more focused on Congress or school board elections). I was out knocking on doors last weekend, and it's clear that we can win these elections if Democrats turn out. But it's also clear that many Democrats are uninspired and frustrated at what's happening in Washington, D.C. We can solve that by talking with voters about the incredible educator-candidates running for office. When they hear about Debra and Schuyler and Kelly and Kim and Shelly, they get excited to vote. That's how we win. So I'm heading back out to canvass and asking for your help. We are $7,945 from our Virginia GOTV Fund goal. = Americans for Prosperity, the Koch brothers' front group, just reported spending another $16,179 to defeat Debra Gardner. That brings them to over $200,000 in just one election. We can defeat that right-wing corporate money with more volunteers, fueled up with more granola bars and water, knocking on more doors this weekend. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Pete | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. clean_body: Dear friend, I'm running to represent the people of Southern Arizona, not special interests. I want to help create a strong and sustainable economy for generations to come. That's why I've got to ask: = Like any working mom I understand that planning ahead is everything. That's why I'm asking you now, four days from our deadline, to pitch in. Because when we report that we’re bringing in a substantial grassroots fundraising haul, we can keep potential opponents from jumping into the race and plan more strategically. What’s more, I guarantee our extreme right-wing opponents and their dark money funded campaigns will be among the first to look at our fundraising reports. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

subject: My radical Trump Impeachment Manager opponent outraised me

body:
I can't believe it.
| |
---
| | |
Peter,

I can't believe I am even writing these words right now. _**My radical Trump Impeachment Manager opponent has outraised me for the 2nd quarter in a row. **_

Florida is a **KEY** state for Democrats, and they are doing everything they can to **FLIP** my seat **BLUE.**

**Democrats are:**
* Spending $300,000+ a week on ads attacking me.
* Super PACs are pouring MILLIONS into my opponent's war chest.
* Chuck Schumer even listed me as one of his top targets!

While it seems like the odds are stacked against me, there is one thing Democrats don't have: strong patriots like you, Peter.

I know you are in this fight with me, **[which is why I am humbly asking if you could chip in $15 right now to fight against anything Democrats plan to throw at me.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58635414:JlBZra2-N:m:1:3253819041:00846F7AE8E002D0AEB0DE95C0A7E2EB:r "which is why I am
humbly asking if you could chip in $15 right now to fight against anything Democrats plan to throw at me.") **

MARCO")

Peter, I know it's going to be an uphill battle, but it's crucial we keep Florida red _\-- and keep my radical Trump Impeachment Manager opponent OUT of the Senate. _

Your endorsement would mean so much to me in this critical moment. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027635/313669632/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485) | I normally reach out to ask for your financial support -- but what I need more than anything right now is your personal endorsement.

[_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I’m humbly asking 1,000 more Democrats to sign their name, lend me their endorsement, and help me prove we have what it takes to WIN this race. Can I count on you to have my back with a quick signature before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027638/313669636/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)

[**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027640/313669637/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)
| **[ENDORSE WES >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027642/313669639/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)**
---

I normally reach out to ask you for money.

[**But right now -- what I need more than anything -- is your official endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027644/313669641/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)

But first, I hope you’ll allow me to earn it:

Unlike many who run for office, I know what it's like to struggle.

I know what it's like to achieve dreams my parents couldn't even imagine.

I watched my father die when I was just three years old. My mom raised my sisters and me all on her own.

As a child, I faced my share of challenges and struggles. My life could have gone a different way.

But I joined the Army, became a captain in the 82nd Airborne Division, and led soldiers into combat in Afghanistan.

I earned a Rhodes Scholarship. I served in the White House. I built and ran a successful business in Baltimore to help kids go to college.

And I became CEO of one of the country’s largest organizations fighting to end poverty.

[_**Now, I’m running for Governor, because I believe no matter what road you start down, you deserve a path to success. I’m humbly asking 1,000 more Democrats to sign their name, lend me their endorsement, and help me prove we have what it takes to win. Can I count on your signature? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027646/313669643/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)

If I don’t gather the necessary support by midnight, opponents could use it to claim Marylanders want another Republican as Governor. We can’t let that happen.

I promise you this: I will have your back every single day as Governor.

[_**Right now, I’m hoping you will have mine with your personal endorsement. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38027649/313669645/-1611728194?source=welcomestream-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY5YTczNy0wOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daSN_XnCf9ePkwtTg1xPJdg0K8-Uxt1VMXTXL8br93I=&emci=86e2fad4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=7469a737-0938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)

Elevate,
Wes

---

Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. clean_body: | | | I normally reach out to ask for your financial support -- but what I need more than anything right now is your personal endorsement. | I normally reach out to ask you for money. But first, I hope you’ll allow me to earn it: Unlike many who run for office, I know what it's like to struggle. I know what it's like to achieve dreams my parents couldn't even imagine. I watched my father die when I was just three years old. My mom raised my sisters and me all on her own. As a child, I faced my share of challenges and struggles. My life could have gone a different way. But I joined the Army, became a captain in the 82nd Airborne Division, and led soldiers into combat in Afghanistan. I earned a Rhodes Scholarship. I served in the White House. I built and ran a successful business in Baltimore to help kids go to college. And I became CEO of one of the country’s largest organizations fighting to end poverty. If I don’t gather the necessary support by midnight, opponents could use it to claim Marylanders want another Republican as Governor. We can’t let that happen. I promise you this: I will have your back every single day as Governor. Elevate, Wes Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. And we need your help to do it. | | = Making your gift monthly will maximize the resources to help Wes bring change to Maryland. Make your donation monthly right now! | = It’s supporters like you who fuel Wes’ campaign and we’re so thankful for your support. We’re committed to ensuring your contact information is up to date and accurate. If you are not dpwillis67@gmail.com, please update your preferred name and email . Any contact information here reflects the donor information we have on file for this specific email. If you donated with a spouse, with a check, or with a different email address, it may not be reflected in our records just yet. Thank you so much for your support and understanding while we work to update our records. If you’d prefer to receive fewer emails, we understand. Please update your preferences We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please do so below: Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States | | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER. | | Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

body:
Friend,

Earlier this week, Wesley's campaign started his "Women for Wes" coalition, which is composed of a diverse group of women from across Texas' 38th Congressional district who are concerned about the future and our nation. In as little as 48 hours, over 100 women, including myself, joined this coalition because we know that electing Wesley to Congress is the first step to fixing our community's problems.

The support we've received has been overwhelming, and it's a true testament to the enormous grassroots support Wesley has behind him. These women realize that Wesley is the only candidate who will stand up against the radical left and fight to protect our elections, secure our southern border, and keep Critical Race Theory out of our children's schools.

Sincerely,
Emily Hunt

****[JOIN THE TEAM](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=1a3e882043544c4a9bdaad360c931e65&_e=a61E-FbOBvZkgRguMMCQC-uETBH7e4uiqAkMykKhoB3yemXRC6moaIy1ddG36rrZye5TOP4rH1hws_7gJR3wR7Bhwj9deBkKZmX938me_frgq1KO_aV0k3riEgaXEg3X1YdpWqDMKr7rXbEySTRpajkeN2l81NBGeAR3NvqkvBnYKjMGjpxgVC7Ny-5IjueTj9vp4SToo1-_JXdxK0uGfuLbi3rpNjHBM4VcvYRPaR91GwdanLM32fdEUXuC9qQRhgz6Qp1qZgomwd7eRf9fFBFjgS2MFiFWExzpAdZlSQc%3D)****

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Is there any doubt Kim Wyman and the RINOs are working with the Dems?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BycSbP&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGfwzEh&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/5dd6673d-7a24-4b26-910a-3be3d7f9d77b.png]

Kim Wyman Gets a New Job From Clueless Joe And All The Mainstream Republicans Can Do Is Cheer

I have no doubt in my mind there was fraud in the 2020 election cycle. Fraud in Washington State and fraud throughout America. When my team filed our lawsuit to challenge the election results on December 23, 2020, we were met with vicious pushback from Kim Wyman's office, the Mainstream Republicans, the Democrat Party of Washington, the corrupt media in Seattle, and Attorney General Bob Fergusson's office.

If we lost fair and square I could live with that. I never conceded because I have never believed we lost a fair fight. I will never concede unless there is a statewide forensic audit of the election and it is clear that I did not win.

So, why am I running for Congress if I believe I won the Governor's race? That's a good question.

This movement we started can't stop because of the events in 2020--we must push forward where we can WHILE WE SUPPORT THE EFFORTS FOR AN AUDIT!I believe now more than ever that defeating the Democrats at the state and local levels begins by cleaning out the RINOs in our own party who collude and work closely with the Democrats to pass their liberal agenda and destroy the country we love so dearly.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/a0657400-12bd-404e-b2c0-94b32b1b7edd.jpg]
But wait, there's more.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/076e0d28-a54d-4f18-8d5b-725fa89e0c22.jpg]
Why am I running in Congressional District 4 against another RINO--Dan Newhouse--the guy who voted to impeach President Trump and voted with Nancy Pelosi to set up the January 6th Commission? Because I am going to retire this RINO in 2022.

You've always had my back and we need your continued support in order to finish the month strong and outraise the Mainstream Republicans in this race. These people hate me because I stand up for you, for individual freedom and liberty, and for the Constitution. I have always kept up the fight against these globalists in Washington State and now in Washington DC and I always will.

Together we can reach our goal if everyone does their part according to their resources. I appreciate you all more than you know.

OUR DEADLINE IS FRIDAY AT 11:59 PM PST!!!

Can I count on you? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoF8uX&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMRIwKH&]

Loren

PS: LET'S GO BRANDON!

name: Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Please consider contributing even $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can stay on track and end the Democrats’ control of Washington.
| | Hey Fellow American,

Right now, Democrats are attempting to force through the most radical and progressive agenda our country has ever seen. Make no mistake - their vision would fundamentally change America forever.

We need your help to stop the Left, so I’ll get straight to the point. Senator Mike Lee (R-UT) and I have a major end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources needed to take back the Senate.

[**Your support is critical. clean_body: It’s not a fluke | | | = | | Glenn Youngkin and I are TIED, Derek. It’s not just one or two fluke polls — top-rated pollsters have consistently shown a dead heat in this must-win race for Democrats: Suffolk University, 10/26/2021: TIE Emerson College, 10/25/2021: TIE Monmouth University, 10/20/2021: TIE Republicans are fired up to elect their guy because they know it’s the only way Donald Trump will be able to launch his 2024 comeback. Trump knows it too — that’s why he announced yesterday he’s coming to Virginia to give his handpicked candidate Glenn Youngkin a boost before Election Day. With just 5 days left in this race, this is looking like it will all come down to voter turnout. So truthfully, I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up and donating to our final fundraising goal. We need to get fired up, Derek — it’s the only way we’ll be able to STOP Donald Trump’s comeback. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s do this, Derek. This isn't the first time Marjorie Taylor Greene has resorted to childlike shouting matches with fellow members of Congress. Eric Swalwell and Debbie Dingell have also been victims of her tantrums. _I have to say, where has the civility gone in our politics? What kind of example is this?_ Violence and extremism have no place in our country, and definitely no place in the halls of Congress. But that is exactly what we're up against next year as more extremists and Qanon followers run for office. I know what it's like to have to run against one - and I know what it takes to beat them. body:
Help Rob Ortt protect fair elections by VOTING NO on the back of your ballot
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| URGENT REMINDER: Vote 'NO' on props 1, 3 and 4
---
| Friend -
With Election Day just days away, Rob Ortt is asking for your help getting the word out to protect fair elections in New York.
Albany politicians have snuck three constitutional amendments on to the back of the November ballot that would:

* Increase fraud and abuse in our elections

* Allow for ballot harvesting

* Let politicians gerrymander state and federal legislative districts

When you go to vote this year, remember to turn your ballot over and VOTE NO on proposition 1, proposition 3 and proposition 4.

Peter, did you know the last time a woman was elected statewide in Virginia was in 1986?

History will be made on November 2nd — _and it matters who we elect._

**Winsome Sears has promised to repeal abortion rights** in a Texas‐style ban.

**Winsome Sears has refused to get vaccinated** and will actively work against building back better from this pandemic.

Earlier this month, my opponent Madison Cawthorn released an ad mobilizing his far-right base around promoting “Christian values.”

_I'm actually a pastor and my faith informs me that we care for the poor and heal the sick._

But instead, Cawthorn promotes a gross agenda to slash funding for our vital social safety nets and healthcare.

**My faith does not condone Cawthorn’s cruel political agenda.** And I will not sit back when far-right extremists like Cawthorn use faith to promote this distorted MAGA brand of politics. **[That’s why I’m running for Congress to oust him, and it’s why I need 2,000 supporters to support our movement against him. clean_body: Madison Cawthorn is the antithesis of my faith | = Earlier this month, my opponent Madison Cawthorn released an ad mobilizing his far-right base around promoting “Christian values.” I'm actually a pastor and my faith informs me that we care for the poor and heal the sick. But instead, Cawthorn promotes a gross agenda to slash funding for our vital social safety nets and healthcare. My faith does not condone Cawthorn’s cruel political agenda. And I will not sit back when far-right extremists like Cawthorn use faith to promote this distorted MAGA brand of politics. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = My faith deserves a better messenger, and our district needs an honest Democrat in office who respects the separation of church and state — one who will not tarnish faith in the halls of Congress, or his Congressional responsibilities in the name of faith. = 2,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PITCH IN NOW If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Yours in the fight, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. name: Charles Graham
subject: Will you support my run for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38029306/313678833/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzYjM4Ny0xMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZG7GVt0Oefpd0RTmj5VwwtyHKf_q-SjJl2Tlsckutc=)

| | Hey there folks, My name is Charles Graham, and I’m running for Congress. I’m about to ask you [**to contribute to my $20,000 end-of-month fundraising goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38029309/313678835/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211028_FR_EOM4Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzYjM4Ny0xMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZG7GVt0Oefpd0RTmj5VwwtyHKf_q-SjJl2Tlsckutc=)\-- but first, I have a story to tell you. When I was just a boy, the Ku Klux Klan announced a night rally in my home county of Robeson, North Carolina -- a poor farming community made up of black, white, and American Indian folks like my family and me -- proud members of the Lumbee tribe. The Klan wanted to terrorize the Lumbees and black folks in Robeson County, calling the Lumbees “mongrels” and “half breeds” -- and, despite warnings from the police chief that our community would not tolerate their hate, **50 Klan members arrived the night of January 18th, 1958.** Not a bad turn out for a winter night -- **problem is, they were surrounded by _400 Lumbees._** Hundreds of regular folks -- barbers, expectant mothers -- banded together to fight back against hate and ignorance. The Klan got run out of town, and after the press ran with the story of one town beating the Klan, the Battle of Hayes Pond became a forgotten part of history. But, it’s worth remembering -- especially today, when lies in Washington turn into violence -- like the January 6th insurrection on our Nation’s Capitol. **And the biggest lie is that America is at war with _itself._** **That’s why I’m running for Congress** \-- because sometimes, we’re called upon to put things right. Like the folks who showed up to Hayes Pond to fight back against hate, or America today -- a country that is so divided and afraid. I’m running to remind folks that we can trust our neighbors, that we don’t have to live in fear. The people who stood up at Hayes Pond refused to be afraid. And I want to share that lesson with every North Carolinian and every American -- **t****hat human dignity is a human right.** It’s time to rebuild our trust in one another and rebuild our Nation. [**If you’re with me, will you donate to my campaign today to help chip away at my end-of-month fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38029316/313678841/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211028_FR_EOM4Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzYjM4Ny0xMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZG7GVt0Oefpd0RTmj5VwwtyHKf_q-SjJl2Tlsckutc=) | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38029318/313678846/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211028_FR_EOM4Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzYjM4Ny0xMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZG7GVt0Oefpd0RTmj5VwwtyHKf_q-SjJl2Tlsckutc=)
---
I’m not a career politician -- I’m an educator, a high school basketball coach, an employer, and a dad.
When I was working with special needs students in the 1980s, they had almost no rights in our school system. I spent 30 years fighting the system to get their humanity recognized.
Now, I work with the same folks -- to place home-health aids with seniors and the disabled, so they can stay in their homes.
As a legislator in the NC House for the past 11 years, I don’t play politics -- I study, I listen, and I vote my conscience.
**And you can expect me to do the same in Congress.**
I’m going to fight for access to affordable healthcare, job opportunities in my community, and more resources for our Veterans returning from war.
The people at Hayes Pond didn’t set out to make history -- they were just answering a neighbor’s call. And now, it’s our turn.
[**Will you help me answer the call and donate to my campaign to bring dignity and trust back to the American people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38029322/313678849/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211028_FR_EOM4Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzYjM4Ny0xMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZG7GVt0Oefpd0RTmj5VwwtyHKf_q-SjJl2Tlsckutc=)

clean_body: | = | | Hey there folks, My name is Charles Graham, and I’m running for Congress. I’m about to ask you =\-- but first, I have a story to tell you. When I was just a boy, the Ku Klux Klan announced a night rally in my home county of Robeson, North Carolina -- a poor farming community made up of black, white, and American Indian folks like my family and me -- proud members of the Lumbee tribe. The Klan wanted to terrorize the Lumbees and black folks in Robeson County, calling the Lumbees “mongrels” and “half breeds” -- and, despite warnings from the police chief that our community would not tolerate their hate, 50 Klan members arrived the night of January 18th, 1958. Not a bad turn out for a winter night -- problem is, they were surrounded by 400 Lumbees. Hundreds of regular folks -- barbers, expectant mothers -- banded together to fight back against hate and ignorance. The Klan got run out of town, and after the press ran with the story of one town beating the Klan, the Battle of Hayes Pond became a forgotten part of history. But, it’s worth remembering -- especially today, when lies in Washington turn into violence -- like the January 6th insurrection on our Nation’s Capitol. And the biggest lie is that America is at war with itself. That’s why I’m running for Congress \-- because sometimes, we’re called upon to put things right. Like the folks who showed up to Hayes Pond to fight back against hate, or America today -- a country that is so divided and afraid. And I want to share that lesson with every North Carolinian and every American -- that human dignity is a human right. It’s time to rebuild our trust in one another and rebuild our Nation. = | | | = I’m not a career politician -- I’m an educator, a high school basketball coach, an employer, and a dad. Now, I work with the same folks -- to place home-health aids with seniors and the disabled, so they can stay in their homes. As a legislator in the NC House for the past 11 years, I don’t play politics -- I study, I listen, and I vote my conscience. And you can expect me to do the same in Congress. I’m going to fight for access to affordable healthcare, job opportunities in my community, and more resources for our Veterans returning from war. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: $10 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s where you fit into our end-of-month goal.
#
Hi Peter — did you catch John's note to you yesterday?
We can hardly believe it ourselves, but we’re _so_ close to hitting a huge fundraising milestone on this campaign! **If we’re able to hit our end-of-month goal, we’ll have raised $10M over the course of our *entire* campaign to make John our 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate.**
It's gonna take all of us to get to this historic goal — and truth be told, we're _reeeeeally_ hoping to see a surge of online donations in the next few hours. We’d be thrilled if you’d help us cross it, Peter.
As we look into our donor file as we near this milestone, here’s what we found next to your name! 👇
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35190?refcode=em20211028-3234&t=1&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)**
---
Your donation is really a key 🧩 of the puzzle as we game out just how we’re going to be able to cross this $10M finish line before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.
**[We started this campaign as a fully-grassroots funded effort, and we’re going to keep it that way. Will you donate your very first $5 right now? John isn't accepting a cent of corporate PAC money in this campaign — this is a truly grassroots campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35190?refcode=em20211028-3234&t=2&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)**
And if we keep it up, we might just change history.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35190?refcode=em20211028-3234&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)**
Here’s what this upcoming $10M milestone means. Across over 350K individual contributions, and with folks from every single one of PA's 67 counties chipping in, we’re proud to have raised these funds from individual contributions across our Commonwealth and the country.
****
So what do you say? Should we do the thing? Let’s change history, expand our majority in the Senate 😉 and crush this goal!
In gratitude,
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211028-3234-footer&t=22&refcode2=3234_434096_QcO5Fy&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3234%2E434096%2EQcO5Fy)

As we look into our donor file as we near this milestone, here’s what we found next to your name! 👇 Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2021 Donor: No — not yet! 2021 Total: $0.00 Suggested Donation: $5 Your donation is really a key 🧩 of the puzzle as we game out just how we’re going to be able to cross this $10M finish line before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. And if we keep it up, we might just change history. Here’s what this upcoming $10M milestone means. Across over 350K individual contributions, and with folks from every single one of PA's 67 counties chipping in, we’re proud to have raised these funds from individual contributions across our Commonwealth and the country. ** So what do you say? Should we do the thing? Let’s change history, expand our majority in the Senate 😉 and crush this goal! In gratitude, Eric Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Act now: PA Senate working to legalize carrying guns without a license.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

They never seem to learn.

PA has seen an alarming uptick in gun violence since the start of the pandemic. So what did our state senators do? They proposed a "Constitutional Carry" bill, S.B. 565, to allow people to carry firearms freely and without a license.

This terrible and extremely dangerous bill was introduced by Republican PA Sen. Chris Dush -- the same guy leading the Big Lie charge in PA and the 2020 election investigation scam in our state. This guy clearly has it out for our safety AND democracy.

You'll recognize this bill as more horrible legislation developed in Texas to plague the nation. S.B. 565 would allow anyone in Pennsylvania to keep and bear firearms without a permit, including carrying loaded or unloaded guns openly or concealed. It eliminates restrictions to carry on public streets or private property in Philadelphia, too.

We MUST take action immediately. Call your state senators and ask them to vote AGAINST this absurdly awful legislation.

TAKE ACTION [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/stop-sb-565/]

Please also help us as we educate and rally voters and train organizers before the coming election to vote in progressive lawmakers and judges, so that we can stop worrying about awful bills like this in the future.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-progressives-in-pa?refcode=102821 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-progressives-in-pa?refcode=102821]

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund

Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

Dear Friend, We are officially halfway done with the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour and another step closer to Election Day! Day 5 was a blast, and I am so grateful for everyone that I met who is ready to join our movement to elect a new kind of leader in the Commonwealth.
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWLxDB5gk7mVW5PRBk11PZXfXW2H1VMy4zbZj7N5g75j13lSbNV1-WJV7CgRgPW5l102m2pll0wW7SLN5p6_mQwWW3dknp_5rvWQ_N4c3p0pG_JYFMF5bWFw-fC5W6FcTBN3p8G97T5-h5443zS1W5dFz512Jz1HTW6SS6sq3TJtTkW40V_WV6r8l3fW8vGfc646p-rfW1n4qnJ74PxLdW7nCZb94xLrybVj8TRG2r-WHgVlWTmG6py8yNW4mG4cC6cTlGXW5kxdQ_8V0Dm9W7RVGKt57BxkjW3rkQ3v24pnGXW1txgjk71_pvkVbxjXw2NFbL7W212pkN22G4bL3bbG1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
During Day 5, we gathered signatures from people at our stops in Rocky Mount, Fairlawn, and Roanoke. Everyone here is standing up to keep our communities safe, restore excellence in education, and lower the cost of living for all Virginians. Together, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
---
The energy in Blacksburg last night was infectious! This is a new day for Virginia, and I am ready to take Day 6 by storm after seeing so many people who are ready to soar, not settle.
---
Get ready to see the #WinWithGlenn bus during Day 6! Today we are making stops in Bedford, Farmville, Appomattox, Amherst, Buena Vista, and Fisherville. Folks, I am not slowing down, and I cannot wait to get to work for you as your next Governor. Bring your Sharpies and sign the bus! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---

body:

Before we ask you for a **[$3 contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38031105/313686185/-787496292?refcode=em-102821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjMzhiNC0xNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOz832Hn0tB8rvhSyR_PILS4An_PYosJbPY_77pnt6Q=)** to defeat career politician and GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy, here's the latest on what he's been up to:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38031127/313686192/-787496292?refcode=em-102821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjMzhiNC0xNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOz832Hn0tB8rvhSyR_PILS4An_PYosJbPY_77pnt6Q=)
A _Washington Post_ source recently revealed that **Kevin McCarthy** is priding himself on his "good relationship" with Trump and says he "stays close to him" in closed-door briefings with high-dollar donors.

McCarthy's making his #1 job delivering the House for Trump in 2022. That's why he's going to great lengths to block the investigation into the January 6th insurrection. All of this comes at the expense of working families in the Central Valley.

The Central Valley can do better.

**That's why we're working to elect veteran public school teacher Marisa Wood instead.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38031140/313686216/-787496292?refcode=em-102821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjMzhiNC0xNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOz832Hn0tB8rvhSyR_PILS4An_PYosJbPY_77pnt6Q=)
Marisa has built her career on serving students and their families. She's running for Congress to fight for health care access, education funding, immigration reform, environmental protection and much more.

She's the antithesis of what Kevin McCarthy stands for as a politician, and that's why she's the perfect person to beat him. **But we have to make sure voters know that she's the viable Democrat running. Doing so takes time and grassroots resources, which is why we're asking:**

**[Will you rush in $3 or more toward our end-of-month fundraising deadline? JD Vance’s book, _Hillbilly Elegy_ , costs $12.35.

You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for your dog), OR you can donate $12.35 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and expand the Senate majority.

**While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out of touch. name: Palmer HQ
subject: The numbers you need to know, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Hi, Peter — you’re an integral part of our campaign. So as we’re approaching our end-of-month deadline, we wanted to send a quick note about the numbers we’re working with...

FIVE: seats that stand between us and a GOP takeover of the House next year.

FOUR: days until our fundraising deadline, when our opponents will see how much we’ve raised and test the strength of our campaign.

THREE: donations from 18326 still needed to reach our goal.

CHIP IN RIGHT NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPIL-13-Email-Oct2021-FR-EOM?refcode=E12117-20211028-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20]

We’re proud to stand behind a candidate like David Palmer as this race is heating up, which is why we’re reaching out to ask for your help. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: The Majority of PA Voters Agree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=71c62a39cf&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | In this upcoming election[ (Nov. 2 or vote early!)](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=ade2600662&e=3f8e2ea1e3), Philadelphia voters can send a strong message to Harrisburg that we want action on legalizing the sale and recreational use of marijuana.

A “yes” vote on ballot question #1 means the Home Rule Charter, which functions as the city’s constitution, would be amended to include language urging the General Assembly to allow licensed dispensaries to operate in the state, subject to regulation and taxation, and permit state residents aged 21 and older to purchase marijuana and engage in recreational use. Recreational use and sale of marijuana would no longer be a crime.

I, along with the majority of all PA voters (58%), fully support the legalization of recreational cannabis for adults. By decriminalizing, legalizing, and taxing marijuana, we can create a tremendous source of state revenue that can help us not only fully fund our schools but bolster our treatment centers.

I’ve been pleased to see mounting bipartisan support of these efforts including new several new pieces of legislation brought to the table through cross-party initiatives.

Pain management cannot be solely driven by our pharmaceutical industry when numerous studies show that cannabis often has fewer side effects and far less dependency. Cannabis treatment can be one of the many avenues to lower the opioid epidemic plaguing our city.

We must do right for the thousands in jail on marijuana-related charges – their records must be fully expunged so that they can re-enter our workforce and society. Finally, we need a fair and transparent process for marijuana sales and taxation in the state of Pennsylvania. I fully support the passing of the Secure and Fair Enforcement (SAFE) Banking Act into law to better protect the commercial activities and growth potential of the cannabis industry on the state level.
**
We have growing support from both parties in Harrisburg and the majority of constituents to get this done. Now is the time to #LegalizeIt.**

[Can you help me get to Harrisburg to advocate for the legalization and taxation of marijuana?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=0733a53945&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=f41639e9ba&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
_A message about Tuesday's election in Pennsylvania
and why we must vote for our Democratic judicial candidates_
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=de3cac9743&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5d15e1d9e4&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

| | Dear Peter,

Illegal vaccine mandates are not enough for the tyrants in Washington.

_Now, they're coming for your kids_.

The Pharma executives who have made BILLIONS, the corrupt CDC and NIH who have lied to Congress, and the radical Communist left....

...they ALL want to forcefully inject your kids with mystery COVID serum.

This isn't about health. _It's about control_.

[_**Stand with me on the side of liberty by contributing to my election campaign today**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=daa28e9d1c&e=af4b86f5c6).

When I'm in Congress, parents, not the government, will decide what medicines their children take.

Kids have little to no chance of dying from COVID.

**That's why it's so crucial that we protect them from these dangerous and untested vaccines.**

[_**It's also why I need your generous contributions to my election campaign right away**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=2c01c633dd&e=af4b86f5c6).

[_**Every little bit helps me battle for this seat in Congress, where I'll protect Americans and their children from medical tyranny**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9dd77d5f16&e=af4b86f5c6).

It's also crucial, Fellow Patriot, that we hold Fauci accountable for his lies.

He lied under oath to Congress about gain-of-function research.

**He should be tried, convicted, and jailed like anyone else who commits such a brazen crime.**

[_**By chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more to my election campaign today, you're fighting against vaccine mandates and holding the medical tyrants accountable**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=e8bfa3cf18&e=af4b86f5c6).

Thank you in advance for helping me stand up to the powerful.
For America,
**** **Chief Jarome Bell**

Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District

**P.S. The COVID tyrants want to inject your kids with the rushed, untested vaccine.

I'm here to help stop them.**

body:

| | | |
---

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ul913fhklhv99qvadmke19gto6orvqtp92cdh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5gm2o34cdh2bs)
Texas emergency denied

Dear Conservatives-

Unbelieveable! Gov. Abbott had requested an emergency declaration for Texas due to the crisis at the southern border, and President Biden just rejected it! As a result, state and local communities bear the costs for over a million and a half illegal aliens surging the Texas border. Federal assistance is crucial to protect the lives, property, public health, and safety of the communities along the border.

Old-school social media platforms are severly limiting most media reporting about what is happening at our southern border. **So we created[CaucusRoom.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ur3odc80vkjalfdgfjig0i5u1jusf58anap1ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5gm2o34cdh2bs)** to give conservatives a place to have conversations that other platforms won't allow.

body:
I’m so sick and tired of this
#

Folks,
I’m so sick and tired of so-called Democrats like Senator Joe Manchin obstructing progress for working families.
Pennsylvania voters turned out by the millions to support President Joe Biden’s Build Back Better agenda last November.
But now that Manchin is destroying President Biden’s agenda piece by piece, all of the progress that we voted for is on hold.
**Look, if I’m elected to be Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator, you won’t ever have to worry about where I stand. I’ll work with President Biden to pass all of the Build Back Better agenda.**

name: Nina Turner
subject: We must abolish the filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
This is a racial justice issue. We must end this relic of the Jim Crow era.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033255/313694463/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=)
---
Let me start by making myself clear, folks: _**The filibuster is a relic of segregation and holdover from the Jim Crow era — and it must be eliminated.**_

As early as 1837, the filibuster was primarily used by Southern senators to defend slavery, protect segregation, and withhold voting rights from Black folks.

Throughout history, the outdated policy has hindered the advancement of civil rights by blocking anti-lynching bills, bills eliminating poll taxes, and anti-discrimination laws in areas of employment, housing, and more.

**We have allowed the filibuster to block racial justice and civil rights legislation for far too long. [It time to elect leaders who will fight to abolish this archaic procedure -- and that starts right here with our movement. Will you chip in now to help us eliminate the filibuster?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033256/313694464/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=)** **______[donate NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033257/313694465/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=)** Today, the filibuster still continues to hold up progress for working people and the economic agenda for the poor and barely-middle class. _And yes, that disproportionately means people of color._

The House has already passed landmark progressive legislation to benefit the working-class such as H.R.1 the For The People Act, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, the Freedom to Vote Act, bills that strengthen labor laws, comprehensive immigration reform, prescription drug price controls — and other bills that have no future in the Senate because of the filibuster.

Most recently, the filibuster has stalled President **Biden’s Build Back Better** plan that would invest $350 billion a year for the next decade into the struggles faced by working families. The bill includes improvements to Medicare, prescription drug costs, childcare, education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more -- all without raising taxes on everyday Americans.

**We will not be successful in closing the socioeconomic gaps in this country if the threat of the filibuster remains in the way of justice. That is why we must organize and build a coalition so that our voices are heard.[Will you rush a contribution to help our movement push for change? DONATE NOW to abolish the filibuster >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033258/313694466/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033259/313694467/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[**$11 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033281/313694468/1761773496?refcode=211028_FR_filibuster_B_EL11&amount=11&refcode2=EL11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGUwMGMyNy0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n98vFYcgd2yliCl8K6iyYCsg8tVIUaZy6OWQIE9QbNQ=)******

clean_body: This is a racial justice issue. We must end this relic of the Jim Crow era. | | | = Let me start by making myself clear, folks: The filibuster is a relic of segregation and holdover from the Jim Crow era — and it must be eliminated. As early as 1837, the filibuster was primarily used by Southern senators to defend slavery, protect segregation, and withhold voting rights from Black folks. Throughout history, the outdated policy has hindered the advancement of civil rights by blocking anti-lynching bills, bills eliminating poll taxes, and anti-discrimination laws in areas of employment, housing, and more. We have allowed the filibuster to block racial justice and civil rights legislation for far too long. = ____= Today, the filibuster still continues to hold up progress for working people and the economic agenda for the poor and barely-middle class. And yes, that disproportionately means people of color. The House has already passed landmark progressive legislation to benefit the working-class such as H.R.1 the For The People Act, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, the Freedom to Vote Act, bills that strengthen labor laws, comprehensive immigration reform, prescription drug price controls — and other bills that have no future in the Senate because of the filibuster. Most recently, the filibuster has stalled President Biden’s Build Back Better plan that would invest $350 billion a year for the next decade into the struggles faced by working families. The bill includes improvements to Medicare, prescription drug costs, childcare, education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more -- all without raising taxes on everyday Americans. We will not be successful in closing the socioeconomic gaps in this country if the threat of the filibuster remains in the way of justice. That is why we must organize and build a coalition so that our voices are heard.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** We cannot build this resistance without you. **Nina Turner** = = = ******= "="**** | ****= "="**** | ****= "="**** | ****= "="**** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is **building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. Take a stand with Nina and join our coalition today by pitching in now! >> __= | || || Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | | Paid for by Nina Turner for Us

| Friend,
Today is National First Responder's day and they need your help!
Biden and the radical left are punishing several of our proud first responders because they refuse forced vaccinations. These men and women are being unjustly fired for simply exercising their medical liberty!
This is beyond unacceptable. As a wife of a first responder, Kat wants us to help her show Biden and the radical left that they can't bully our first responders.

#
This Sunday is a crucial fundraising deadline for campaigns like ours that are up for election in 2022 — it marks just over a year until the midterm elections and is an important test of our grassroots movement. Meanwhile, in the Senate, Chris is working around the clock to advance the critical agenda in the Biden Administration’s Build Back Better budget to make vital progress for American workers, families, seniors, our environment, and more. The future of the Child Tax Credit, the fight to address the climate crisis, our mission to build a more inclusive economy and a more perfect union, and so much more are at stake. And our ability to make this progress is only possible because voters came out and demanded it at the ballot box last year when they flipped the Senate. Everything is on the line in 2022. We must keep the Senate gavel out of Mitch McConnell's hands. And it’s going to take another grassroots outpouring to get the job done. **So if you can, please consider chipping in today to help us reach our important October fundraising goal and make sure we are on track to keep this Maryland Senate seat blue and re-elect Chris in 2022. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We know who Terry McAuliffe is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033822/313696623/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.6_SA_10IQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDgzYTNjZC0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYXsVHG12hjDMe2zBAKjfEw3u4dC_Zi6CKhRAifWH3M=)

| | Derek, we have 5 days left in the most important election of 2021, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

**We know who Terry McAuliffe is, Derek. For four years, Terry showed you who he would be as the Governor of Virginia.**

He fought for Virginians every single day.

He stood up to hate and division.

And he put words into action by restoring the right to vote to more than 173,000 people.

We know Terry McAuliffe, Derek — and we know that he’s the leader Virginia needs right now.

_**[I’m asking you to join me in the final days of Terry’s campaign by chipping in any amount right now. Every single dollar you contribute will go directly toward Terry’s efforts to turn out voters in this must-win race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38033823/313696624/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.6_SA_10IQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDgzYTNjZC0xYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYXsVHG12hjDMe2zBAKjfEw3u4dC_Zi6CKhRAifWH3M=)**_

Look, this race isn’t just about a name on the ballot. It’s not just about Terry McAuliffe versus Glenn Youngkin.

It’s about the people they’re pledging to serve as governor.

Terry McAuliffe has shown us that he will lift up all Virginians and fight for this Commonwealth.

Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he will stand with Donald Trump, extremists, and insurrectionists.

**Right now, we need to fulfill our promise as citizens to _stand up_ for each other, and _fight_ for each other, and _vote_ with each other to change the future for everyone.**

And Derek, that starts with electing Terry McAuliffe as Governor of Virginia.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, we have 5 days left in the most important election of 2021, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. We know who Terry McAuliffe is, Derek. For four years, Terry showed you who he would be as the Governor of Virginia. He fought for Virginians every single day. He stood up to hate and division. And he put words into action by restoring the right to vote to more than 173,000 people. We know Terry McAuliffe, Derek — and we know that he’s the leader Virginia needs right now. = Look, this race isn’t just about a name on the ballot. It’s not just about Terry McAuliffe versus Glenn Youngkin. It’s about the people they’re pledging to serve as governor. Terry McAuliffe has shown us that he will lift up all Virginians and fight for this Commonwealth. Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he will stand with Donald Trump, extremists, and insurrectionists. Right now, we need to fulfill our promise as citizens to stand up for each other, and fight for each other, and vote with each other to change the future for everyone. And Derek, that starts with electing Terry McAuliffe as Governor of Virginia. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this team, Stacey Abrams =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia
