It’s been a big month for Nikki, and we’re reaching out for your help to finish strong. Here’s some of what she’s accomplished just this month:

✅ Suspended licenses of January 6th insurrectionists
✅ Called on Governor DeSantis to cancel the nomination of anti-vaccine Surgeon General Ladapo
✅ Opposed discriminatory rules against Black farmers applying for marijuana licenses
✅ Announced the eradication of the dangerous African Land Snail

✅ Opposed new development in Everglades wetlands

And we can all agree that as Governor, Nikki can accomplish so much more to protect our democracy, promote justice, and defend our environment.

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: Kyle’s trial is Nov 1. Please open now.
body:
| | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59050379:sLM0jrHDN:m:1:2365227053:7C957C480E86D63F39727A2FB6F9FEB8:r)
---
Peter,

Just the other day, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene urged her nearly 500,000 Twitter followers to donate to my son Kyle's official legal defense fund, and Twitter promptly slapped a violation notification on it.

Welcome to my life since last August when my son defended himself with lethal force against a vicious and armed mob in Kenosha, Wisconsin.

Almost immediately, our corrupt media, dishonest political hacks, and Big Tech tyrants colluded in a vicious smear and censorship campaign to baselessly slander my son as a "mass murderer" and "white supremacist" and crush any effort to get the truth out and raise money for a legal defense.

**But we are still standing - and I'm writing to you now with an emergency request.**

**On November 1, Kyle will face trial for what may be the most important self-defense case of our lifetimes and**** we urgently need help raising a final $300,000 for legal costs and case-related expenses.**

**[Will you rush a donation to directly help Kyle right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59050379:sLM0jrHDN:m:1:2365227053:7C957C480E86D63F39727A2FB6F9FEB8:r)**
|
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59050379:sLM0jrHDN:m:1:2365227053:7C957C480E86D63F39727A2FB6F9FEB8:r)
|
---
If you have children of your own, you understand why I'm asking for your help. Before anything else, I'm a mother who loves her son.

But I'm also an American who believes deeply in the values of this country, and I'm horrified by what I've seen over this past year and a half.

Politicians let anarchists dominate our streets, then blame the police for violence.

The media virtue signals about "speaking truth to power" while ruining the lives of innocent people with fake news and grotesque accusations.

And the Big Tech executives who've gotten rich and powerful because we, the American people, have used their platforms, are now brazenly censoring us.

**I, for one, am tired of being silenced and intimidated. And I know there are millions more out there who feel the same exact way.**

Well I won't sit back and watch his life be stolen. I love my son, and I believe truth and justice still mean something in America.

**[So please rush the largest donation you can to directly help Kyle right now. Trial is November 1 and we must be ready for everything they're going to throw at us.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59050379:sLM0jrHDN:m:1:2365227053:7C957C480E86D63F39727A2FB6F9FEB8:r)**

Together, we're going to clear his name and get him home for good. And in the process, we're going to score an historic victory for our God-given right of self-defense.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Just the other day, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene urged her nearly 500,000 Twitter followers to donate to my son Kyle's official legal defense fund, and Twitter promptly slapped a violation notification on it. Welcome to my life since last August when my son defended himself with lethal force against a vicious and armed mob in Kenosha, Wisconsin. Almost immediately, our corrupt media, dishonest political hacks, and Big Tech tyrants colluded in a vicious smear and censorship campaign to baselessly slander my son as a "mass murderer" and "white supremacist" and crush any effort to get the truth out and raise money for a legal defense. But we are still standing - and I'm writing to you now with an emergency request. On November 1, Kyle will face trial for what may be the most important self-defense case of our lifetimes and we urgently need help raising a final $300,000 for legal costs and case-related expenses. | | If you have children of your own, you understand why I'm asking for your help. Before anything else, I'm a mother who loves her son. But I'm also an American who believes deeply in the values of this country, and I'm horrified by what I've seen over this past year and a half. Politicians let anarchists dominate our streets, then blame the police for violence. The media virtue signals about "speaking truth to power" while ruining the lives of innocent people with fake news and grotesque accusations. And the Big Tech executives who've gotten rich and powerful because we, the American people, have used their platforms, are now brazenly censoring us. I, for one, am tired of being silenced and intimidated. And I know there are millions more out there who feel the same exact way. Well I won't sit back and watch his life be stolen. I love my son, and I believe truth and justice still mean something in America. Together, we're going to clear his name and get him home for good. And in the process, we're going to score an historic victory for our God-given right of self-defense. Thank you for your time. name: Danielle Allen
subject: what your support means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
Hi Peter Willis.
Tuesday, November 8th, 2022, is Election Day.
That means we have just one year, and a handful of days, to reach voters across Massachusetts and share our message of building One Commonwealth that works for everyone.
And, although it may seem as though Election Day 2022 is far off, we know how quickly the time will pass.
The team and I are working with a sense of urgency. We know the importance of making every day count.
That means delivering our message to folks in every part of our Commonwealth. It means building an unprecedented grassroots movement.
To win in one year, we must have the resources to compete, Peter Willis.
Can you help with an immediate donation as we begin our march toward November 8th, 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:Donate $5 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=5] Donate $25 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate $200 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=200] Donate $500 ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&express_lane=true&amount=500]
Custom donation ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&amount=25]
We’re running a positive campaign.
I believe people in every part of Massachusetts have had enough political point-scoring and angry words. My message is about working together to build One Commonwealth.
Thanks to supporters like you, we’re gaining momentum.
Let’s see what we can accomplish together over the next year!
Gratefully,
Danielle

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4maoct2021?refcode=em_FR_2021.10.28_b1_DA_all&amount=25]
Danielle is a nonprofit leader, policy innovator, educator, and mom. Over the last twenty years, she has led organizations at all scales from local civic education providers to the $6 billion Mellon Foundation. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating– as in leading a multi-disciplinary COVID response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources.

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: #Striketober
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re so proud to see the labor movement build in strength.
#
Hi, on Team Erica Smith we’ve been SO PROUD to see the wave of workers fighting back against exploitation.
Just this month, thousands of workers across the U.S. — from workers at Kellogg and John Deer, to hospital and Hollywood workers — are rising up and fighting for better conditions and better pay.
It’s way past time that EVERY worker regardless of industry can make a livable wage. No one should face abuse at the workplace, or be working 60+ hours to make ends meet.
Technology has rapidly changed the workplace and workforce but workers’ rights and pay have stayed stagnant for far too long. **_[Sign your name now to stand in solidarity with union workers on strike and call for expanded workers’ rights NOW.](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211028?refcode=em20211028-589&t=1&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)_**
**[Sign on now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211028?refcode=em20211028-589&t=2&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)**
We reject the narrative that being unwilling to compromise basic benefits and a livable wage is asking for too much.
Poor working conditions should not be the norm and folks shouldn’t have to forgo their physical or mental health for frankly insulting pay, especially as we’ve seen CEO salaries sky-rocket.
It’s time corporations got the message loud and clear — **we’re fed up and we’re not going to take it any longer.**
We are standing in solidarity with unions and workers everywhere. [**_Add your name now to call for expanded workers’ rights and protections._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211028?refcode=em20211028-589&t=3&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)
**[Add your name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-20211028?refcode=em20211028-589&t=4&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)**
Together,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211028-589-footer&t=5&refcode2=589_3698_j_mxOw&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=589%2E3698%2Ej_mxOw)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

When my team makes these goals for us, they have complete faith that we will accomplish them. And I am PROUD to say, you haven’t let us down!

It is TOP SUPPORTERS, like you, Friend, that give me the motivation and strength to go out and FIGHT for you every day. And now with only a few days until our Governor’s election, it is not only our Congressional race that is on the line, but also our home state of Virginia.

We only have a few days to CRUSH our October End-of-Month goal, are you ready?

At just one of the thirteen Border Patrol stations along the Arizona border they are apprehending 78,000 illegals per month.
**But they're only catching about 60%. That means an additional 50,000 illegals are getting through this one little sector in rural Arizona.**

clean_body: | | | | This is an invasion. I just sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about the seriousness of this situation and the need for drastic action. Hi Peter Willis - At just one of the thirteen Border Patrol stations along the Arizona border they are apprehending 78,000 illegals per month. But they're only catching about 60%. That means an additional 50,000 illegals are getting through this one little sector in rural Arizona. This is an invasion. I just sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about the seriousness of this situation and the need for drastic action. | Our country will be permanently changed if we continue to allow tens of thousands of illegals pour over the border and into our interior. President Biden will not act until he is forced to by a Republican Senate and a Republican House. That is why defeating Mark Kelly is so important not just for Arizonans but for Republicans across the country. This one seat is everything! The future of our country is at stake here. We can not take any chances. We have to defeat Mark Kelly once and for all. Join our campaign today to help me win this fight and save our nation. | Thank you for your generous support, Maj. Gen. ---
|
# We risk losing our nation's warriors
---
Recently, Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin mandated all United States military members be vaccinated against COVID-19. Those who refuse? They are subject to, "administrative or non-judicial punishment [under the Uniform Code of Military Justice] -- to include relief of duties or discharge."
For quite some time, service members have been required to receive FDA approved vaccinations such as tetanus, MMR, and Influenza. As a West Point Cadet and all through my time as an Army Officer (1998 - 2011), I willingly accepted these requirements.
However, this new mandate carries serious consequences that may impact our military's readiness and ability to defend this nation in a world made more dangerous by the weakness of the current Presidential administration and its abject failure in Afghanistan.
Military Service Members are justified in their concerns regarding the jab. Let's recall that the Anthrax vaccine (which I received) caused tens of thousands of vaccine-related injuries. Service Members should never be threatened with court martial or dishonorable discharge for defending their own individual right of bodily integrity. We must reconsider the military's policies on vaccines or any mandated form of medical treatment.
This mandate, with all its consequences, is potentially a tremendous threat to our nation's military readiness and national security. If the bullheadedness of our military's top brass continues, we risk losing our nation's warriors with a sharp decline in enlistments. America and international stability will be at risk. I believe the US military should empower its service members to choose for themselves and determine their own destinies. Stand with me in standing up for our men and women in uniform and their right to bodily integrity. g.

Stand with me in standing up for our men and women in uniform and their right to bodily integrity. g. | | == | If you are exhausted by the mismanagement you are seeing every day by bureaucrats in Washington, tired of your way of life being threatened by careless politicians, please support my campaign by donating here. Together we can stand against the corruption and needless chaos contrived by a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == | | | You can help in two ways: first, write your current lawmaker opposing the current mandates and restrictions. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Terry (personal)
subject: This is horrifying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
He’s dragging our kids into his right-wing culture war
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38035912/313704906/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.7_TM_10IR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZiYTg0NC0yMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvuTMT71pJAVugtUH4Ts4iivysI_-BkOp13Kl3VdoK4=)

| | Derek, let’s take a step back.

We have 5 days left in this race. Our campaign is focused on defending democracy, increasing funding for education and moving Virginia forward.

But Glenn Youngkin? His closing message is about banning award-winning books from our schools and silencing the voices of Black authors.

Apparently, it wasn’t enough to indulge Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. It wasn’t enough to pander to insurrectionists. It wasn’t enough to peddle antisemitic rhetoric and homophobic ideas. His ace card is full-blown racism and _**now, he’s dragging our kids into the middle of his ugly, right-wing culture war.**_

_**[To stop him on Tuesday, we need the largest Get Out The Vote program ever built in Virginia. If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38035913/313704907/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.7_TM_10IR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZiYTg0NC0yMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvuTMT71pJAVugtUH4Ts4iivysI_-BkOp13Kl3VdoK4=)**_

We worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s policies of hate and division last year. And Derek, we’ve got to do it again in 5 days.

Glenn Youngkin is ending his campaign the way he started it: with divisive, racist rhetoric and right-wing conspiracy theories. To top it off, Donald Trump is coming to Virginia to prop him up before Election Day.

Youngkin’s far-right social agenda is WRONG for Virginia, Derek. From restricting abortion rights to opposing same-sex marriage to banning books by Black authors, he’s made it clear he wants to take us back.

Next week, Virginia has the opportunity to reject this hate and choose a better way forward.

_**[I’m humbly asking you to join me in this grassroots movement by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you today. Together, we will defend our country’s progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38035914/313704908/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.7_TM_10IR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZiYTg0NC0yMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvuTMT71pJAVugtUH4Ts4iivysI_-BkOp13Kl3VdoK4=)**_

In solidarity,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38035915/313704909/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.7_TM_10IR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZiYTg0NC0yMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvuTMT71pJAVugtUH4Ts4iivysI_-BkOp13Kl3VdoK4=)**

Next week, Virginia has the opportunity to reject this hate and choose a better way forward. = In solidarity, Terry McAuliffe | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

clean_body: let’s finish strong | | | Derek — We’re down to the wire so we’ll keep this brief. We only have 5 days left to get Virginia Democrats out to the polls to protect our majority and keep Glenn Youngkin out of the Governor’s mansion. The polls have this race as a toss-up and too close to call. So we need all hands on deck if we want to hold onto control of the House and the Governor’s office, because we know when Democrats come together, we win. And all of our hard work this cycle is paying off. Thanks to your hard work on the ground, we’ve got Glenn Youngkin so worried he had to call in his friend Donald Trump to campaign in Arlington on his behalf. We’re continuing to work round the clock over the next 5 days to ensure voters are getting to the polls and voting for our great slate of Democratic candidates, but we still need a little over $10,000 to fully support our Get Out the Vote fund. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****=** **=** **=** **=** Let’s finish strong, VA Dems HQ ****=**** ****=****** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. subject: This is a long email, but I mean every word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38036759/313708688/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NmI4Mi0yNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juqzdgetOjk9X-vwugJNISq5pl9170xGyOBVGQ5NqMI=&emci=687fdeec-1238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3da86b82-2638-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | Hi there, Derek: I’m going to ask you to chip in $5 at the end of this long email. **_[It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing and considered splitting a $5 contribution between Mark Warner and my campaign’s $30,000 final fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38036760/313708689/1695127224?refcode=mw_em_211028_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NmI4Mi0yNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juqzdgetOjk9X-vwugJNISq5pl9170xGyOBVGQ5NqMI=)_** I am a Virginian, born and raised. **And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state -- because I’ve lived them.** Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet. And when I was pregnant, my job didn’t offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives. From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom. I’m proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia’s 51st District as their Delegate since 2017. **And as your Lt. Governor, I’m committed to celebrating Virginia’s growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds.** The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up. **_[I can’t wait to do this together, Derek! But this won’t be possible if we fall short on Election Day in just a few days. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split $5 today to my campaign and Mark Warner? Every dollar counts in a race like this one.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38036761/313708690/1695127224?refcode=mw_em_211028_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NmI4Mi0yNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juqzdgetOjk9X-vwugJNISq5pl9170xGyOBVGQ5NqMI=)_** Grateful for your support, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38036762/313708691/1695127224?refcode=mw_em_211028_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NmI4Mi0yNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juqzdgetOjk9X-vwugJNISq5pl9170xGyOBVGQ5NqMI=) _Hala Ayala_ Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Rashida, Bernie, Justice Democrats vs. Manchin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While corporate Democrats, Wall Street, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel
lobbyists barter with what’s left of the Build Back Better Act and try to
ram through a smaller Republican-backed bill, people in this country are
suffering. It’s all just politics and profits for them — it’s not about
the people. That’s why Justice Democrats are fighting back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79947?refcode=em20211028-20214&t=1002&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]Tweet from Rashida Tlaib reads 'I am not going to sell out my district
for a bill that was written by the fossil fuel industry and championed by
two Dem senators who bow down to Big Pharma & corporate polluters.'

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79947?refcode=em20211028-20214&t=1003&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]Chip in $3 to help Justice Democrats fight back now »

Other Justice Democrats and Bernie Sanders are saying the same thing.
Action on climate change is a top priority for JDs, which is why
progressives are demanding that the Build Back Better Act pass the Senate
before voting on the corporate-backed smaller bill.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79947?refcode=em20211028-20214&t=1004&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]Tweet from CNN's Manu Raju reads reads 'New - In a key sign of the
challenges facing Biden, Sen. Bernie Sanders told House progressives he
backs their position against moving ahead with the infrastructure bill
until the larger economic package moves through the House at the same
time, per two sources'

If corporate America and Republicans are supporting a bill, we know there
may be a problem. And on the heels of Manchin, Sinema, and their corporate
allies stripping out a billionaire’s tax, paid family and medical leave,
and an end to fossil fuel subsidies, we know corporate lobbyists are
heavily influencing policy right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79947?refcode=em20211028-20214&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]We need to Hold the Line and continue fighting for the people and
action on climate change. Can you rush a contribution to Justice Democrats
right now to help us Hold the Line? We need the progressive movement
strong and together right now, and we have a $25,000 end-of-month goal to
hit!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79947?refcode=em20211028-20214&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211028-20214-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20214_1203867_-lDNra&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20214%2E1203867%2E-lDNra

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: You might be surprised to hear this

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38037234/313709770/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDg1MGM4OS0yNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jl-ulFEg1vs8ZzJMXzI38GmSLJPGYL-tPgICwVZDcvE=)
Team, When I first began serving Colorado, I was called the “accidental senator.” But after putting my head down, doing the work, and securing wins for the people of Colorado, winning re-election was no accident. But it was only possible because of you. This team pitched in to build the infrastructure required to win. You might be surprised to hear this, but a large portion of our budget comes from grassroots contributions to emails just like this one. **And, I’m the only Democratic Senator running for re-election that’s refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I believe fighting to undo the influence of money in politics means leading by example.** From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell and dark money groups. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. **So will you pitch in just $10 now before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline? clean_body: | = Team, When I first began serving Colorado, I was called the “accidental senator.” But after putting my head down, doing the work, and securing wins for the people of Colorado, winning re-election was no accident. But it was only possible because of you. This team pitched in to build the infrastructure required to win. You might be surprised to hear this, but a large portion of our budget comes from grassroots contributions to emails just like this one. And, I’m the only Democratic Senator running for re-election that’s refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I believe fighting to undo the influence of money in politics means leading by example. From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell and dark money groups. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. So will you pitch in just $10 now before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline? Any amount will make a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks to the hard work of this team, we’re on track to cut child poverty nearly in half, have restored Bears Ears National Monument, and secured billions for Colorado’s infrastructure. I look forward to building on this progress but can only do that if we work together to fend off Republican attacks and win re-election next year. Thanks for all your help. I couldn’t do this without you. — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| Friend,

**Our October End of the Month Deadline is almost here** and I need your support to help us reach our fundraising goal.

Joe Biden has made a disaster out of his presidency and we Americans are hurting. From the Afghanistan crisis to the southern border crisis to the inflation crisis, to the covid crisis; the list goes on and on. [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=194ac37e12&e=598f6aa24c)**But there is hope. **

[_**If you can chip in just $5, $10, or even $25 right now, we will get closer to bringing our Conservative Values to Congress and stopping the Radical Left from wrecking our country. >>>**_](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=c1702682f9&e=598f6aa24c) [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=9f31dea2b8&e=598f6aa24c)[****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=260982cf9d&e=598f6aa24c)**[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=eedb58b596&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=38c23d11f6&e=598f6aa24c)** It’s time to bring Georgia Values to office, and together we can do just that.

[_**Can I count on you to donate within the next 45 minutes, so we can continue fighting for a better future than what Joe Biden and the Radical Left are giving us? >>>**_](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=4074c167d6&e=598f6aa24c) **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b3862c61f4&e=598f6aa24c)** For Georgia, David Curry

Dear Friend,

The latest [Goucher Poll](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuNwId5BSVlzWSMMB7NQrAKn-2BJvgkOh8I-2BiR5pMDACJmCMiqyNue6kEO-2FOeC25d2P97-2B3qfwFNzxmJgsq-2BKgIu9PFTlxO7AQ6bN7hfTr9ly8QBhmWz24nq48JUhsGNS0RNg-3D-3DAfYZ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6OVI-2FsiBKXN2lokXahZ7TF0rwUyTzt1gwBdRM58kHB6nB4Z1kKG3qniNZcx9Wn0mX4FwUhuG-2B-2BDDmAjL9Co6Vn31BAyKwqueBy-2BULo0Jq-2FEt2pEjunS8dMUIe5kFpWFxWT3ibuZgqPYRHaiHAwkisNzfZOpHUK69xdxDu4Ee4Ft2RDD3FMzM6iCo47vPIQ6yF8xmN-2BWE4tGHuY9tpxGYq59CLFjvLsQh-2FDuwRTx-2BPxPikLydQfYm7kOw-2BsJHajUZrCmiNS4Holfsxt1nNL8SgKhN6AoDhAltIUTlrPCMyhdZfjoSfBuEdFgIb4zH3vLK8KnaBmXFddTA3e90FQZnfGnxp688U9Sw-2FHgdjQUJDnDRCLj30mM4n-2BYZ4Ts52Ci315B460mVf-2BpPecS0lTL-2F2sFdvg4tLq9x4mmODeeUHDqGAKgmz-2BaFhnSyXh99hTK2MozJ406skZ5sYMKsDhOJ3Yf-2BvbxelAfIM2nE23CJMohGvrc4x9UB2IpPJwb4oeL-2F8shNwX-2BMeSVhJ7LO5zDQ5soIzFxGVelshSbnsuNj0hB14jfU0nK0tvu12bmiKIRSPBmXqQ-2BiUGu6vGOCNyZwrb08gUfPIQkWeqeWTxVdTkCuFDPz027hhQxNQwP3jPHjry8UIb-2BBisUkqTt4VQlwcOQIG2g6-2BQrX1FRFIBQQ9sZm7DsrAaN0lKsQFVBmUwubtfIbIOkkF-2BwB4adXNxq-2BM81JVrOpM-2B6TalUSXFu2yF5n7TkuGskccEo5hzqCC2ckNlMcFINY-2BEoNdLFYJT5lhjuA49pSYUO3-2FVFV4iDZdoeq4g5TRZbZssFgORW-2BBU-2FLFuwPvMeI8sD0oihVmgaCqTw-3D-3D) is out and shows we have the momentum to make history next year! **The poll affirms a majority of Marylanders want to see another Republican win the governor's race in 2022!**
_**One thing is crystal clear -- Marylanders don't want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases.**_
The people of Maryland want to look forward. By a 2:1 margin, Marylanders want to continue to build on the successes of the past seven years and to focus on the issues that matter most, like growing the economy and expanding opportunities so every Marylander can find their own path to prosperity.
[**I am the only candidate in the race that can do that, and I need your help! **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExupogyJyQZYR0vbsCzHa-2FD704WVawx-2BbbSA7Taskkw-2FKOpmn_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6OVI-2FsiBKXN2lokXahZ7TF0rwUyTzt1gwBdRM58kHB6nB4Z1kKG3qniNZcx9Wn0mX4FwUhuG-2B-2BDDmAjL9Co6Vn31BAyKwqueBy-2BULo0Jq-2FEt2pEjunS8dMUIe5kFpWFxWT3ibuZgqPYRHaiHAwkisNzfZOpHUK69xdxDu4Ee4Ft2RDD3FMzM6iCo47vPIQ6yF8xmN-2BWE4tGHuY9tpxGYq59CLFjvLsQh-2FDuwRTx-2BPxPikLydQfYm7kOw-2BsJHajUZrCmiNS4Holfsxt1nNL8SgKhN6AoDhAltIUTlrPCMyhdZfjoSfBuEdFgIb4zH3vLK8KnaBmXFddTA3e90FQZnfGnxp688U9Sw-2FHgdjQUJDnDRCLj30mM4n-2BYZ4Ts52Ci315B460mVf-2BpPecS0lTL-2F2sFdvg4tLq9x4mmODeeUHDqGAKgmz-2BaFhnSyXh99hTK2MozJ406skZ5sYMKsDhOJ3Yf-2BvbxelAfIM2nE23CJMohGvrc4x9UB2IpPJwb4oeL-2F8shNwX-2BMeSVhJ7LO5zDQ5soIzFxGVelshSbnsuNj0hB14jfU0nK0tvu12bmiKIRSPBmXqQ-2BiUGu6vGOCNyZwrb08gUfPIQkWeqeWTxVdTkCuFDPz027hhQxNQwP3jPHjry8UIb-2BBisUkqTt4VQlwcOQIG2g6-2BQrX1FRFIBQQ9sZn-2BSrrcRXlFg-2BEVZUSgCeGrViiw1cANUEohdq3Xh5YMgNjbPQ1mmIcgqq4Vcqxi6i0j-2BN-2FcrmuIdcWxewfZeD7VShGxo0hGZQOFBNRUNqSro5U7qaL8qme3jantHyMu5UInlcn1PD25ijMLp86GLzq32HcwCpMaZKlyP41mObl7pg-3D-3D)
And Marylanders want dialogue and balance in Annapolis. They know that a Republican governor can provide this balance and will make sure no one tries to raise your taxes.
_You remember what it felt like when one party controlled all branches of government in Maryland -- your taxes went up time and time again because there was no one to stop them... and because they could. _
**As****your governor, I will not only fight against tax increases, I will fight for tax relief -- so we can make Maryland more affordable for our families, small businesses, and retirees.**
Just think about what will happen if Maryland once again has a Democratic governor working with a Democratic legislature.**I can promise you this, every one of my opponents will raise your taxes!**
[**Join our team today so we can stand up against tax increases and make Maryland more affordable. **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExupogyJyQZYR0vbsCzHa-2FD704WVawx-2BbbSA7Taskkw-2FK4kts_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6OVI-2FsiBKXN2lokXahZ7TF0rwUyTzt1gwBdRM58kHB6nB4Z1kKG3qniNZcx9Wn0mX4FwUhuG-2B-2BDDmAjL9Co6Vn31BAyKwqueBy-2BULo0Jq-2FEt2pEjunS8dMUIe5kFpWFxWT3ibuZgqPYRHaiHAwkisNzfZOpHUK69xdxDu4Ee4Ft2RDD3FMzM6iCo47vPIQ6yF8xmN-2BWE4tGHuY9tpxGYq59CLFjvLsQh-2FDuwRTx-2BPxPikLydQfYm7kOw-2BsJHajUZrCmiNS4Holfsxt1nNL8SgKhN6AoDhAltIUTlrPCMyhdZfjoSfBuEdFgIb4zH3vLK8KnaBmXFddTA3e90FQZnfGnxp688U9Sw-2FHgdjQUJDnDRCLj30mM4n-2BYZ4Ts52Ci315B460mVf-2BpPecS0lTL-2F2sFdvg4tLq9x4mmODeeUHDqGAKgmz-2BaFhnSyXh99hTK2MozJ406skZ5sYMKsDhOJ3Yf-2BvbxelAfIM2nE23CJMohGvrc4x9UB2IpPJwb4oeL-2F8shNwX-2BMeSVhJ7LO5zDQ5soIzFxGVelshSbnsuNj0hB14jfU0nK0tvu12bmiKIRSPBmXqQ-2BiUGu6vGOCNyZwrb08gUfPIQkWeqeWTxVdTkCuFDPz027hhQxNQwP3jPHjry8UIb-2BBisUkqTt4VQlwcOQIG2g6-2BQrX1FRFIBQQ9sZn9ACYDZbZxTHUQl3dNO5FZg4378U7PRFCTAFKpvmkNzX6N35IXe6zr6PGYwo3TCA-2B07r0i2wD3MBnSTGaME8TpshFIO-2Bg-2FBfl7X7TH-2F77Sfx55sl-2FvzyeL4c-2F-2FtI4HK5LPOVqs89BN4PDWST26-2BXK9qxTz4792oSZEg5UoETemAA-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, The latest is out and shows we have the momentum to make history next year! The poll affirms a majority of Marylanders want to see another Republican win the governor's race in 2022! One thing is crystal clear -- Marylanders don't want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases. The people of Maryland want to look forward. By a 2:1 margin, Marylanders want to continue to build on the successes of the past seven years and to focus on the issues that matter most, like growing the economy and expanding opportunities so every Marylander can find their own path to prosperity. And Marylanders want dialogue and balance in Annapolis. They know that a Republican governor can provide this balance and will make sure no one tries to raise your taxes. You remember what it felt like when one party controlled all branches of government in Maryland -- your taxes went up time and time again because there was no one to stop them... and because they could. Asyour governor, I will not only fight against tax increases, I will fight for tax relief -- so we can make Maryland more affordable for our families, small businesses, and retirees. Just think about what will happen if Maryland once again has a Democratic governor working with a Democratic legislature.I can promise you this, every one of my opponents will raise your taxes! Thank you, Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

clean_body: | | | | She’s raised $5.1 million. Friend, We are up againstGoliath. The DC and Northern Virginia elites are pulling out all the stops to prop up Liz Cheney. They Do NOT want to see their loyal representative defeated by a true Wyomingite and a true conservative. They don’t get to vote in Wyoming; we do. We are tired of having someone who claims to represent us spend her time in Washington leading Nancy Pelosi’s Witch Hunt committee while America is struggling with the real impact of Biden’s FAILED economic and energy policies. Store shelves are barren, food and gas prices are skyrocketing. Across the Nation, Americans are looking for answers to the supply chain crisis, yet Joe is out to lunch and Kamala is busy doing everything but her job. And Liz Cheney? She is spending her time working for Pelosi to deflect attention from the failed Democrat policies of the radical left. Our October Fundraising Deadline is right around the corner, Friend. When I am in Congress I will never stop fighting for America First policies; I will never forget the America First Conservatives that supported me along the way. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

body:
FIRST: Two GOP dark money groups -- Heritage Action and the American Action Network -- and the National Republican Congressional Committee launched ads in our district attacking Kim. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38037721/313714317/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTU0ZWRhNy0yOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TYCLSmMncJ5vXVtEqQg4i7YESqlA4M0tAiJgh7piq5E=&emci=97495ee5-f737-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=de54eda7-2938-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)

**FIRST:** Two GOP dark money groups -- Heritage Action and the American Action Network -- and the National Republican Congressional Committee launched ads in our district attacking Kim.

**THEN:** A GOP PAC released the first public poll in our race that showed Kim leading Republicans by just one point. Here's what we're up against:
1. Historically, midterms are not kind to the party who holds the presidency which means we're at risk of losing the House.
2. Republicans will say anything about Christy to win -- even if it isn't true.

But here's what we know: Christy only lost this seat by 333 votes in 2020 despite Mike's big corporate dollars. And outside experts expect that redistricting makes this district even bluer.

**That means in 2022, we are one of the most flippable seats in the country.**

**[And I know we say this a lot but we cannot do this without you. We'll need all your help if we're going to flip CA-25 from red to blue. Peter, I firmly believe that the role — _the duty_ — of the Governor of Virginia is to unite people. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t. After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values. From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters. **This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is.** **[That’s why, right now, I am asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Team Cooper. Everything we raise right now will go directly toward getting out the vote in this election — because the best way to defend our democracy is to participate in it. January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. We watched as our Capitol was desecrated. Police officers were killed. And our democracy was under siege.
Trump’s rally for Youngkin this month was another dark day. Attendees actually celebrated the insurrection by saying the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was used to try and bring down democracy — _the very democracy which that American flag symbolizes._
Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable.
**Peter, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia.**
**[I’m asking you right now to stand up for our democracy and split a donation between my campaign and Team Cooper by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. Together, we will build a movement that unites us and keeps our Commonwealth moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38038282/313716302/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffesplitEOM3_102821_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM5MTcxNC0yYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Qa1C-B6NLQCfg1l2fsOZcXLz8jz1MCN8oDA8BA3eWI=)**
In solidarity,
Terry McAuliffe

clean_body: | Peter, I firmly believe that the role — the duty — of the Governor of Virginia is to unite people. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t. After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values. From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters. This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. We watched as our Capitol was desecrated. Police officers were killed. And our democracy was under siege. Trump’s rally for Youngkin this month was another dark day. Attendees actually celebrated the insurrection by saying the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was used to try and bring down democracy — the very democracy which that American flag symbolizes. Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable. Peter, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia. = In solidarity, Terry McAuliffe = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. |
#
I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. **_It seems I was wrong._** Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently **_tied_** with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
My election is in just 5 days... My election is in just 5 days...

| | Peter,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58636275:JxBuoa2Ny:m:1:3253819041:A8BE24BED26BA4D74711AE80508D001B:r "If you have anything to spare,
I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58636275:JxBuoa2Ny:m:1:3253819041:A8BE24BED26BA4D74711AE80508D001B:r)
---

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58636275:JxBuoa2Ny:m:1:3253819041:A8BE24BED26BA4D74711AE80508D001B:r "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. ")**_

_We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go._

|
---

**But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

name: David Chipman
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your donation will help us show the gun lobby that we are fighting back and will never give up.
#

Hello,
I’m reaching out to tell you about an important deadline for Giffords: we need to raise $115,000 by this Sunday at midnight. Let me explain why this is so important.
Each day at Giffords, we face an uphill battle against the gun lobby. They are spending millions of dollars trying to unravel decades of progress on gun safety. We’re doing the hard work to fight back, but our efforts are only possible with your help.
We didn’t just pick an arbitrary number — $115,000 is the amount our team has calculated that will give us the resources we need to do our work, plus give us a little cushion to make sure we don’t drop into the red.
So, I need to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution towards our $115,000 October fundraising goal? Your donation will help us show the gun lobby that we are fighting back and will never give up. Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211028-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=20&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=21&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=22&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=23&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=24&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&refcode=em211028-1-30&t=25&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**
---
****
The NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby will do whatever it takes to make sure that gun safety legislation dies in Congress — all so they can continue to profit at the expense of public safety. They will use disinformation campaigns and fear tactics, just like they did to tank my nomination to head the ATF.
With your help, we will make sure they won’t succeed again. We are going to make sure the NSSF, the NRA, and the rest of the gun lobby don’t get in our way of saving lives.
Thank you for supporting our mission.
Sincerely,
David Chipman
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211028-1-30&t=26&refcode2=1135_3935704_rdcYIk&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1135%2E3935704%2ErdcYIk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: The sky is *not* falling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1248%2E3611125%2EQd5eKr ][IMG]

Folks --

Look, I’m not here to fool you. I won’t yell “the sky is falling!” and I
will never trick you into donating -- that’s not how I do things.

I’m telling you exactly how it is. And truthfully, it’s not good.

There’s only 4 days left in the month and we’re way behind on our
fundraising goal.

This is not what we expected. Grassroots energy has dipped these past
couple of weeks and we’re in a severe fundraising slump. Meanwhile, my
opponents are using their own fortunes to prop up their campaigns
alongside support from right-wing billionaires.

That’s why it’s crucial we hit every fundraising benchmark we set in order
to go toe-to-toe with them.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Tom’s gonna get it done.
body:
He doesn’t just talk about solving tough problems -- he walks the walk.

Peter,

Here’s one thing you should know about Tom Perez: **He’s an action-oriented leader.**

I first learned this about him when I began representing the great state of Minnesota in Congress. When Tom was Labor Secretary and Head of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division, we worked together to solve some of our nations’ toughest civil and labor rights issues for working people. I was reminded of it working with him to elect Democrats up and down the ballot all over the country at the DNC.

**Tom doesn’t just talk about solving tough problems -- he walks the walk.** Tom knows how to convene the right people in a room, develop a plan, and take care of business. I truly believe that we hold the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives as a result of Tom’s leadership.

**I’m proud to endorse his campaign, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting him, too.**

**[Tom’s critical end-of-month deadline is coming up in three days, and if I know one thing, it’s that your continued support is critical on a long road to victory. **Peter, I’ve seen Tom in action, so I know he’s committed to building a more equitable future for Maryland families.** I know if he’s given the opportunity to serve as governor, he’ll make sure the number of uninsured Marylanders goes from 350,000 to zero. He’ll fight to make sure workers have a voice and access to the benefits they need to support their families. And he’ll work to ensure ZIP code no longer determines destiny for Maryland’s kids.

We need leaders like Tom in office who aren’t afraid to step up, organize, and do the hard work governing requires. **I’m proud to endorse him, and I hope he can count on your support, too.**

clean_body: He doesn’t just talk about solving tough problems -- he walks the walk. Peter, Here’s one thing you should know about Tom Perez: He’s an action-oriented leader. I first learned this about him when I began representing the great state of Minnesota in Congress. When Tom was Labor Secretary and Head of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division, we worked together to solve some of our nations’ toughest civil and labor rights issues for working people. I was reminded of it working with him to elect Democrats up and down the ballot all over the country at the DNC. Tom doesn’t just talk about solving tough problems -- he walks the walk. Tom knows how to convene the right people in a room, develop a plan, and take care of business. I truly believe that we hold the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives as a result of Tom’s leadership. I’m proud to endorse his campaign, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting him, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Peter, I’ve seen Tom in action, so I know he’s committed to building a more equitable future for Maryland families. I know if he’s given the opportunity to serve as governor, he’ll make sure the number of uninsured Marylanders goes from 350,000 to zero. He’ll fight to make sure workers have a voice and access to the benefits they need to support their families. And he’ll work to ensure ZIP code no longer determines destiny for Maryland’s kids. We need leaders like Tom in office who aren’t afraid to step up, organize, and do the hard work governing requires. I’m proud to endorse him, and I hope he can count on your support, too. = ****=** Onward, Keith Ellison **=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, this is
urgent.

We’re racing to hit a critical fundraising goal before October ends so we
can make major investments in our grassroots organizing strategy and send
a loud message to Rand Paul that we’re done with his corruption and
disastrous leadership.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12268?refcode=em20211028-1117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1117%2E346206%2Erj40tb ]Can you rush your
first $5 donation to help us hit our
$225,000 goal? We’ll remember you as one of our first supporters who
helped build this historic movement to turn Kentucky blue.

Team Booker Supporter Record

Name: Peter

Donor Status: $0 (This is the best
moment to make your first donation and show your support for Charles!)

Suggested Donation: Make a
$5 donation to help us
reach this critical $225,000 grassroots fundraising goal.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12268?refcode=em20211028-1117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1117%2E346206%2Erj40tb ]DONATE NOW →

A lot of people are watching to see if we have the grassroots support
it’ll take to bring it home for Kentucky next year.

Rand Paul and his team will be watching to see whether our movement has
the grassroots backing and widespread support to compete against his
corporate money and big-money donors.

The media and political pundits will be watching to see if the change
that’s been rising throughout the South is coming to Kentucky next.
They’ll be on the lookout to see how many folks are ready to fight to
elect Charles and support an agenda centered on bold solutions.

GOP leaders will be anxiously watching closely as well because they know
if Kentuckians vote in large numbers, Rand won’t stand a chance.

That’s why it’s important we hit this fundraising goal out of the park and
send a clear message to everyone that this movement is ready to fight and
bring real change to Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12268?refcode=em20211028-1117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1117%2E346206%2Erj40tb ]Can you donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach
our $225,000 goal? It’s critical that we prove to everyone that our
grassroots movement is ready to fight to send Charles to the U.S. Senate
and make sure our campaign has the funds to start investing in critical
organizing and outreach efforts.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12268?refcode=em20211028-1117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1117%2E346206%2Erj40tb ]DONATE $5 NOW →

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
It's Adam Schiff. Your time is valuable, so I'll cut right to the chase.

****[I'm reaching out just 72 hours before the DCCC's End of Month Deadline with an urgent request: Can you rush in $3 to defend our House Majority? At this make-or-break moment for Democrats in the House and our democracy, we simply can't afford to let Republicans gain the upper hand.](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE:](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)[ 10/31, MIDNIGHT](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)[
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)

---

The differences between Democrats and Trump's Republicans in the House have never been clearer.

Democrats are working to pass once-in-a-generation investments in our infrastructure, families, childcare, and workers.

Meanwhile, Republicans are looking to stop our progress at every turn, playing hostage with people's livelihoods and lives. All the while, across the country they are seeking to pass dangerous voter suppression laws in nearly every state.

**That kind of dangerous, anti-democratic behavior is exactly what we can expect from a Republican House Majority if they win back power next year. They will stop all our progress. We can 't let that happen.**

I refuse to let these Republicans get away with their attacks on our democracy.

But I need you to join me in the fight.

**[So please: Before the DCCC's End of Month Deadline in just 72 hours, can you chip in $3 to defend our House Majority and rebuke Trump's House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Adam Schiff

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: desperately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | **_[I won’t mince words with you: Our Democratic Trifecta is in serious jeopardy. I don’t normally send you emails this long, but I desperately need you to read my entire message. It’s critical I explain to you what’s happening in the fight to keep our White House, Senate, and House in Democratic hands. If you’re short on time, I understand. But before you go, could you rush $15 to help me STOP Trump, McConnell, and McCarthy from flipping our Democratic Majorities? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38039092/313720274/1694321165?refcode=20211028_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliMWNlNC0yYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aj2MXUIZ4lFQUqxbId7neF2R37omFGhu7Y--Xxbzl5E=)_**
* * *
**[I need you to understand what’s at stake in the fight for the White House:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38039093/313720275/1694321165?refcode=20211028_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliMWNlNC0yYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aj2MXUIZ4lFQUqxbId7neF2R37omFGhu7Y--Xxbzl5E=)** First -- I watched Trump use the Presidency to desecrate the very soul of our Democracy. Then -- I watched Americans vote him OUT of office -- and elect Joe Biden to replace him. _**[But now -- I’m learning Trump raised more than $100 MILLION to regain power. This is shocking.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38039094/313720276/1694321165?refcode=20211028_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliMWNlNC0yYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aj2MXUIZ4lFQUqxbId7neF2R37omFGhu7Y--Xxbzl5E=)**_ **_[I cannot stress this enough. body:
Sarah Huckabee Sanders served as one of the most fearless and outspoken pro-Trump fighters of the past five years, and she’ll destroy the left-wing... [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=040fe43086b74a599480a19705942d1c&_e=q7l9Nx_-3G_MUEPUXSTLgkc7Pc9etud8e193b_mw7YzP7s9jiiJbhpWmqtGDEKDjUsO6R4XOxQQi3-UI-GsegLwyPmi9UPfjNb6fKvBodFTRA8yL8Z0urTX-v5Z670TOXU_D2YKYz8j2DVa3say_IqPfrGGCIi3k6g7yKqPEk5iWe5o0nuJTyfrZHd7TRw2fw2jgjMG9V9kxE6bjXhOdnSxShRWJuU2hIGYw9u6UaPw9Mcyn7QuwMZWbKsFCE-2aOE2AmTmVdLn-5MX0OlQj36aZlWOHkFPv2vyr7YWBTU7kYThIeNVaQ6rlut2e9382HTTGl6tli1g45MZXHFHKd6K3pnVJqqYITsnleeC4xifkZZn2UsCSm5nLlF-81K99P8bXs17mwjeUi5Scpi4bN-3ovyhBlN3wSndZZ-UIq2o%3D) Peter, From the day she launched her campaign, I told Sarah Huckabee Sanders I’d do whatever I could to help her become the next Governor of Arkansas.

When I say that the Radical Left Democrats are anxious for Sarah Huckabee Sanders to fail, I’m not joking. A Super PAC run by allies of Hillary Clinton and Kamala Harris is already running negative ads against Sarah and spending a LOT of money putting their lie-filled ad in front of Arkansas voters. It’s not going to stop. Not at all. Over the coming months, we’ll see the entire Democrat Party Machine, the media, and the Big Tech companies working together to destroy Sarah’s campaign. body:
Protect the right to vote by voting!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040166/313724511/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
November 2nd is only a few days away, team! [**Have you made your plan to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040167/313724512/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
Because the **best** way to protect your right to vote is by voting people into office who have your back, _just like Maggie does._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040168/313724513/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
Turning out in this election is critical. We have to vote for officials who actually __believe__ in democracy. **There are no off-years** when it comes to democracy. Every. Single. Election. Day. Counts.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040169/313724514/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
**__Solidify__** your plan, _write it down_ , share it with your friends, and ask your family and neighbors how they will be casting their vote. You **double** your impact on our democracy by doing that.
Showing up on Election Day and ensuring that your voice is heard is how we elect officials who **_prioritize the voices of the people they serve_**.
[**We need [50] people to make a plan to vote before 11:59 P.M. Click on the link to find out where you need to be on Election day!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040170/313724515/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040171/313724516/783003702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=&emci=2f9039dc-2f38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3741fd3-3038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3583156)
Let’s make a plan to vote!

Team Maggie
_ _
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38040172/313724517/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211026PlanToVote_VR_TEAM_FULL_6_G_TESTA_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzc0MWZkMy0zMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-ZYuG7IJufWzYy1U92DiHFLpmo7n9qTQEg-TyZ8rg=)**_

But, as this poll shows, we’re only a slim lead away from losing it all. That’s why it’s CRUCIAL that we hit our October fundraising goal before Sunday night. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: It’s time to eliminate the filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Republicans have weaponized an arcane procedural rule to block legislation.
#

Friends -
As I travel across our state, I’m hearing from people who are worried about the failure of Washington to make progress and address the needs of North Carolinians on so many critical issues.
Right now, Republicans have weaponized an arcane procedural rule to block legislation the voters in our state and our nation support: the filibuster.
At the same time, our nation is confronting urgent, generational challenges like recovering from the pandemic, expanding access to affordable health care, addressing climate change, and reforming a broken criminal justice system. But time and again broadly popular, commonsense solutions that Americans support are blocked by threats of a filibuster.
It’s wrong. We must eliminate the filibuster.
**[Will you add your voice to mine and call on Senate Democrats to eliminate the filibuster? Add your name today to send a message that we cannot afford to allow the filibuster to stand in the way of progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38041016/313727721/1885763311?refcode2=2f44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211028-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ0ZDEyZS0zMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3bJhelXMg7SO0FxhROT2GvKglQ3zXvMGtyNR-Hb4lI=&emci=2c44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
I remember my mother and grandparents celebrating when the 1965 Voting Rights Act passed on a bipartisan vote — hoping that their children and grandchildren would never face the obstacles to voting that they did. But in today’s Senate, not a single Republican Senator has shown any willingness to vote for legislation to protect the right to vote.
In the face of attacks on fundamental rights like voting and reproductive freedom, Republicans universally oppose even debating overwhelmingly popular, commonsense solutions that would protect all of us.
We cannot wait as politicians obstruct efforts to safeguard our rights and do the work we elected them to Congress to do. The filibuster must go.
**[If you agree, please add your name today to tell Senate Democrats to eliminate the filibuster. With all that’s on the line right now, we cannot allow an arcane procedural rule to stand in the way of commonsense solutions that an overwhelming majority of Americans support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38041017/313727729/1885763311?refcode2=2f44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211028-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ0ZDEyZS0zMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3bJhelXMg7SO0FxhROT2GvKglQ3zXvMGtyNR-Hb4lI=&emci=2c44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f44d12e-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
In the Senate, I’ll fight tirelessly to end the gridlock from Washington politicians and make real change for the people of our state.
\- Cheri Beasley

clean_body: Republicans have weaponized an arcane procedural rule to block legislation. Friends - As I travel across our state, I’m hearing from people who are worried about the failure of Washington to make progress and address the needs of North Carolinians on so many critical issues. Right now, Republicans have weaponized an arcane procedural rule to block legislation the voters in our state and our nation support: the filibuster. At the same time, our nation is confronting urgent, generational challenges like recovering from the pandemic, expanding access to affordable health care, addressing climate change, and reforming a broken criminal justice system. But time and again broadly popular, commonsense solutions that Americans support are blocked by threats of a filibuster. It’s wrong. We must eliminate the filibuster. I remember my mother and grandparents celebrating when the 1965 Voting Rights Act passed on a bipartisan vote — hoping that their children and grandchildren would never face the obstacles to voting that they did. But in today’s Senate, not a single Republican Senator has shown any willingness to vote for legislation to protect the right to vote. In the face of attacks on fundamental rights like voting and reproductive freedom, Republicans universally oppose even debating overwhelmingly popular, commonsense solutions that would protect all of us. We cannot wait as politicians obstruct efforts to safeguard our rights and do the work we elected them to Congress to do. The filibuster must go. In the Senate, I’ll fight tirelessly to end the gridlock from Washington politicians and make real change for the people of our state. \- Cheri Beasley * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: The Wade Brigade
subject: Are you ready to vote this Tuesday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hello Peter!
This year’s General Election Day is just around the corner on Tuesday, November 2nd! The “off-year” elections are the best way to create real change at the local and municipal levels – and your voice matters!
If you need more information on this year’s election here are some helpful resources:
Find your polling location, sample ballot, current elected officials & more. [http://mvp.sos.ga.gov]
Call the Georgia Dems Voter Protection Hotline if you need assistance or have any general questions: 1-888-730-5816
Are you voting via absentee ballot? Check out FAQs and how to return it here. [https://www.georgiademocrat.org/voter-protection-2/submit-your-absentee-ballot/]
Your vote is your voice and your right! Learn about your local candidates and don’t forget to vote this Tuesday, November 2nd!
Onward,
The Wade Brigade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
