| | Team, Throughout my career, I’ve taken on some of our state’s biggest challenges to deliver real change — and every time we’ve won, it’s because of people like you. Whether it was becoming Massachusetts’ first Latina State Senator, pushing the Legislature to pass comprehensive criminal justice reform, or championing a transformational education bill to give every kid a quality education, we’ve organized and built the coalitions necessary to win. Especially when insiders said it would be impossible. **Now I’m asking you to stand with me again. Running for governor isn’t something I can do by myself. I’m working together with people across the state to build another winning team, and I need you by my side.** [_**Will you contribute $10 today to help put this team together?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38042183/313732182/99201477?refcode=em_20211028_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUyMWVhNC0zNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snCX5RG6ZXQLKF4X1UNuFYpUASK8-OynEizcOjoD3H0=) There’s a secret to all the wins in my time in the State House. When insiders and power brokers said we wouldn’t be able to do something, it only made me work harder. Every time, we stood together and fought unapologetically for the things working families across Massachusetts actually need. That’s the kind of fire we can have in the Governor’s office. You have my word, I’ll never stop fighting to solve our state’s biggest challenges: from climate change to racial justice to voting rights to economic equality. **Together, we can make sure Massachusetts is a place that works for all of us.** **But first we have to win. We need to raise $10,000 by the end of the month — by Sunday — to stay on the right track. Will you contribute $10 today to help us reach that goal?** [_**Make your contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38042184/313732183/99201477?refcode=em_20211028_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUyMWVhNC0zNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snCX5RG6ZXQLKF4X1UNuFYpUASK8-OynEizcOjoD3H0=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: Running for governor isn’t something you can do by yourself. I’m working to put together another winning team, and I need you to be part of it. | | | | | Team, Throughout my career, I’ve taken on some of our state’s biggest challenges to deliver real change — and every time we’ve won, it’s because of people like you. Whether it was becoming Massachusetts’ first Latina State Senator, pushing the Legislature to pass comprehensive criminal justice reform, or championing a transformational education bill to give every kid a quality education, we’ve organized and built the coalitions necessary to win. Especially when insiders said it would be impossible. Now I’m asking you to stand with me again. Running for governor isn’t something I can do by myself. I’m working together with people across the state to build another winning team, and I need you by my side. = There’s a secret to all the wins in my time in the State House. When insiders and power brokers said we wouldn’t be able to do something, it only made me work harder. Every time, we stood together and fought unapologetically for the things working families across Massachusetts actually need. That’s the kind of fire we can have in the Governor’s office. You have my word, I’ll never stop fighting to solve our state’s biggest challenges: from climate change to racial justice to voting rights to economic equality. Together, we can make sure Massachusetts is a place that works for all of us. But first we have to win. We need to raise $10,000 by the end of the month — by Sunday — to stay on the right track. Will you contribute $10 today to help us reach that goal? = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z07arsi4c2j10595b6249e4390m831gnc6kjik18_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5im6or1c5h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvtlcdacn4855vnhunu0gtliqsku5bf0g4i6h63o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5im6or1c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zonnesia2sh4iuet4s62itgk9rt30gjqr4hog3o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5c5im6or1c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I wanted to give you an update on where we stand this month... | Friend, Tony Evers is terrified of our campaign’s early success. Thanks to patriots like YOU we crushed our September fundraising goal, and according to this month’s latest report, we have a commanding lead among registered voters in Wisconsin. But Evers sees the same numbers we do. He knows this race won’t be labeled a 50-50 toss-up for much longer at this rate. That’s why his liberal allies launched a lying attack ad to try and stall our momentum right before the end-of-month fundraising deadline -- and we’re still $15,350 short of our October goal. Our monthly goals aren’t just arbitrary numbers to throw on a report. Hitting these benchmarks is critical to maintaining our momentum in this MUST-WIN race. Our October goal was set specifically to help fund our efforts to register another 100,000 more conservative voters and fight back against Tony Evers’ attacks. But with just a few days left to raise the remaining $15,350 of our goal, I’m counting on your support now more than ever, Friend. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
We homeschool | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSa38sSWy6zDI9ldpdWZff8Tia1GYMnFgDGVWEIFXzWKuov1oAaSfiIMLPH8ugog9FBR-5QtNSdIbKYGfDm3uzczUHcv3HEpjMWi2Qer0KeGYDVM9VIpy5G4tMNgVbDnyYFO-KKs3X0Fy5W7776GVFT08RoYaHcfrZgm0Qk8dEU_X1dYxYPosD97eUbLuKxWXg2jLonPlrS0OQOz2Gecu5EQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to tell you a secret about my family. **We homeschool our sons. My wife and I thought that homeschooling was the best option for our family, and it's a decision we will never regret.**

While students in public school are learning wokeisms, challenging their privilege, and fussing over pronouns, my kids are learning real skills they'll need to succeed in life and real American history.

Democrats are trying to silence their opposition and to do that, they need to indoctrinate your children. **The Biden administration has already designated parents as _"Domestic Terrorists"_ because they want their children to learn math and science, not to hate their country.** You should be able to control your child's education without the FBI opening an investigation.

This overreach is beyond the scope of the government, but they will continue to meddle in your lives until we stop them. [**You didn't sign up to co-parent your children with the government, so why should you be forced to give them control over their lives.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSJ1VZobmE50LChdYuW-xO_H63BGHvhyA5vuWq0LHCAN8NaXKyl_3A0XWOmNESK_zxVL6smDbs2lX-HJWde1Ku9S8cjZg-DOAmwJjqFS3UrmdLTdVKKtPLOFnM3p2bB1pxbbNktRbi7EKF7IBinSS6G6eNXAlAh8q1Kmx7ErSyj3LUx4OWHz7TOpKWtC5y5pRyzruh-pR3UNIkB1TfzydbrQ%3D%3D)

[** ****STOP THE GOVERNMENTS
CO-PARENTING ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSIZtrQhvmCo8C5dVKEPKZsBtMgE5_wWyZl5gmlqhS44Ng-_Q5jtmffVctZ_zYWi5PqvQZ1ax3MlzMwz5ckYiHw4FHZzW8l3jLOaD7RRIhSpX6FWqKwxxfZ-6V2-GZtpz3Kv81jDgMPDrwlUrlY3vtj5ef_FWavaQU8RbHfRIZZORRBDS4vGRCkj4-10J0cThKPG9sI8LdBMYGcDUsG0R_BA%3D%3D)
Parents should have the final say when it comes to their child's education. Government should get out of the way and let parents choose where their kids go to school and what they learn.

I want to stop the Left from indoctrinating your children. To do that, we first need to take back our Senate from the Democrats.

[**If you want to protect your kids and make sure they have what it takes to beat China in the future economy, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSs5B04rsCxK0g5e45gRpKKSM9OFodDY89QN21MUu813H01IPsKR3dZMbqC-DemCKkvXmaPRk7sTwdVP9I7ZEkRqyfhi3N0xX2zRLf5YFoGHevXPazkKIrt_xjLmsxH1-eOwu0gLA4PQythlmCr_snQ8Zp7p5SvfAXNOvTji0Jr3c5tr5pAbe0DlnTOsJxSpg-tXOAkiz2h2Y3ie7wVi12Rg%3D%3D)

It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. [**If you agree, chip in $10 today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSwATcefkxzXOGxrvdWpBIV8XOD6inUmHgzB4Cj5YnaFwS-CrwIpBMeUxAG55HCvEX6h3czPKbpi9nfOe0FFr37NNj8n9YowQVh43fRfEDhEaAQDNWVW0tFShU2ozm3emM5UNcRdTQZGCMNr4EtlybQrhhU6BVofGycsDTM0XLU2y8f5SAIFpiR9SimrEWeGaVuBk_sy54b2-Dq3w5LAp0vA%3D%3D)

[** ****Chip in $10 ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSXIkqtDb3bnxR7S0OHJlOKbttd2P75nB6koMRt0ofoXhMfZNMA4hhBGvGd6t1ExeynFTodnY82u8-yVHiw587AyZzk-7Kx0ehu4AD0wKdAdW2gfs3No5waIMGENlEqE0elG1CS5WyjMQ1b0JF-X9Xb8LK0SnYylh5gF4GuKc23bqTybtrJGdy-ASs2xY3F_gxxnPSEcC5XU6xkUMPFmdqhA%3D%3D)
**We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children.**

Thank you, Fellow Conservative,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5907266b4584c538e51ac22e211604e&_e=KCp8o2RiEaGM8s4mSa259N9LbptuZ8artXs9Uvjj3CbJsWj_j2OJyV78-Qh5DHOHkiNU_VsumdWpnzCe5cG1aq-6op39bgymczdLSbjq6I1uGu5DQLEz3twhjze0QPplf-iEpZ4hIna2SqqVpLb6_YL9lFA-JDP-wrCJVgtYSRcWQdGxnq6FTuLVXnd_DaZP5CGegABCahzpK9Mnc53sxQ6LGsEimPqlJNkE5FAcDjSNTpaBdJyYwmPILL9CJRnSuKxkyWY_OcRN5DXU3dlhT1VnCei3o-MEnF-ujRiiQODqgTP4_axsTYiA56IV5FTXdzOOgQhx94ExmdA4C8kY-ogyGDChrK74mT1Sm7Ejwt_DOIT9LNgWhi2pzc91ngDyVtaWijIca-CWUcI_QPXeu_gIGDeq3u4cQcNKH7khSVJei7mGGznLB_UIyfv4HYhoZiIzkJmwbKPyKNIN6TscdQ%3D%3D)

It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children. Thank you, Fellow Conservative, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

But an appearance from Donald Trump himself could give Sears a boost in the polls. We cannot allow her to win this race when so much is on the line — voting rights, abortion care, affordable health care, and becoming the crucial tie-breaking vote in our split Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = I know together, we can win this race and protect our Democratic priorities. Thank you for standing with me against hatred, = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor | | Paid for by Hala For Virginia P.O. Box 7434, Woodbridge, VA 22195 www.halaforvirginia.com Hala Ayala is the Democratic nominee running for Virginia Lt. Governor. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: some good news, some bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
National Republicans recently announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.
Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.
Peter, Youngkin is climbing in the polls, and the experts at The Cook Political Report just moved the race to a toss-up.
Here’s the good news: we’ve got a plan to turn out the voters we need. The bad news is that it’s going to cost us a lot of money, and we’re running out of time.
We set a rapid response goal of raising $275,000 by midnight tonight — we can’t run our grassroots field operation if we don’t have the funds. Will you split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Stewart Navarre so we can build a world-class ground game? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe&express_lane=true&amount=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe]
And the truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference.
With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia , get mailers in every single Virginia mailbox , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.
Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their endless resources, I need your help right now.
So, will you help me out today? Split a donation right now before our midnight deadline — your contribution will go directly toward funding the biggest grassroots mobilization effort Virginia has ever seen. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-mcauliffe-sn?refcode=211028-email-split-mcauliffe]
Thanks for being on my team,
Terry McAuliffe
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

clean_body: I wanted to give you an update on where we stand this month... | Friend, Tony Evers is terrified of our campaign’s early success. Thanks to patriots like YOU we crushed our September fundraising goal, and according to this month’s latest report, we have a commanding lead among registered voters in Wisconsin. But Evers sees the same numbers we do. He knows this race won’t be labeled a 50-50 toss-up for much longer at this rate. That’s why his liberal allies launched a lying attack ad to try and stall our momentum right before the end-of-month fundraising deadline -- and we’re still $15,350 short of our October goal. Our monthly goals aren’t just arbitrary numbers to throw on a report. Hitting these benchmarks is critical to maintaining our momentum in this MUST-WIN race. Our October goal was set specifically to help fund our efforts to register another 100,000 more conservative voters and fight back against Tony Evers’ attacks. But with just a few days left to raise the remaining $15,350 of our goal, I’m counting on your support now more than ever, Friend. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Re: Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: paid for by the twice-impeached, corrupt former occupant of the White House
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UAt1yMKsrETkzIEQbZFaQ0MQ66Q01r63&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, there have been massive developments in the investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection: The House has officially voted to hold Steve Bannon - former chief strategist to Donald Trump - in contempt of Congress.
The longtime Trump ally and purported architect of the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol has thus far refused to testify before the committee or hand over documents that could uncover the full truth behind the deadly insurrection incited by the former president. Now, in a bipartisan vote, the House has paved the way for Attorney General Merrick Garland to prosecute Bannon on criminal charges.
**Bannon 's contempt of Congress is just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to the Republican Party's involvement in the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. A bombshell new report also reveals that _multiple_ Republican members of Congress were "intimately involved in planning both Trump's efforts to overturn his election loss and the Jan. 6 events that turned violent."**
The names of Trump's alleged co-conspirators will likely not surprise you: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Mo Brooks, Madison Cawthorn, and Lauren Boebert, among others. Clearly, the soul of the Republican Party has been bought and paid for by the twice-impeached, corrupt former occupant of the White House. **Soulless or not, anyone involved in the attack on our Capitol - an attack on our democracy itself - must be held accountable, from Donald Trump to Steve Bannon to any member of Congress.**
Friend, the plain truth is this: The Republican Party is counting on Americans like you to look the other way. They are counting on you _not_ to speak out so they can sweep all these wrongdoings under the rug. But I know you're not about to let that happen, which is why in light of even more revelations, I need your help to hold Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and Republican members of Congress accountable.
**Before midnight tonight, add your name to speak out at this critical moment:[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, members of his administration, and members of Congress who aided Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click if you agree - we need grassroots Democrats to speak out by the thousands.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&code=jtk1087-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Donald Trump and his associates' dangerous and anti-democratic behavior can't simply become a page in a history book. Severe actions require severe consequences. It's up to us to ensure accountability. Thank you again for taking action.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FgN71HBpas0nahUwZ0n2aUMQ66Q01r63&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Peter,
Last night, I joined Fox News to discuss how Joe Biden has weaponized the Department of Justice for his political gain. Shockingly, Attorney General Merrick Garland released the FBI and NSA on parents who have a vested interest in their child’s education and wanted to protest the woke ideology that is running rampant in school systems.

_**WATCH MY INTERVIEW WITH SEAN HANNITY BELOW**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=864d6223c9034d989e6a42802d08cea3&_e=gISMpcapmPx6s73IDjOg5dYCqhkjLDPoUrWuGMczolRt0NC2bj9yHOnWdEFSge2ECU9DNmv_LidZIXR3mnz6bwyIuSymvKjZYmDpAK7Ul5yFxaQzWr26yvQJbSF1AyEErAnYgF36-xeYL6OmCKbh07LV4aO8AZaTu8A5mNnrPwg6wgoyaehLkibQbwqnGOJdApdAi6l1NS6v444bxMlwolZnstYVWxY9Tid7QeQ0vaEgcn84HZ3AdKvJQQifTrdnwnYCHomAlkBvuUdzhu_b4Zj7o1WkiLHY1tSBI223XppMu9mqaNzFANTULX34aDxjYTxXKgsV6rXR8oBpm49vz2ZIaO6fkk1I5cZS9XdV6nxMgruE_6nQKS-08K7vXvp8OBQ2bb9IWIh-YGtA1hy-kcBq_6WFg9ql2I1RBVKk89M%3D)
Garland did not listen to parents. He has no control over his office, or he is purposefully using the DOJ as a political police force. Either way, it’s time for him to resign!
[**DEMAND GARLAND RESIGN**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=864d6223c9034d989e6a42802d08cea3&_e=gISMpcapmPx6s73IDjOg5dYCqhkjLDPoUrWuGMczolRt0NC2bj9yHOnWdEFSge2ECU9DNmv_LidZIXR3mnz6bwyIuSymvKjZYmDpAK7Ul5yFxaQzWr26yvQJbSF1AyEErAnYgF36-xeYL6OmCKbh07LV4aO8AZaTu8A5mNnrPwg6wgoyaehLkibQbwqnGOJdLcrTURYf_Of9yc__1jZIypRPHzO1ib3R66RlacCC_1ndmPIn9upZUk8-T6DOYu6Sc78CKyTl2fRis77AwqL2P_9UE83PKpwb6zisb61nyumAXAEg22ujPQRLBep0BwRNuZItVDyie6cU9VmUGfilV7xeqyRt6G2hszezxWNKlc98VDlfcfF9wOTVVrbuAAXP0VfEZR7csVytDyZG6WLMdn2cbsN9Tge4TLv4tfCDZwo%3D)

name: Redistricting Alert (via John Cranley for Governor)
subject: Mike DeWine can’t distance himself from this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
We’re outraged. | **Mike DeWine was a member of Ohio’s redistricting commission. Why is he claiming he had “no involvement” in drawing the gerrymandered maps?** We bet we know the answer, friend. Look, even Mike DeWine knows how partisan the commission’s proposed maps are. In fact, he _admitted_ that they might not be considered “clearly constitutional.” (Nonetheless, DeWine voted to _approve_ the maps anyway.) **DeWine might be trying to distance himself from this partisan gerrymandering maneuver in the hopes that voters will forget, but we WILL hold him accountable at the ballot box.** **_[Chip in $25 or whatever you’re able right now to support our movement to elect a leader Ohioans can count on and send DeWine packing>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38043751/313738683/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.3c286337-3d38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.3c286337-3d38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI4NjMzNy0zZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3iTchUSXzhz7QeuEXUKn5ozyO-ry_id0OtmQCaSuB-A=)_** Ohioans **want** and **deserve** a nonpartisan redistricting process. That’s why they voted twice for reform. And they won’t be fooled by these new GOP maps — maps that _ensure_ Republicans will maintain their supermajorities in both legislative chambers. We CAN’T count on Mike DeWine or Republicans in Columbus to heed the will of the voters. All they’re concerned with is holding onto power no matter what. clean_body: We’re outraged. | Mike DeWine was a member of Ohio’s redistricting commission. Why is he claiming he had “no involvement” in drawing the gerrymandered maps? We bet we know the answer, friend. Look, even Mike DeWine knows how partisan the commission’s proposed maps are. In fact, he admitted that they might not be considered “clearly constitutional.” (Nonetheless, DeWine voted to approve the maps anyway.) DeWine might be trying to distance himself from this partisan gerrymandering maneuver in the hopes that voters will forget, but we WILL hold him accountable at the ballot box. = Ohioans want and deserve a nonpartisan redistricting process. That’s why they voted twice for reform. And they won’t be fooled by these new GOP maps — maps that ensure Republicans will maintain their supermajorities in both legislative chambers. We CAN’T count on Mike DeWine or Republicans in Columbus to heed the will of the voters. All they’re concerned with is holding onto power no matter what. Mike won’t get away with pretending he had nothing to do with these gerrymandered maps, friend. It’s time for him to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let's do this, John Cranley for Governor = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044009/313739293/-74008005?refcode=20211028_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjNlMjYyZC0zZTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riRffL5LoWf42zEVOKgatN7AF-uqdeW8hIl3gKg_MJg=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044010/313739294/-74008005?refcode=20211028_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjNlMjYyZC0zZTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riRffL5LoWf42zEVOKgatN7AF-uqdeW8hIl3gKg_MJg=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044011/313739295/-74008005?refcode=20211028_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjNlMjYyZC0zZTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riRffL5LoWf42zEVOKgatN7AF-uqdeW8hIl3gKg_MJg=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044012/313739296/-74008005?refcode=20211028_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjNlMjYyZC0zZTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riRffL5LoWf42zEVOKgatN7AF-uqdeW8hIl3gKg_MJg=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044013/313739297/272679854?refcode=20211028_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjNlMjYyZC0zZTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riRffL5LoWf42zEVOKgatN7AF-uqdeW8hIl3gKg_MJg=) name: Josh Mandel
subject: They want SOCIALISM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, Joe Biden is **UNFIT**. [_**In just a few days, we will reach our October end-of-month deadline.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MsyrX8y-h1shYOOlHQJmf4Io1lQhErA-loxeVSaO73U=/CdRKDAGqly42OK2TgI_AIlYDa1l9vhTEuHzvhSc4UtM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211028-1-EM&amount=25) This is when our campaign focuses on mounting a strong fundraising push, and I wanted to take this opportunity to explain why your contributions are so important.

Before Abigail won in 2018, Republicans held this seat for almost half a century. National Republican groups and outside spenders are eager to flip it back in 2022 and will pull out all the stops to do so. **Last election cycle, outside groups spent over $15,000,000 -- yes, $15 million! -- in Virginia's 7th District.** This year, groups have already launched ad campaigns distorting Abigail's record. We expect many more to follow in the next year.

By contributing anything you can today, you make sure we withstand these attacks. To win, we will need a great team, literature for canvassers, digital ads, TV ads, and an office where we will again bring our community of volunteers together! Voters across the district need to know that Abigail will always advocate for our community and put our interests first.

[_**Our grassroots network has always been a core part of our strategic advantage. That 's why I am personally asking, will you contribute to Abigail's re-election campaign before our October end-of-month deadline?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MsyrX8y-h1shYOOlHQJmf4Io1lQhErA-loxeVSaO73U=/CdRKDAGqly42OK2TgI_AIlYDa1l9vhTEuHzvhSc4UtM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211028-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/MsyrX8y-h1shYOOlHQJmf4Io1lQhErA-loxeVSaO73U=/CdRKDAGqly42OK2TgI_AIlYDa1l9vhTEuHzvhSc4UtM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211028-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Abigail has a lot more work to do in Congress to lower prescription drug prices, expand rural broadband, and invest in our schools. I hope you'll support our campaign today so Abigail can continue to make progress on these critical issues.

Thank you,

Whitney Holt
Team Spanberger

* * *

Folks,

We have an important deadline coming up. Our end-of-month deadline is this Sunday (Halloween!), and we need to hit our goal of $10,000.

It’s high time for a change in leadership for CA-23. Kevin McCarthy has done nothing but lie to his constituents and break promises. That’s why Bruno Amato is working hard to give CA-23 the leader we deserve.

Unlike McCarthy, Bruno is focused on improving CA-23 and moving the country towards a brighter future, but we need your support to elect a true leader.

**[Can you donate $5, $25, or $50 to help us reach our end-of-month goal and get closer to quality leadership for CA-23? name: NextGen America
subject: Congress needs to hear from us on the Build Back Better Act
body:
| | Friend, When young people elected Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democratic majorities to both the House and Senate in 2020, they gave Democrats a mandate to make real, generational change. Young Americans expected the leaders they elected to act and act quickly — on solving the climate crisis, reducing income inequality, and building an economy that works for ordinary people. **The Build Back Better Act framework announced by the White House today doesn’t go far enough to address the economic and climate crises facing our generation, but it’s a decent start.** [Write to your members of Congress now and urge them to vote in favor of the Build Back Better Act and fully deliver on the framework outlined today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38044695/313741525/-1583500652?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU0M2IxZC00MjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xULmSpEv-oX6B_57EAUAnYOljtnDlaugkYs4A_A0gc8=&emci=d9580e86-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89543b1d-4238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) Although Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema cut major parts of President Biden’s policy agenda at the behest of corporate interests,**it was pressure from grassroots activists like you that managed to secure wins on several major priorities, including:**
* **The largest investment in climate action in history** , with $555 billion to decarbonize and promote clean energy
* **Universal pre-K and new investments to ensure affordable child- and home-care** for parents and caregivers
* **An expansion of affordable health care** to lower premiums and close the Medicaid coverage gap
* **New investments in access to higher education** , including at Historically Black Colleges & Universities, minority-serving institutions, and Tribal Colleges & Universities
* **An extension of the Child Tax Credit** for an additional year
* **Immigration relief to keep families together** and make the system more humane
* **Unprecedented funding for affordable housing** and rental assistance

We support the framework over the alternative of continued inaction, hardship, and lost opportunity for millions of struggling Americans. **Congress should move swiftly to pass President Biden’s infrastructure package and the Build Back Better Act** — and then recommit themselves to fulfilling the promises that inspired millions of young people to join our democratic process in 2020. As negotiators work to turn this deal into written legislation, **our members of Congress need to hear from us so everything in this framework remains in the final package.** The Build Back Better Act will soon come to a vote in both chambers of Congress, so we can’t let up just yet. Rest assured, we’ll continue to push for progress on what was left out of this deal. But time is running out and we can’t afford to let this moment pass us by. [Urge Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act and finally deliver results for working families.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38044696/313741526/1145382703?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU0M2IxZC00MjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xULmSpEv-oX6B_57EAUAnYOljtnDlaugkYs4A_A0gc8=&emci=d9580e86-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89543b1d-4238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) | [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38044700/313741527/-420701238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU0M2IxZC00MjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xULmSpEv-oX6B_57EAUAnYOljtnDlaugkYs4A_A0gc8=&emci=d9580e86-3338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89543b1d-4238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172 "Take action")

name: Patty Murray
subject: Add your name: paid leave NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We’re at risk of wiping out years of progress women have made to advance their careers if we don’t step in now to give parents the support they need to balance work and family.
#
Peter,
I want to give you an update on the Build Back Better plan -- and ask for your urgent help in passing legislation families need right now.
First, the good news: We’re on the cusp of passing badly-needed measures to make child care more affordable, provide universal pre-kindergarten and extend the child tax credit. All of these steps will make a huge difference for parents.
But, I’m also fighting as hard as I can to secure paid leave for parents to care for a new child -- and right now, it’s an uphill battle. That’s where you come in:
**[We cannot let one or two senators block paid leave for millions of parents. Can you make your voice heard right now and tell Congress to include paid leave in the Build Back Better plan?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044663/313741486/1481076163?ms=pm_em_211028_1&refcode=pm_em_211028_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWViZjEwZS00MjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSJQTkyEtMxfvDRUlhf7MqB7zfycLFMCwEtsK-5ft6A=&emci=de54b781-3a38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9ebf10e-4238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
Here’s why this is so urgent, Peter:
The pandemic threw working parents -- especially working mothers -- into crisis. Nearly two million women have dropped out of the workforce since the start of the pandemic to care for their children.
We’re at risk of wiping out years of progress women have made to advance their careers if we don’t step in now to give parents the support they need to balance work and family.
**[We’ve been fighting for paid leave for a long time -- and now, when it’s more urgent than ever, we have a narrow window of opportunity to get it down. Please make your voice heard now by urging Congress to pass paid leave.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38044664/313741487/1481076163?ms=pm_em_211028_1&refcode=pm_em_211028_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWViZjEwZS00MjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSJQTkyEtMxfvDRUlhf7MqB7zfycLFMCwEtsK-5ft6A=&emci=de54b781-3a38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9ebf10e-4238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

clean_body: We’re at risk of wiping out years of progress women have made to advance their careers if we don’t step in now to give parents the support they need to balance work and family. Peter, I want to give you an update on the Build Back Better plan -- and ask for your urgent help in passing legislation families need right now. First, the good news: We’re on the cusp of passing badly-needed measures to make child care more affordable, provide universal pre-kindergarten and extend the child tax credit. All of these steps will make a huge difference for parents. But, I’m also fighting as hard as I can to secure paid leave for parents to care for a new child -- and right now, it’s an uphill battle. That’s where you come in: Here’s why this is so urgent, Peter: The pandemic threw working parents -- especially working mothers -- into crisis. Nearly two million women have dropped out of the workforce since the start of the pandemic to care for their children. We’re at risk of wiping out years of progress women have made to advance their careers if we don’t step in now to give parents the support they need to balance work and family. Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

| Peter,

Since January 6, Republicans have consistently downplayed the violent insurrection at the Capitol. They are doing everything they can to shield Donald Trump and others who incited the mob. **In fact, almost every Republican in the House voted to protect white nationalist Steve Bannon from facing contempt charges for refusing to cooperate with the committee investigating the insurrection.**

Why would these Republican “lawmakers” want to prevent a complete investigation of the violence on January 6? _Because many of them were complicit._

**According to Rolling Stone, some Republican members of Congress and their staff worked directly with the organizers of the Stop the Steal rally to overthrow the results of the election.**

Democracy is on the line, and we can’t stand back and do nothing. We need to do EVERYTHING we can to make sure Republicans don’t win back the House next year.

Derek — Trump is holding yet another rally for Glenn Youngkin - this time the day before Election Day. **We don’t have to remind you of the hatred and vitriol we saw at the last rally he held for Youngkin** \- when rally attendees pledged allegiance to a flag present at the January 6th insurrection.
Here’s the thing though: this could be exactly what Glenn needs to boost his turnout around the Commonwealth. Elections in Virginia are always close. Polls continue to say this race is a “toss-up” and “too close to call.” **This rally could be the tipping point in this election** , it could be what energizes right-wing extremists and MAGA maniacs to get to the polls and vote for Trump’s hand picked candidate on Election Day.
**So, here’s what we’re doing about it:**
* We’re writing this to you, hopeful that you’ll donate what you can to help us win on Tuesday
* We’re sending out HQ staff around the commonwealth from Roanoke to Virginia Beach to get people out to vote
* We’re blanketing the airwaves with ads reminding people to go vote on November 2nd
* We’re talking to voters around the commonwealth with our Statewide ticket bus tour

**The Democratic Party of Virginia is fighting like hell to win this** , and we need to spend this weekend talking to as many undecided voters as possible and making sure that they have a plan to cast their ballot for Terry McAuliffe and Democrats up and down the ticket.
**[Donald Trump is trying to impose his will on Virginia — we’re going to stop him on November 2nd. Will you chip in to stand up against Donald Trump and his crony Glenn Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38045333/313744163/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211028-trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzMwNGQ4MS00MzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fy6l0P_CP5lKJ02OVnDBe4GhCVCW0cMiJuvDsmlK35o=)**

clean_body: | | | It's official: = | ******=**** Derek — Trump is holding yet another rally for Glenn Youngkin - this time the day before Election Day. We don’t have to remind you of the hatred and vitriol we saw at the last rally he held for Youngkin \- when rally attendees pledged allegiance to a flag present at the January 6th insurrection. Here’s the thing though: this could be exactly what Glenn needs to boost his turnout around the Commonwealth. Elections in Virginia are always close. Polls continue to say this race is a “toss-up” and “too close to call.” This rally could be the tipping point in this election , it could be what energizes right-wing extremists and MAGA maniacs to get to the polls and vote for Trump’s hand picked candidate on Election Day. So, here’s what we’re doing about it: We’re writing this to you, hopeful that you’ll donate what you can to help us win on Tuesday We’re sending out HQ staff around the commonwealth from Roanoke to Virginia Beach to get people out to vote We’re blanketing the airwaves with ads reminding people to go vote on November 2nd We’re talking to voters around the commonwealth with our Statewide ticket bus tour The Democratic Party of Virginia is fighting like hell to win this , and we need to spend this weekend talking to as many undecided voters as possible and making sure that they have a plan to cast their ballot for Terry McAuliffe and Democrats up and down the ticket. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **=** **=** **=** **=** Thanks for your help Team DPVA ****=**** ****=****** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Digital Petition via Left Action
subject: Tell Merrick Garland to Prosecute Steve Bannon [Sign the petition]
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Attorney General Merrick Garland to Prosecute Steve Bannon >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ea70de5-2256-4af4-a5a8-247597c3571d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Trump fanboy and treason-enthusiast Steve Bannon has refused to testify before Congress about his involvement in the January 6th Capitol attack — in defiance of a subpoena. He’s breaking the law! Thankfully, the House voted to ask the Justice Department to bring criminal charges against Bannon. Now, we need Attorney General Merrick Garland to hold Steve Bannon accountable for his crimes. The American people deserve answers about the January 6th insurrection. We cannot allow Trump and his cronies to obstruct this investigation. [Add your name to tell Attorney General Merrick Garland: Bring criminal charges against Steve Bannon! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ea52598-0813-456a-aa8d-fdfc843f25df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: 4th Annual, We the People Idaho Conference, October 30th (This Saturday) Bundy & McGeachin Both Speaking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,It has been a busy week and we are now just reminding you of the "We the People Idaho Conference" this Saturday. As you may have heard Janice McGeachin is refusing to participate in debates. However, before she refused to debate she accepted the invitation to speak at the "We the People Conference", Ammon also will be speaking. So, come and compare the difference then decide who you will support and vote for. Many other people will be speaking as well.Every year this event has been a powerful tool for Idahoans to attend and understand more fully what is affecting our liberties. Speakers will be, AMMON BUNDY, LT. GOV. JANICE MCGEACHIN, SENATOR CHRISTY ZITO, STATE REP. TAMMY NICHOLS, MISTY KARLFELDT, SARAH WALTON BRADY, KIRK PENDERGRASS, TONY PELLEGRINO, DERRICK GATES & More! This event will be one for the history records. Several international media outlets will be attending, as well. What people in Idaho are doing is becoming an interest to the world. Janice speaks around 2 PM and Ammon will speak around 7 PM.Nampa Civic Center**Full Details**...
<https://team.votebundy.com/news_view?id=5e373b66-e657-4476-ac92-3c4bc49397c0>

Friend: Failed Republican politicians are attacking democracy from every angle – and Arizona's future is hanging in the balance. **We have to act NOW or face irreversible consequences.**
Republicans in our state are desperate to strip away fundamental rights and keep Arizona red – and they're modeling themselves after the worst of what the national GOP has to offer:

Arizona Republicans invited QAnon conspiracists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and even Donald Trump himself to rally their base in our state. Our new extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), called for Arizona to pass an abortion ban identical to the one being debated in Texas right now. And the hits just keep coming.
**If we don't act immediately, analysts at The Washington Post and experts like Rachel Maddow agree we run the risk of losing our democracy as we know it.

name: Jake Evans
subject: Reminder: Election Integrity NOW!
body:
I have been fighting for election integrity for...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but fraud has been happening in our elections for decades now.
I don't just talk about election integrity for votes, as an election lawyer and Georgia's former Ethics Commission Chair, I have been exposing and rooting out fraud for years.
Nearly three years ago I was the [first election lawyer in the state](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e7sF1V9kdaiwtscU-gMWaKyNqxJEMiT_gBd-gDO0ihI2USKqAE6IqwCBYY_7sFsu4Xp7RGdi2EXlfdItpzniaiyNF4_cjk70JFtF0mQDMXIOfI7-yjsSd2QmFfxLHOlFM0-KeXf8zzjZxA3Rel6IgTXf8hryvLhFm4k61UMvtZRhr39V2Rbvde7Rms7IF_Rds8_oFtA0DVCEkIpdPqYKog==&c=qbALfNZY7bQ060ad_2G2iCnRSD5IiNBBpG3oNd7S-cLPy01s1HrXxw==&ch=Xiq4JtYUWtvQnOhq-xFfUghvTo5i5rmaWdnE45Z3S6uRgWD-0bCJ8Q==) of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice. I made it my mission as Ethics Commission Chairman to take on the corrupt politicians enabling fraud.
I fought hard to drain the Atlanta Swamp by taking on Stacey Abrams, Keisha Lance Bottoms and anyone else who tried to weaken our elections.
Support my America First Campaign TODAY and I will work to drain the DC Swamp just like I did the Atlanta Swamp.

clean_body: I have been fighting for election integrity for... | | | | | | | | Dear Friends, When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but fraud has been happening in our elections for decades now. I don't just talk about election integrity for votes, as an election lawyer and Georgia's former Ethics Commission Chair, I have been exposing and rooting out fraud for years. Nearly three years ago I was the == of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice. I made it my mission as Ethics Commission Chairman to take on the corrupt politicians enabling fraud. I fought hard to drain the Atlanta Swamp by taking on Stacey Abrams, Keisha Lance Bottoms and anyone else who tried to weaken our elections. Support my America First Campaign TODAY and I will work to drain the DC Swamp just like I did the Atlanta Swamp. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == Exposing past fraud and stopping future election fraud is one of the most important battles of our time and there is no one more equipped to take on the challenge. == Sincerely, Jake Evans GOP Candidate for GA-6 | | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. clean_body: are you in or out? | | | = | | Derek, did you see my earlier email? Our final fundraising goal is off to a bad start. We’re really going to have to pick up the pace to hit $2 million by Sunday. Let me tell you why we can’t afford to miss: Polls are tied right now, and experts are saying it will all come down to voter turnout. Republicans are showing tons of enthusiasm about voting for their guy. Now, Donald Trump is making a last-minute visit to Virginia to help seal the deal for fellow extremist Glenn Youngkin. So we’ve got to do everything we can to ensure we turn out a record-breaking number of voters. This final fundraising goal is all about turning out those voters — everything you contribute right now will go directly toward getting voters to the polls on or before Election Day. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = We have to win this thing, Derek — we don’t have another choice. The country is watching to see what will happen in Virginia on Tuesday — so let’s send a message, loud and clear, that right-wing extremism has no place here. = Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: John Castorani
subject: Hillary Clinton's lies cost lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=492027454c584c3c98741c8d95eb2550&_t=00c4zUcQTGi_SHTyh65h1l3LWuTe0ZD8y6ra6bdMkPN2IjTHVZAi0gsuSQdwnGoLVnLgZEolQtyyjccQ83LZq9x3tfmO92ORonKZzFarg6gHIXHEgBPGYf2GBSxiee6s-zVyHNhRIk_NzsesN-E9-BU83WT5H2DJLWKVfJnwlZM%3D) | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=492027454c584c3c98741c8d95eb2550&_e=WVa8WWYnh4ZAaNiGPHBGTPpKG4SadkxnXGvM8ao4DiZTlyZqpbGQ9T3FThAH0iEXenPDEXcJisPPfwU7qmzGsYUjBEMnZcZYuOggCazfPYXHNHg23FAlh4MWZ8S8zToGj46BA2vbca5zohvIuwmrguiCwcaHpGkYrQAaxXR8Z5HAuyQejdM-QUEAdO243MGBMC9Ab_G85b9Qkv6xIhLpEiB5GDKH3o83nPjkDbRkmGnCg0X-cKmXgOdT0zObI6UViErWysOVtzqmeP0kNBvGapVfaIHbLLDtAEySg8-fOUwzn8rmWPzOrfIDMWPtKOMibfo99SCeuQxJsltXl_TtOoKvkX780hmMeNl9tkHcbJmasxDXyQfVz541SVH6o_AREOZuFrT3HM5XHmsEFHQe7XO4lns1XuvDTB7DMXBU9sOsdVTF7h9kUgMXxMrmQBAmw8E1VZfvHmqqffoQ3hqXO9d24cFuVdV1UWtB9Jl2FjM1Xplnz7qiMn0HZQCVeOZC)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=492027454c584c3c98741c8d95eb2550&_e=WVa8WWYnh4ZAaNiGPHBGTPpKG4SadkxnXGvM8ao4DiZTlyZqpbGQ9T3FThAH0iEXenPDEXcJisPPfwU7qmzGsYUjBEMnZcZYuOggCazfPYXHNHg23FAlh4MWZ8S8zToGj46BA2vbca5zohvIuwmrguiCwcaHpGkYrQAaxXR8Z5HAuyQejdM-QUEAdO243MGBMC9Ab_G85b9Qkv6xIhLpEiB5GDKH3o83nPjkDbRkmGnCg0X-cKmXgOdT0zObI6UViErWysOVtzqmeP0kNBvGarWX8vbhMAC-grigXNyCuPmfsS3OaDQE5O3Ybo33ceeqhpuGpdeuPCEicsBEH1N0ojpj4IGxBYiSEzQAuGtnP1rDiEx9FmuI6gk6Y7Y9NVmNmw2_9j4JCtXTQTZchE1acFAsbnJeHfUFyVdNKlqBKL47odQQ3v0Kkzg_pEUyXQbCwmb1QvnJXOyK8edRBPIFqIgBzufB6i2IYu73g1tU06wh-4QJV2RTR3C2NgJdVbxN)

I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=492027454c584c3c98741c8d95eb2550&_e=WVa8WWYnh4ZAaNiGPHBGTPpKG4SadkxnXGvM8ao4DiZTlyZqpbGQ9T3FThAH0iEXenPDEXcJisPPfwU7qmzGsYUjBEMnZcZYuOggCazfPYXHNHg23FAlh4MWZ8S8zToGj46BA2vbca5zohvIuwmrguiCwcaHpGkYrQAaxXR8Z5HAuyQejdM-QUEAdO243MGBMC9Ab_G85b9Qkv6xIhLpEiB5GDKH3o83nPjkDbRkmGnCg0X-cKmXgOdT0zObI6UViErWysOVtzqmeP0kNBvGagejG9_YtjXyg2qFLh7Wu4H7CxVqR4b_ZlbfmanqdewHE4lWCt3lHAiJqiK27T0TcvuPWtceo6Saa3hVZmdGr8_jnoDgfUHlemnCkxcvv97DURIF3kNBQnV7PwwrTacYJrpFJ65O3jVh6SvFf5Zl8r3Juq8KdyzswUpze4ae286_zziLp4V6bsieGJxPJY7uQJEvCzKOw0FFkIGHTh9cxyaN-WUENkYNzgVg06QfW9SO)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

body:
He must be punished. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/fauci-lied-2472914?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b974620e3c&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Anthony Fauci lied under oath.

He said the National Institute of Health was not funding gain-of-function research in China.

It was.

He must be punished for breaking the law.

**If you or I did the same, we would be tried, convicted, and thrown in jail. **

[_**Help me hold Fauci accountable with a contribution to my reelection campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=545c8384ad&e=645b3b1338).

Whether it's at the border, or against the criminals in the Deep State, I've been battling for Law and Order as long as I've been a Congressman.

We cannot have elites running around breaking laws without accountability, while regular people are forced to abide by the law.

Equal justice under the law is a bedrock of our system, and I'm battling as hard as I can to salvage it.

[_**Your generous support to my reelection campaign today will help me continue the fight**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6f0b8e0765&e=645b3b1338).

You wouldn't believe what our elites have gotten away with.

They've been pillaging this country and covering it up for decades.

**It's time to make an example out of them -- and Anthony Fauci is a great place to start.

[_Show me you've got my back in my battle for justice with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today._](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7661bcfe7b&e=645b3b1338) **

_[**A contribution today of just $10 or $25 -- or even $100 or $250 -- will be put towards helping me ensure that justice is served to Fauci the liar**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a5af1c06cb&e=645b3b1338)_[**. **](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f2320d58f8&e=645b3b1338)

---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a797d55c2c&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Anthony Fauci needs to be held accountable for lying to Congress under oath.

_[**_Help me bring him to justice with a generous contribution to my reelecton campaign today_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=698b86dd5b&e=645b3b1338)_.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: We need your help in California
body:
The work to grow our Democratic majority in Congress starts now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fdb7dfd0104f/we-need-your-help-in-california?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | -

Today we announced the launch of our statewide campaign in California to support the reelection of Senator Alex Padilla and flip five critical congressional districts from Republican to Democrat control. CA-21, CA-25, CA-39, CA-48 and CA-50 were huge losses for Democrats. Heading into 2022, Latinos are a key voting block needed to win these districts back, but the key is to start now.

We are not taking any chances with the first Latino U.S. Senator from California. Sen. Padilla is a true reflection of our community and we want to make sure he serves in the Senate for the long haul. His popularity in the state will also help us turn out Latinos in support of Democrats in these critical districts.
---
| [If you agree that Latinos are the key to success in these districts, pitch in any amount you can afford to support our work](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=ac4cf2e67d&e=b8f90417f9).

---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=60eceafe3d&e=b8f90417f9 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| From 2010 to 2020, Latinos in California grew their population by approximately 1.6 million. This means their share of the state’s population grew by 11%, compared to the statewide average growth rate of 6%. Critically, Latinos in the state voted against the recall of Governor Gavin Newsom by overwhelming margins in the state’s heavily-Latino counties like Merced, Los Angeles and San Francisco. This demonstrates how critical earning the Latino vote will be for Sen. Padilla to remain in office in 2022.
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=98f1560214&e=b8f90417f9)

clean_body: The work to grow our Democratic majority in Congress starts now | | | | | | | - Today we announced the launch of our statewide campaign in California to support the reelection of Senator Alex Padilla and flip five critical congressional districts from Republican to Democrat control. CA-21, CA-25, CA-39, CA-48 and CA-50 were huge losses for Democrats. Heading into 2022, Latinos are a key voting block needed to win these districts back, but the key is to start now. We are not taking any chances with the first Latino U.S. Senator from California. Sen. Padilla is a true reflection of our community and we want to make sure he serves in the Senate for the long haul. His popularity in the state will also help us turn out Latinos in support of Democrats in these critical districts. | . | "CONTRIBUTE" | From 2010 to 2020, Latinos in California grew their population by approximately 1.6 million. This means their share of the state’s population grew by 11%, compared to the statewide average growth rate of 6%. Critically, Latinos in the state voted against the recall of Governor Gavin Newsom by overwhelming margins in the state’s heavily-Latino counties like Merced, Los Angeles and San Francisco. This demonstrates how critical earning the Latino vote will be for Sen. Padilla to remain in office in 2022. | | We need your help to put this video in front of as many Latinos as possible across California and, especially, in these five districts. Please pitch in whatever you can so that Democrats can remain in control of the U.S. Congress. | "CONTRIBUTE" | Thank you for your support. We can’t do this work without you. Hi friendー it’s Darin.

Illinois Democrats are trying their best to silence me and take away the voice of Republican voters in this district.

Why?

**Because they’re afraid of us. **

As many of you know, I kicked off my career as a prosecutor right here at home in Illinois. The work wasn’t always easy –– _but fighting against corruption and standing up for the rule of law was always worth it at the end of the day._

But I knew that more had to be done, friend.

That’s why I moved to the Illinois State Senate, where I supported Fair Maps and stood up for conservative voices and against rampant government corruption at every turn in Springfield before coming to Washington.

My mission has always stayed the same: _**Root out corruption and fraud wherever it’s found!**_

_**And I want to continue that mission, but I’m going to need your help to keep going**_ –– [_**can I count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or $20 to my END OF MONTH DEADLINE and help me continue standing up against corruption?**_](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4e99d6565fa74eddaa25677f5909dc52&_e=Mn7Rxc-hL3xWRw6JOctNZRZJ1SjqyfdJIiBW8xufw11SiH3DREJGIMZAXWZYdtRLLZDeWxhy0OpwCBnpw54Ept-9FncGarbBD70G90_4NtdGic7ZGHtvcCxY1AHHqo8Uc-a7qTobIJh0Av9EflNsuMKwiD9Vj1K56s4OxtyD0RDZ6y4-UjF7MzhqvJ020NeemItzyzB7QXGQP6MGavrYPKIqIRycVdUAq8eoMlT8WX6N7NeDvBFh5_JIxVtlSrxdjFuRjk3igrjBBgXL5nI6YEOI-kZOU_cIs2ioKOz3kVbGBwhIpmbpAfkCVhEvd6xwivTKO0XgNntSDAl5iQmKW4pquuEqCp0UvfXaZiCSa9IFTac7qUNkJsf2oilK4KxRzN4Mzt6JoDR2Xehi7k1PIrpynGX553ZgBWM3Z9C3TUG85dodh2B_YsBj2VE8gDMR2nIC1O8JeeK4K-WcoacnvZdoi7UaT5OHl3yzP5aFUvU%3D)

| | Friend, In a week and a half we will be one year out from Election Day 2022. This coming election is shaping up to be even more important than the 2020 election. Even though we succeeded in kicking hatred and division out of the White House, those same forces are coming roaring back. **Historically, the president 's party has a tough path ahead in the midterm elections. From reproductive freedom to safeguarding our democracy, there is too much on the line.** That's why we are writing to you today. **We are looking for just 25 donors from your area to help bolster our odds next year.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _[**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/orYRcNkwtDgv33fhvH9iAPyeFIAT7jhU-g2xGFbHIG0=/1J8zdbEiz727ZVSckQAOebPa0N-rcNjy7_qveteAVp8=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=102821)_ _[**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/orYRcNkwtDgv33fhvH9iAPyeFIAT7jhU-g2xGFbHIG0=/1J8zdbEiz727ZVSckQAOebPa0N-rcNjy7_qveteAVp8=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=102821)_ _ _ _[**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/orYRcNkwtDgv33fhvH9iAPyeFIAT7jhU-g2xGFbHIG0=/1J8zdbEiz727ZVSckQAOebPa0N-rcNjy7_qveteAVp8=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=102821)_ _[**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/orYRcNkwtDgv33fhvH9iAPyeFIAT7jhU-g2xGFbHIG0=/1J8zdbEiz727ZVSckQAOebPa0N-rcNjy7_qveteAVp8=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=102821)_ We know that this coming election will be a tough one, but with your support we can protect and even expand our House DFL Majority. **If we slip this election, it won 't be long before Minnesota looks like Texas.** House Republicans have already pledged to introduce anti-choice legislation and have a long history of introducing anti-transgender youth bills and voting restrictions -- it's not unreasonable to assume it would happen again. Will you stand with us and help hold off Republican extremism in the Minnesota Legislature? Thank you, House DFL Team P.S. subject: [WATCH] Biden ADMITS his plan for our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Fixing our border
body:
| | Friend,
My name is Mo Brooks. I have been serving as a Congressman for Alabama’s 5th District and I am currently running to be Alabama’s next US Senator. I have a fierce love for our country and worked hard with President Trump to ensure that our borders were safe.
I am writing to you now because I need your help.
The swamp in DC has been fighting hard to open our borders for years. They are hell-bent on weakening our standing in the world, destroying our economy, and diminishing our sovereignty.
I am filled with concern as I see what the Socialist Democrats have done to our border under Biden. With nearly 2,000,000 known illegal crossings this year alone, and with more and more illegals being released into the US after their capture, our border might as well be an open door.
[Click below to hear why I stand alongside President Trump and agree that we must finish the wall >>>](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNUMtugzAQ_Bq4gezFgDlwaELyDz0hP4lVbFNjlKZfX5NHDz1Vslb27Mx4d2QPpCWVyk0PCDBGQAEhUqMSlwOi7aGuTvSI8QG1NCPIsokxEY13bFYhlsLb_NLrrsIdYCYURlxXktZaN1yjTmvKO0zyub_EuKxZ9ZbBOZ1ViS2o8mpcUHI3SZj1PHj_saYr90GqIIJZTdKct2hHq6TZbFYNyjIzZ9Ds4Oq3IFQCuaSMEcrqwol5ZHaZjb49SSI9mZlcor02LPYyavNl3DQmj_Hx4Wj9-JrhIfUuKheTMtkW79-nbXJ0OH6m9uhmI1PjD7jeQSX3FBUvCDS6IAh4QWlXF7JBUjWkbupK5KGXy9XMs1mbNiU77Xvd83yO32ftIQPYtmQJcI8O_mO8k-GYarwt6lf5NC2f8UHWDj80ZpyX)

name: Blake Masters
subject: The first step in silencing the opposition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
is controlling the educational system | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZCA9DyFFAM11Z49n-jKqhJL7z6HLGw4wG3Iqs7izglpWlleRUnbxok50UyAokFTlOMxn5y2MLxAy1o8CJuKuyE_kd35d8lA6-8x7lanhV_q_Jz7NInHl6V2CwCDJhjMZ7ThC3z0FTm3TYs-mvKd6kQOd6p4WgMNb6Xl8Fjuq-wj2q-Qn_kur_ehlcPqzJXUEYNMEy5JcBpxobW5kaRcwGHg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to tell you a secret about my family. **We homeschool our sons. My wife and I thought that homeschooling was the best option for our family, and it's a decision we will never regret.**

While students in public school are learning wokeisms, challenging their privilege, and fussing over pronouns, my kids are learning real skills they'll need to succeed in life and real American history.

Democrats are trying to silence their opposition and to do that, they need to indoctrinate your children. **The Biden administration has already designated parents as _"Domestic Terrorists"_ because they want their children to learn math and science, not to hate their country.** You should be able to control your child's education without the FBI opening an investigation.

This overreach is beyond the scope of the government, but they will continue to meddle in your lives until we stop them. [**You didn't sign up to co-parent your children with the government, so why should you be forced to give them control over their lives.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZHlXoRVzri-2eCoIGOSpl2sETYKB6I6eHyWydxlj0Wu941mFYROIdBvrlm-Oehn1TboxVS_TOwleoUaOtqn7pfqbM_jHFSaCipg6J_C-UvEp2R9hyU2dCgJyatvTbo2uVO-ywe2OdE6SQoJZsCIgM7mylMyZUpms3VETdkos__YwBLl0vDvxILf8sEagA-215EfmdWz1s7UGuphrQL0wfwg%3D%3D)

[** ****STOP THE GOVERNMENTS
CO-PARENTING ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZMAtw5xvYIwGfmrE6B6E1KHxoVbsaSmQKxU7fTlArKSOWZVnXICIOscBgZfAdEXsb_Wx6XixJCzuc6EUx2z0LdEZ1Q-5EpMZtBb7VAryY4fj4cWuYDIiMc9JOy9nK0isg51wFUGGMkOwWR6Fv0DJkR3OHIGK8NeUHy2ZkZMdtlz6ED8fobSAu2bIHrU_waoNZa7MUvH_4NlFM5aTgzsC4ng%3D%3D)
Parents should have the final say when it comes to their child's education. Government should get out of the way and let parents choose where their kids go to school and what they learn.

I want to stop the Left from indoctrinating your children. To do that, we first need to take back our Senate from the Democrats.

[**If you want to protect your kids and make sure they have what it takes to beat China in the future economy, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZB8Dge621tgQzSo1U35bNzCjnASwa8VZk3C8ObmfBdptXCVrDmzJWBkR_bBkfnamGpjXkjI7TG8aD8hasDl5ukaUgJfyvM9avMv60PNQ9yHBv2eD7wJyQzyGGBpwJhNnDo5Vg1T7yjWPDEkfi4ZxYjeC_AehFoDSz58QZ4WsXlkQRbDAsqh_6KxcSeoOHb1uKelFjQ3RkuW1ryPF0PiLhbg%3D%3D)

It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. [**If you agree, chip in $10 today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZbu26BBzu3R3BEU29wOx89bAAPr56O_DuCn-ILYzmUi9mDhelmDvRvoWtyjqlldQ-_v8RLjJJpsHcGKhACq0UUMSeM8qT1LQr5HDRRXUXT2lJVrX5hgjPeJZ4-e97pGsjxUtQ9KkYXRjRbJQOooKHiKO9L8qGeQz0LNgeZTohE-GOtLGI9RVjK5AnimfVLpM3SXEiU05pDWDniDq5YCbN9A%3D%3D)

[** ****Chip in $10 ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZ34-x3c9NY2RmW6WrHwdgrcJnrpreOqCmaGXOL4or1yj3PJfeu2sHzcBsNjS7OmVDObFgvSQmad-xPnOcf4qcOPXs7WeV03g292hRsW8mjzm-X7E-DKoWvsXE4UP0M9-2dWoA0MFoDNoH0TzwxIzJvUNG-Yo-AGvDGazhqxF_4NJvS6RvcvlRPhLDT9wQe2IZEsg4r1AEEFc3AgA6oRV-PA%3D%3D)
**We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children.**

Thank you, Fellow Conservative,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df28d8fd977e49efa9c87f897ac36c5b&_e=SDsmwAEdB0Rw10RQhlLWKDYVLBLHPnlwmRQ_5QUm81qHysu6s8OKB92ciapIC0cW3ter7yyU7aCRWSmb1Y2HQDJZ0css0ZMlGmZDxAf3VYsnojTSIKHxQzdwiWGQ9fZXPnf9hjcLURJG5RED129JZrLwBNPuKDPNeFpIu5RS1oi8YlMI5TI6AyHLGfsAJH5tiAfXnsx-4yU4SPlake_07UGrXZKp8_gwt1Bf8Xgkh6N3NGedUZlCPXPnYy9BXNHZ6UbrPX4A5wyk8Tlb1N_OODxer4U4Y-5orD4JltGhbxaJkDfXlCXu-CtNFIk0w0eYst25h1pgo30Vak5wJslNyTijFlN3TEfKBFrekhKtIhfxu8IbEhTNfXQ9VVct4XHYR3IWvbB8cRYEBvIraYUbPghNDyXpA-qXYz36UZ7__drSgg5VSGmLlPOXbmEfVisHcoqG4AkP6E-yTSsDFJzVBw%3D%3D)
