| | Hello, I hope this finds you well, on a nice fall day. Fall has so many wonderful parts that we celebrate from the beauty of nature to the crispness in the air (depending on where you are) to the expectancy of Halloween costumes and the joy we see on children’s faces for it all. So since my kids and their fall experiences are on my mind, a thought came to me.
---
|
---
| | Something else about fall is also good.
---
| | The settling into school routines and that got me thinking about education. So that’s the theme of this email, but more specifically, early childhood education and nutrition. The simple pleasure of enjoying a Washington state fall harvest apple is a joy many can’t experience for the lack of finances. Many families, living paycheck to paycheck, suffer from and cope with food insecurity. This is a tragedy, especially for a country that serves as a beacon to the world for success and freedom. In reality though, this is not a new problem. Families, single parent households and even grandparents, acting as guardians, have had to deal with this for decades and in a land of plenty this shouldn't be the case. There are numerous studies which link nutrition and food insecurity directly to how a child performs in school and into a future of decisions, health issues and even economic success. I know, that's an awful lot of things to consider in one email. However, I feel this is such an important issue as a parent and candidate for Congress, that we need to discuss it, formulate working plans and take decisive action towards eliminating this problem. One policy that President Biden has implemented is the Advanced Child Tax Credit benefit. Much more than just a tax break for working families, it directly and positively impacts children’s lives.

The first installment of the child tax credit lifted 3 million kids out of poverty in July, according to a Columbia University study.
That reduction represented a 25% cut in the monthly child poverty rate to 11.9% from 15.8%, according to the analysis
published Friday (08/20/2021).
[source [https://www.cnbc.com/2021/08/25/child-tax-credit-lifted-3-million-kids-from-poverty-in-july.html](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=xa9S-Hv2oVXihSIlRmhPj0IUSDiJnA2X30tPuclKX88.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25iYy5jb20vMjAyMS8wOC8yNS9jaGlsZC10YXgtY3JlZGl0LWxpZnRlZC0zLW1pbGxpb24ta2lkcy1mcm9tLXBvdmVydHktaW4tanVseS5odG1sIiwiciI6IjkzZjRjMzJjLTc5MmMtNDU1ZC00NWYxLTc5OWM0Y2QzYTViNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)]

| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=O_RNbLaaiMFZKGBKSBPBEWl7m7Mj2pN_7OcMg3gzVhs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPW51dHJpdGlvbl9lbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjQ2NTI3NzhmLTkxNmYtNGM5ZS05MjIzLWE0MDdmNTkyYjM0NCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

| | These payments enabled parents to breathe a little easier, pay bills like rent and utilities on time and most importantly to be able to afford more food for themselves and their children. If you’re wondering why I’m so focused on nutrition out of the gate, I get it. Many simply don’t understand that nutrition directly impacts the education of young children. Tangibly. Under-nourished and malnourished kids suffer physiological deficits such as a lack of energy to get through the day and psychological issues from stress over not having enough to eat at home and suppressed cognitive abilities, vital for learning. There is no doubt that a child who grows up without adequate nutrition will face significant barriers to academic achievement. The various physical, behavioral, emotional, and cognitive costs of food insecurity make it extremely difficult for these students to reach their full potential.[Source [https://www.aypf.org/blog/food-for-thought-how-food-insecurity-affects-a-childs-education](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=iF9gypQPHmJVqi8sUAiaXbiVC6TUEmd8X4lby1ny2Qw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXlwZi5vcmcvYmxvZy9mb29kLWZvci10aG91Z2h0LWhvdy1mb29kLWluc2VjdXJpdHktYWZmZWN0cy1hLWNoaWxkcy1lZHVjYXRpb24iLCJyIjoiZDc3ZjQ1OGUtMjA3Ni00ZWE2LTZkZWItNDg4OWIyNWM1YWFiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)] These factors have been researched numerous times in the U.S. and around the world. The studies find the same conclusions. Hungry kids don’t do well in school. Poor performance in the school-habits development phase has a leapfrog effect into middle school, high school, higher learning (if they get there) and employment. Conversely, the poor performance in school leads to impacts on their overall health over their lifetime. Health decision are harder, the less your education and understanding. Lack of education impacts employment and potential health benefits that allow a better access to preventive and continuing care. This is why I believe we must address the two issues, early childhood education and childhood nutrition, together as one problem in need of a solution.
---
| | So I’ve already talked a bit about the nutrition aspect and it’s affect on learning. Now let’s look at the education aspect. Early childhood education, let’s just use the term pre-K, is vital to a child’s future. Once again, this has been studied, extensively. The studies all show that kids who go to pre-K end up doing better in school throughout their educational experience. Early studies conducted in the 1960s and 70s came to this conclusion. They inspired states to begin investing in pre-K programs but people still continued to question the value of the programs regardless of the research demonstrating it works.
Much of the dispute is for two reasons. One, universal pre-K will cost money and where it comes from is the real sticking point. The other objection is reliance on a more recent study conducted in Tennessee, examining their Voluntary pre-K and Head Start programs. The conclusion of this study showed mixed results. They got it wrong. There’s a great review study that was done by the Learning Policy Institute. Guess what they found.

LPI’s [new report](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=gqM6aAx7GwQx-yfI2ogFKQztXVJJaubC8YF1nBR4CcM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sZWFybmluZ3BvbGljeWluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcHJvZHVjdC91bnRhbmdsaW5nLWV2aWRlbmNlLXByZXNjaG9vbC1lZmZlY3RpdmVuZXNzLXJlcG9ydCIsInIiOiI3ZjQ5M2M4Ny1hNGM4LTQ2ZmYtODRkMS1kYTVjZGYzZjZiMjEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) reviews these two studies and others in depth, noting that interpretations of the results often depend on the groups of students being compared. When participants are compared to others who attended similar preschools – or to a more generally advantaged comparison group – there are often not strong differences in their elementary school performance. This does not mean preschool effects “fade out” or that preschool is not effective; it means that the children in both groups benefit similarly. “On the other hand, when participants are compared to very similar students who did not attend preschool, the benefits of participation are found to be substantial. Both preschool and elementary school quality also make a difference for the strength of ongoing effects in terms of achievement, school progress, and attainment."[Source [https://learningpolicyinstitute.org/press-release/what-does-research-really-say-about-preschool-effectiveness](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=z2TZCIvF91Hl3qNwiTDQ2WqSZCrMnMdaTRLmZJbC4L0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sZWFybmluZ3BvbGljeWluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS93aGF0LWRvZXMtcmVzZWFyY2gtcmVhbGx5LXNheS1hYm91dC1wcmVzY2hvb2wtZWZmZWN0aXZlbmVzcyIsInIiOiI3ZjQ5M2M4Ny1hNGM4LTQ2ZmYtODRkMS1kYTVjZGYzZjZiMjEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)] So, understanding that the quality of the school (read budget) and the socio-economic background affects the results only when compared to students from different backgrounds and schools. When compared within the same category of school budget/socio-economics, kids who went through pre-K DID BETTER. Apples to apples folks. Of course this also highlights that there is a disparity, a lack of equity within our education system. All manner of matrixes from standardized test scores (which I do not like) to grades have been used to demonstrate this. What we really need is every public school funded equally without regard to tax base in the district. But that’s a can of worms we’ll open later. Let’s get back to the pre-K kids. So we know, pre-K works. We know nutrition is vital to learning, especially in the earliest years of learning. A big part of all of this is federal and state subsidized breakfast and lunch programs. These are often under threat of budget cuts. For many of the kids in schools, these meals are often the biggest part of their nutritional daily diet. Families depend on the meals for their children. The kids depend on the meals to be able to function in school. “Although programs like the National School Lunch Program and the Summer Food Service Program have been providing meals to income-eligible students for years, research indicates they may not be enough on their own to mitigate the damaging effects of food insecurity on students.”[Source [https://www.aypf.org/blog/food-for-thought-how-food-insecurity-affects-a-childs-education](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=VeChs2UCcdNHQVsLQNdE0dO3q7BjMC0wYnh9WpdXZqs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXlwZi5vcmcvYmxvZy9mb29kLWZvci10aG91Z2h0LWhvdy1mb29kLWluc2VjdXJpdHktYWZmZWN0cy1hLWNoaWxkcy1lZHVjYXRpb24iLCJyIjoiN2Y0OTNjODctYTRjOC00NmZmLTg0ZDEtZGE1Y2RmM2Y2YjIxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)] I’m going to include a quote from a friend of mine but he asked me not to identify him. Suffice it to say this is how many kids have felt over the decades.

”I was one of those kids. The free lunch kids. I needed it because my single mother did everything she could to make sure that we had what we needed and the cost of daily school lunch was just a line to far. I hated it too. I felt stigmatized many days but I did it anyway. When I got into high school and started working, I chose to pay for my own lunch to avoid that feeling of embarrassment. A feeling that shouldn’t have existed simply because my mother didn't make as much money as other parents.” So, into this incredible mix of issues, I’ve just added one more. Welcome to politics Brent!

---
| | How to fix it though? Universal pre-K would require that all public schools offer full enrollment within their district for all eligible children. Big lift. Budgeting, economic effect on child care industry, expansion of school facilities for the rooms needed to accommodate the approximately 5 million children into the program and on top of that finding and hiring qualified, motivated teachers and staff to run it all. There are discussions of a mixed approach between public schools and private facilities that could be certified as pre-K and would receive subsidies to operate. My point being that the approach, budgeting and policy all needs to be worked on and I look forward to doing that work. However, to do it, I have to win this election. I promise you, the Republicans in Congress don’t want anything to do with this. They'd rather defund public education and emphasize private 'for profit' schools. So if you want me to be there, in D.C., working on this and all the other issues we believe in, I need your help.
Here it comes. Yep, I’ve come hat in hand again. We need donations. We need to maintain and expand our voter outreach. We need to keep growing our team and getting our policy messages out to the voters like you. We need to do so much to take our spot in the primary and then win in November next year. Can you help me? A simple donation? A recurring one? Possibly, forward this to a friend who wants what we want?
A country that serves all of its people, fairly and equitably.
Now, I’m going to go eat an apple.
Let’s [#FlipWA03!](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/fbNp89pKa/c?w=sPRilI4zimkQbPRvecHACGyZT2hloWGKZ9PcvANUYXc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9zZWFyY2g_cT0lMjNGTElQV0EwMyZzcmM9dHlwZWRfcXVlcnkiLCJyIjoiNjQ3YTMxYzYtZDllNy00MWRkLTk0YzItNDQzOWIzNzMyOThjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)

We need to do so much to take our spot in the primary and then win in November next year. Can you help me? A simple donation? A recurring one? Possibly, forward this to a friend who wants what we want? A country that serves all of its people, fairly and equitably. Now, I’m going to go eat an apple. body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_t=fuTYsp2CWQDusxbTvdxsiz3ywXfiAombVGzxtBMN78klJbYzKYVhDJadmnM9LFBciCBehWF3mGxuOc5r_sxSWleLo0W6GkhDtEQ2Xjwfu0Ho5bFw-cyA7Y4C7Q17j9pnDBd9a4x7YX49-ws_xP1pR2bb-noe-7hbHkZx76qf8uU%3D) | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRYpoQvVNTs-VETLAMDWW5qL_K8Wuz2QWdcv9ZXWm_ua1sW69a2VCcFUwxkEeo-akwL7MW5qFL-9QwYi2aQKe8NTwUlcpWjefDxWj2q1VPce4_LAS20Qp8eDosdx7fLpilutUmSaFo_BeXKjaaL1zyh1eTFpU0oRx_M_gIivzrPND6rlqL6mQ0bQpuFlGkykV0sDS27L3-kaR5EgaSe5I0fY%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRd8qS-6bWoNoMPjCVEfEyy7bLeDBA72v6VtInh7EaeZYDTG_PNrS1qbv5jlDaa-zVaq5DJQxjGn0i604314gnzxiBRB9IeSkLyZlBVn8hDyh9oaGICWMYIFgLhnG36FKur7jlA_0fgldqbcv6gYLezFnpz7KWRU60Gfjq2pUA9uy5URkW-eKDpRDwfCASTqtrVMZGq6getL8DsAhGvivzSc%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRW9lUTdGixjZVxNPHVa1yjGh516NQhS70yQZ5Tv6DsbNSNMwuH2yUOTr0qZDlSNBiBmeO-9SH3yLRfZYP98qUr5buLhjRT2h4_JDR6u50mH5tcka6LfTQI6rgEQk_nmaRYzULCzCt-r4tR_rg8ut_seDAFbXh7Rap9qbDni4E8wupqwjfkc1GkdDaPhXhnKnx13WlWIOjWlvNVzRBmumtjE%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRYXFPHYUXyVGOEOYcigawMgajOQYwKsCyyH4kbufojlU7vuH7FybIrfdLjto6EiB51y_Fa6-ODN4O6PhCGEnik3dkHRvRzOfK5KP0FdHXJGrEhWBCAzZB9AU_rKs0Ajpif8Whw2faLY_ZRWtLw2lxpRXSZ7LhULW1PTBk0-qRWmSg0SWmpxt8lPgByjDVl9HCr8cR-lMoJyhQR-Df2IbaUI%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRbkpKpPJ0IsVUaTNNS8IYRrNs3kcSfW6srzMEHwIp8MrbwWvB3LTz-72lLLGtkC5-dUnQrv6OO552jKivSNondsK0eyrCa1ikmZRRndOUcNpZ74Civ3pj4wy54JP1uoQt-namp2Z1D0cioNcqIrGm5DNZVLRde3addslcqPoIHAE4NPXYPYIZIhxJjcDcCaKCN8Ac4MQlfE3yJ2ElNxFGDM%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRSJd6ZV56JeTu4o3IzwrR-oW4BKLOb83Jjo01zp0bxHE3RBbziC-mM7yIkjahQeyCenqmbHaZj_SnlAxFXIlLyX2kB-b4Sa1CJbMbg4chUXBpKJFK4A5vG8jjGRnOoWXZtgEg2m_4CwOGWnyDdKQuboYu7Sx6aZZHiqB1c4wpGb7PoZkG7BiZVDhHlB_aXwXo52nezl8px4OmIFvEqIe83o%3D) **

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRaqRbRpoKfTOw2UB47ugJMLsbXeSrHLmHKOv6aOj-i5PF96eJbXgwxn9ErfyzInoq8hzgG-93wzJSY9wnra6336kbwqxAXXYDRj6jTNBHks139jTL8ZbcJPvYRRMqzrrOYehCPy4WdQVBAxGJtiqe20h_0PfoSrMx08AsLbF4zY8J1iin3yd67vMOAu_qHAcaBI82gR26c8Q6mdU6X-uUqU%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRY0bmuJb54uWXapcaXYecsfSqK_q7wJQsXM6Y0inYINyt18xprvkVZeanB3VDirD1ePQyw9Ung0tMvSbmon7HT9EiVVYVy4wThm_RmGhQ--gw0LU2QlfTQqxtWgJA-cZTzoJ3FLAUcP8_DAmzaMkwUejm6NZBXS0o0niPpeFKmP98xKLivifx-w9q_Pgd_dmsCZzDg1Kl8lxg3YMu_MHypU%3D)**.

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRSSj2PIViInGC7DEKqBcAbqHvVXA7ZjWAs3omRQucxmQm_lhBJ4xtOic-IEyOInwV_yhmLn7huVVDucRdVXBeuQDMOqJ6HhH0JXHs-sP25Tkg3CtwpfPIGDKoWSeG9SSnziw_4fqmsvHyNOxFaGQ-xep4bTgqqvK8pq9p3FK_3SuNCAdvxfm7uTso0fPpbwhRB4Umh25SApEoLPU4OtGuTs%3D)
---

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d714cf822ab241e0a339b967aab4c8c5&_e=yXn_yRbR0sm08OF8DjRpbh2qYR0-RUE79m8dKLh-Geb0HnY13qybzCcWokfEBBc7jfRasn1xkNE2D3QmSbIUPwbvCB9UwrAa9AU-wUddkRtemA2j_-Uhugy7VJYc8v1HpMZBe4FKMJS-XzstmC_smH_BU0REooBQbUAFLeVAD1L8f0BGgkSaSphHWhEscVmsdzMF3kNzTLLtEndEdyWVzbcHsQ-nUlwSPNfPdA1s_j-cSakYZf7MqFiJbe_0NpjdZHN-OQOIJQYCrjSxLoyFRWX8Zn6iDrzAQa31cKcBq8RSC_NQZhe46PuyBVM3ofFlX4rEEH6OzkWxygBLh_O7DrIcuVCQXDTKQJcBUJYph_EeIpgvOxiR8XmgMRyT4q0TBq4fdKRD1LVVpHGkX5oZ11kd5xyLGg_agdDHtGp0mBpRD4c5q7liPdhT-x_T_Ou3ZwrdHLrNiR3v7jleJmHcF7Mo-uWGSELkUco7AlPBnsU%3D)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

# We are in this to fight!
#
## I jumped in this race to go to Washington to help Ga-10!

Cost and access to healthcare is a critical issue for many Americans. Too many Georgians live in hospital deserts, and we need an advocate for immediate access to healthcare services.

Healthcare is a human right, not a privilege for some. Everyone needs to have coverage. This coverage should not be tethered to employment. I will advocate for universal healthcare.

To learn more about my platform and support my campaign, click the link below. I am fighting for Georgians and everyday Americans, if you can, please consider a contribution to keep me in this race.

**1 \-- **Republicans need to flip just FIVE seats to take back power for good.
**2 \-- **They've broken SEVEN monthly fundraising records in a row.
**3 \--** And they now have $2 MILLION more in the bank than my House Democrats.

Please understand: **That kind of advantage could spell defeat for our House Majority if we don 't respond in a BIG way.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: today is a big day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We wouldn’t usually be so worried about this, but we are facing two big problems
#
Peter,
First and foremost, thank you. I know you’ve received a number of fundraising emails this week, and I appreciate you opening this one. Today is a big day.
What most people don’t know about our campaign is that most of the donations we receive come from people like you, chipping in what you can when you can. And that most of those donations come in response to emails like this one.
So with just a few days to go before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close, I am humbly asking:
**[Can you please split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Dick Durbin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38050765/313754851/-1343684746?refcode=dd_em_211028_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJkMTc4ZS00ZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLNOXIdFgND-19B1k1CR2cnLCEsO_WrOnS1zJVV9LHI=)**
This deadline is not just about how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive to make up that number. That’s how we power this campaign.
I know I’ve already said it, but thank you in advance for chipping in.
Mark Kelly

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38050766/313754852/-1343684746?refcode=dd_em_211028_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjJkMTc4ZS00ZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLNOXIdFgND-19B1k1CR2cnLCEsO_WrOnS1zJVV9LHI=)**

clean_body: We wouldn’t usually be so worried about this, but we are facing two big problems Peter, First and foremost, thank you. I know you’ve received a number of fundraising emails this week, and I appreciate you opening this one. Today is a big day. What most people don’t know about our campaign is that most of the donations we receive come from people like you, chipping in what you can when you can. And that most of those donations come in response to emails like this one. So with just a few days to go before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close, I am humbly asking: = This deadline is not just about how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive to make up that number. That’s how we power this campaign. I know I’ve already said it, but thank you in advance for chipping in. Mark Kelly = * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:
We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership – including President Trump – We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|

Fellow American,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=651571ee89e546aa9b7c8c5933cd0d86&_e=GP29drYEN2o7hmuo8d3rJXYTYS3CeRQkhXcC8jxiAlIzVnjVE4ffQUY2g36fJVj-AHS5aY8v9GaQ4a2Gb603KDtGHqROqSGHB3o6Q7-CEOeO12zwoP-PW2BoIzWqNxrVnpZmF5hXZLoSeYqoHuY2H9h9OaxoSawdBvLuCQIXn8Qma3hcMdhhguLQtMlEFm3pgckLxIHPir_hqoKEaONzCdKIjU6b19dZpQl5J_ewe97CtC_K4FU8cGj-FTZ8lmobJS-Kt0zEx4iwnw2mvfVUOKHNNe0Xzsi0O6jfHsvaGJlRC4jeXJRPulr8mOliN_QInNrpWmnfmff-NrGlJRyLPhj1mSCFcl2SUHmgQSrW2T4nHkUMvumCbRfWYCqtPR6k4CwVpPI45v-ixolMm5w-vNTi-eXiVj6b5X01pz0ggXnYgpH_ulNDFfidByJspaRGpr4NGkqUVyXKBPFWXsQNvwhSaV0SjweO9p0fItaON1PCvlJtz9VO7an23x-FFAU9kOO35J4NXRpr-P8w8vjWkQ%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,578 votes short. **

Fellow American, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=651571ee89e546aa9b7c8c5933cd0d86&_e=GP29drYEN2o7hmuo8d3rJXYTYS3CeRQkhXcC8jxiAlIzVnjVE4ffQUY2g36fJVj-AHS5aY8v9GaQ4a2Gb603KDtGHqROqSGHB3o6Q7-CEOeO12zwoP-PW2BoIzWqNxrVnpZmF5hXZLoSeYqoHuY2H9h9OaxoSawdBvLuCQIXn8Qma3hcMdhhguLQtMlEFm3pgckLxIHPir_hqoKEaONzCdKIjU6b19dZpQl5J_ewe97CtC_K4FU8cGj-FTZ8lmobJS-Kt0zEx4iwnw2mvfVUOKHNNe0Xzsi0O6jfHsvaGJlRC4jeXJRPulr8mOliN_QIelstKjy-CAii_lRHjFnH3bxOop_OueykADOdklhYJAKKBpKXcjCN7vzkQ4esETlkqNR0KMfedVI72EsqHQFitAhubf-xE1XI9emICDFNr7l57qi2-2pJ7X5zjAiRNWKy0amqDH1wKUpjh0Vy6ovUIwezIoNprvmdHRiPQBlG-sAUDX4IpKfpT3eyzp8g5LrwjcigMgLD6qg3wqFJWPDI-g%3D%3D)**

You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=651571ee89e546aa9b7c8c5933cd0d86&_e=GP29drYEN2o7hmuo8d3rJXYTYS3CeRQkhXcC8jxiAlIzVnjVE4ffQUY2g36fJVj-AHS5aY8v9GaQ4a2Gb603KDtGHqROqSGHB3o6Q7-CEOeO12zwoP-PW2BoIzWqNxrVnpZmF5hXZLoSeYqoHuY2H9h9OaxoSawdBvLuCQIXn8Qma3hcMdhhguLQtMlEFm3pgckLxIHPir_hqoKEaONzCdKIjU6b19dZpQl5J_ewe97CtC_K4FU8cGj-FTZ8lmobJS-Kt0zEx4iwnw2mvfVUOKHNNe0Xzsi0O6jfHsvaGJlRC4jeXJRPulr8mOliN_QIakz8NimqoCftvBM9lO_8v2ML6hbBIZy7iYKPyrADzvuYrEJ8hF2sLVT4OgiaI22YkA4_VRqN9FpKzyWruP_4mmTVqTncDd7nPJUlX9sPrOo_e5eun3IieVDu2o8FmdWPsJfvHNeiTlP6BQex7wQgn4s-us4cabCblVKq4JhQrx00elHyUA6RhxyZaqsZD9ByDmhj1cT_usJ598nFfBPxOw%3D%3D)**

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=651571ee89e546aa9b7c8c5933cd0d86&_e=GP29drYEN2o7hmuo8d3rJXYTYS3CeRQkhXcC8jxiAlIzVnjVE4ffQUY2g36fJVj-AHS5aY8v9GaQ4a2Gb603KDtGHqROqSGHB3o6Q7-CEOeO12zwoP-PW2BoIzWqNxrVnpZmF5hXZLoSeYqoHuY2H9h9OaxoSawdBvLuCQIXn8Qma3hcMdhhguLQtMlEFm3pgckLxIHPir_hqoKEaONzCdKIjU6b19dZpQl5J_ewe97CtC_K4FU8cGj-FTZ8lmobJS-Kt0zEx4iwnw2mvfVUOKHNNe0Xzsi0O6jfHsvaGJlRC4jeXJRPulr8mOliN_QINcfuZ9ZlFG9lkebT4qJBxj5LZs6LttCGo6lEi0GZ2xhvFfP9bbz2HM_R2jjZhOwPPUkJq5tMFlgu-d7IcSvqLmkyDrGBXQYJPHqABIXyZcitaQ8Btk9IM2FRd0XUskrHNLiiVLNaWXsserOAR4jMGNTZHo9ShxOOk31xkdlEamXBLZr_pZCB4U6ScfxRukXyvlk8TPdaQK-mnaIu_cx4lA%3D%3D)

Friends, we’re teaming up.

Pennsylvania’s 7th and 8th districts are both at the TOP of the GOP hit list. The House Republican campaign arm has already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking us, and we don’t anticipate this will slow down any time soon.

We have to keep Pennsylvania blue so we can take action on the things that really matter to our state — passing critical pro-worker policies like tax cuts for families with children, manufacturing jobs training initiatives, and infrastructure investments.

[_**Will you make a split donation to both our campaigns to keep Pennsylvania, and the House, blue? clean_body: The GOP would do anything to flip our seats so they can take back the House. | = Friends, we’re teaming up. Pennsylvania’s 7th and 8th districts are both at the TOP of the GOP hit list. The House Republican campaign arm has already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking us, and we don’t anticipate this will slow down any time soon. We have to keep Pennsylvania blue so we can take action on the things that really matter to our state — passing critical pro-worker policies like tax cuts for families with children, manufacturing jobs training initiatives, and infrastructure investments. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = We each have critical end-of-month deadlines coming up on the 31st, and without a strong grassroots network of donors, we’ll be overwhelmed by the amount of dark money flowing into our districts. Make no mistake, Peter, the GOP would do anything to flip our seats so they can take back the House and take control of this crucial swing state. = Thanks so much, Reps. | | It’s official, Derek: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race.

Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. [**_He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle gets to Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you rush a donation right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38051092/313764473/-2023814932?refcode=20211028.13_MT_10IMT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzE5MWY3YS01MTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8OzoIg-7eL418oHC3o76Zx9zAeW8__UpObJ3pBvL3k=)

Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him six times.

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. **Donald Trump is _all in_ for Youngkin.**

We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power.

clean_body: He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected | | | = | | It’s official, Derek: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. = Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him six times. And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for Youngkin. We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m not kidding when I say that this is the most important election this year. I’ve been going a mile a minute every day for the last six months and I’ve got to tell you that while the process is absolutely exhausting, there is nFor six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_t=vS-tV9A9KnIbzQEVWlc6Qso8lRULWB_SG0nzdE31HHLOldhg_kqij1ljLSKysfUbcMUy89n38iWh1yMVFG--cAjmBvOU4fD5Gk8BwPnHVP6Fsz45c8cCjnWgfuz0Lun0bluUp3SR9tmu0W0Y8p5gRLGjKIsngXUCDO188cPcyGM%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_e=j04spMkTktmemdNFhvzmmzPTBvDoIESy83kWVRTdU85_uzem8t6lPsjLx-6WNdXLa2m2aLaiqMsB2OseR1rucKJBhPfdIIwajj1r-32CEys4gYtRTDnbd-K0HaxU-nHnuVhOaNnmRry6CKTXfNisD_kwHyorceXd-xdPiMtgKWjVPpiOzz69WkGI8taYVYzKzjelEhL0iUXT0T5aURCfpDp_hJCw3FCWVf5CvX0MQf15L00ZGhgNfz4QKFn4Jpfm66q18882PUK4x6vH4gcaVxCappEpj5teVdamWpxvZhpqeBzbFJPYidpxV2740fOX9lfQwcRW8KnPtfyPycPQaKswYbtDPiEoU9dCcQvsfHbfar3nZ1VfVUSBdTvaFIDMR4Xc6kaKdvTB3vNtw9c2HKSGJyDXKEDOPCsqpkWNkXYAHLpH4fDbwbnXIsvpXRrxs4mW0X2xjdT9QfREP6t5ew%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Recently I had the pleasure of shooting my first TV advertisement – and let me tell you, it was insightful.

Before launching my bid for Congress, I honestly didn’t know how much work political candidates are required to put into their campaigns on a daily basis.

I’ve been going a mile a minute every day for the last six months and I’ve got to tell you that while the process is absolutely exhausting, there is nothing else I’d rather be doing – **well, of course spending more time with my newborn son wouldn’t be a terrible thing**.

**[Can I call on you to take 30 seconds out of your day right now to watch my TV ad?](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_e=j04spMkTktmemdNFhvzmmzPTBvDoIESy83kWVRTdU85_uzem8t6lPsjLx-6WNdXLa2m2aLaiqMsB2OseR1rucKJBhPfdIIwajj1r-32CEys4gYtRTDnbd-K0HaxU-nHnuVhOaNnmRry6CKTXfNisD_kwHyorceXd-xdPiMtgKWjVPpiOzz69WkGI8taYVYzKzjelEhL0iUXT0T5aURCfpDp_hJCw3FCWVf5CvX0MQf15L00ZGhgNfz4QKFn4Jpfm-KtvlZd-Jm0uFSH6QP1Aec43z5VuGRth7-tiBhqA2f8dfK00G_56BEBLo3UAvyNHcB6GGiZ8Y7qUGQQmbx2UsaF-UEXJq6zY3Vgrx_yZ2-QHRVCHn30ChdSWJ_rJlvh6yiA5QIQYR76Pf-9q1_4TuZjbaTOxPp0O5jrIyxnUlIoA_APNl8Ny9ttohCziK22PA-lREae12j_hL-q22cQMoA%3D%3D)** If you’re not a voter in my district chances are you’d never see it on air outside of this email of course, but I value your opinion all the same.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_e=j04spMkTktmemdNFhvzmmzPTBvDoIESy83kWVRTdU85_uzem8t6lPsjLx-6WNdXLa2m2aLaiqMsB2OseR1rucKJBhPfdIIwajj1r-32CEys4gYtRTDnbd-K0HaxU-nHnuVhOaNnmRry6CKTXfNisD_kwHyorceXd-xdPiMtgKWjVPpiOzz69WkGI8taYVYzKzjelEhL0iUXT0T5aURCfpDp_hJCw3FCWVf5CvX0MQf15L00ZGhgNfz4QKFn4JpfmzwmvG4tYNbApYaODfbgKzODP0w9xbusw2rwbQ1LLVrwC3mkJXcpijw84EBPCgliJ2XdjhlUihYymL2Y1ZDmNOHyLgb0ujuteJpQ8zVO3O6PcW9iaekip-mSZXS06kLOv3Kp9MVLK46JcMikm1vi2jTZLV6WZnAfDdbLIeuJWVJpB2N1nHG0VOfB231ehxtPOUgnBalYcVStlwPLXkFEvxg%3D%3D)
| [**WATCH and chip in $7 to help me get this ad on TV** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_e=j04spMkTktmemdNFhvzmmzPTBvDoIESy83kWVRTdU85_uzem8t6lPsjLx-6WNdXLa2m2aLaiqMsB2OseR1rucKJBhPfdIIwajj1r-32CEys4gYtRTDnbd-K0HaxU-nHnuVhOaNnmRry6CKTXfNisD_kwHyorceXd-xdPiMtgKWjVPpiOzz69WkGI8taYVYzKzjelEhL0iUXT0T5aURCfpDp_hJCw3FCWVf5CvX0MQf15L00ZGhgNfz4QKFn4JpfmpLt0mq-elVLlDVoKmETmMMPd1LYSjIEtbUnKkyRCLz1TMJAuB8ww230woFrUwNjqtEEfVQexlJaB7_r6zRp45639QtiiCq0W_htxfM4Gs_uG7B06K9Z26RCUceAfT-tsGp0dlyhEw801eEM-lyCJyt3tWU0HhDw_l21rwguKZwZ42maAQtWyzvCITL55Ql3QvzHEy0Tx6iY5MtLvfXB3Tg%3D%3D)
---

**What is important is that every voter in my Virginia district sees this spot before the Republican convention next year. I’ve been running for Congress for six months but hardly anyone who can vote in my race knows who I am!**

We need leaders in Congress who are calm under fire. I’ve proven time and again that I can keep my composure even in the most difficult situations.

We need more veterans in Congress. We need people who still believe in the prospect of passing on the American Dream to future generations.

Simply put, we need more folks in Congress who actually are proud Americans.

**[Send a couple of dollars my way to keep this ad running if you’re able. I’d be so grateful](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8b2a23805b1e447da35402817c279be8&_e=j04spMkTktmemdNFhvzmmzPTBvDoIESy83kWVRTdU85_uzem8t6lPsjLx-6WNdXLa2m2aLaiqMsB2OseR1rucKJBhPfdIIwajj1r-32CEys4gYtRTDnbd-K0HaxU-nHnuVhOaNnmRry6CKTXfNisD_kwHyorceXd-xdPiMtgKWjVPpiOzz69WkGI8taYVYzKzjelEhL0iUXT0T5aURCfpDp_hJCw3FCWVf5CvX0MQf15L00ZGhgNfz4QKFn4JpfmqUfwHLfEj9HEoO4tWE2yUc04oiL2orRrLfpubjcVwz1afYZpm2f-cm6olUj893soumvECtnhhIAZgeadDOpxvnifpnee_pZH24yaNbeAqAJO8MzB4zgb2mEuEzd9Ktrxs7GA210B0Zwzc3l3ruV_SCm6Sy_29AzW6CkgStJNQyFWWASGHrO9kGkRu8H8_nv3DKw9EjGB-VxSkA977KGnlw%3D%3D)**.

Thank you

John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07
| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
P.O. BOX 390
ORANGE, VA 22960

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: I've Seen the Border. Soto Hasn't!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elect me. Close the border! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2f72d5c826&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

This week, I did a thing- a thing Joe Biden hasn't.

I went to our Southern Border to see the humanitarian catastrophe first hand. And I have some stories to tell you.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cc4f70c3f7&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who is a Biden sycophant!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aae0e0df8a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I visited Del Rio, TX, where the migrants were under the bridge a couple weeks ago- over 20,000 of them.

Well, I have visited the Southern border exactly “1” more time THAN “President of the United States” Joe Biden, or his sycophant incumbent Congressman Darren Soto has! What a disgrace!

It’s over 1300 miles from Orlando to Del Rio. The President travels in the lap of luxury on Air Force One. I traveled in my Ford Escape Hybrid with my wife as my copilot!👍🏻

ON MY OWN DIME!

_**Unfortunately, because Joe Biden, with the enthusiastic agreement of congressman Darren Soto, has dismantled President Trump’s border plan, many of the 20,000 are now walking the streets across America- untested and unvaccinated.**_

NBC News also reports that, because the incompetent Biden regime rolled out the welcome mat for these unvaccinated, untested illegals, that even MORE are now on their way!

_U.S. officials are tracking large groups of Haitians in Latin America, including more than 20,000 in Colombia, who like the thousands now massed on the Texas border may soon try to reach the U.S., according to an internal document obtained by NBC News.

In addition to the 20,000 Haitians gathered in northern Colombia, DHS is also monitoring groups of about 1,500 in Panama and 3,000 in Peru, the document said. A senior DHS official said it remains to be seen when and whether those migrants will come to the U.S., but they have begun “staging” in the various countries, potentially signaling they are planning to travel in large numbers._

_Biden has screwed this up SO bad. Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by this psycho this year._

**The only explanation I can come up with, is that he hates America. No one who loves America would try to destroy it like this. **
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5b06992bc1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2a6dadddfa&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden is a mess. He's being forced now to reinstitute Trump's successful border policies!_

_“When the Supreme Court effectively revived a cornerstone of Trump-era migration policy late last month, it looked like a major defeat for President Biden,” The New York Times reported, referencing the Trump administration’s Remain in Mexico policy. “But among some Biden officials, the Supreme Court’s order was quietly greeted with something other than dismay, current and former officials said: It brought some measure of relief.”

The report noted that Biden’s steps to loosen “the reins on migration” was “quickly followed by a surge of people heading north, overwhelming the southwest border of the United States.” Every month, the number of illegal aliens apprehended at the border under Biden has increased to a higher number than the month before.

“In fact, some Biden officials were already talking about reviving Mr. Trump’s policy in a limited way to deter migration, said the officials, who have worked on immigration policy but were not authorized to speak publicly about the administration’s internal debates on the issue,” the report added. “Then the Supreme Court order came, providing the Biden administration with the political cover to adopt the policy in some form without provoking as much ire from Democrats who reviled Mr. Trump’s border policies.”_

**Biden may be forced to revert to Trump's policies, but he's doing an AWFUL job.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and bring back President Trump?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2f29340404&e=afa21b7626)

[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=79f9da73ef&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his Yes Men in Congress- like Darren Soto. They are anti-American and they gotta go!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=44fcafa5fc&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cf4120d07a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b3e83d23e5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Well, I have visited the Southern border exactly “1” more time THAN “President of the United States” Joe Biden, or his sycophant incumbent Congressman Darren Soto has! What a disgrace! It’s over 1300 miles from Orlando to Del Rio. The President travels in the lap of luxury on Air Force One. I traveled in my Ford Escape Hybrid with my wife as my copilot!👍🏻 ON MY OWN DIME! Unfortunately, because Joe Biden, with the enthusiastic agreement of congressman Darren Soto, has dismantled President Trump’s border plan, many of the 20,000 are now walking the streets across America- untested and unvaccinated. NBC News also reports that, because the incompetent Biden regime rolled out the welcome mat for these unvaccinated, untested illegals, that even MORE are now on their way! U.S. officials are tracking large groups of Haitians in Latin America, including more than 20,000 in Colombia, who like the thousands now massed on the Texas border may soon try to reach the U.S., according to an internal document obtained by NBC News. In addition to the 20,000 Haitians gathered in northern Colombia, DHS is also monitoring groups of about 1,500 in Panama and 3,000 in Peru, the document said. A senior DHS official said it remains to be seen when and whether those migrants will come to the U.S., but they have begun “staging” in the various countries, potentially signaling they are planning to travel in large numbers. Biden has screwed this up SO bad. Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by this psycho this year. The only explanation I can come up with, is that he hates America. No one who loves America would try to destroy it like this. | | | Biden is a mess. He's being forced now to reinstitute Trump's successful border policies! “When the Supreme Court effectively revived a cornerstone of Trump-era migration policy late last month, it looked like a major defeat for President Biden,” The New York Times reported, referencing the Trump administration’s Remain in Mexico policy. “But among some Biden officials, the Supreme Court’s order was quietly greeted with something other than dismay, current and former officials said: It brought some measure of relief.” The report noted that Biden’s steps to loosen “the reins on migration” was “quickly followed by a surge of people heading north, overwhelming the southwest border of the United States.” Every month, the number of illegal aliens apprehended at the border under Biden has increased to a higher number than the month before. “In fact, some Biden officials were already talking about reviving Mr. Trump’s policy in a limited way to deter migration, said the officials, who have worked on immigration policy but were not authorized to speak publicly about the administration’s internal debates on the issue,” the report added. “Then the Supreme Court order came, providing the Biden administration with the political cover to adopt the policy in some form without provoking as much ire from Democrats who reviled Mr. Trump’s border policies.” Biden may be forced to revert to Trump's policies, but he's doing an AWFUL job. I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and bring back President Trump? I will stand up for America against Biden and his Yes Men in Congress- like Darren Soto. They are anti-American and they gotta go! Help me bring America First policies to Congress! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's 2024 comeback plan is working. Perfectly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, This is a long email about the future of American Democracy. And it's important. It's absolutely crucial. A quick recap of Donald J. Trump's activities in 2021: On January 6, 2021, Donald J. Trump encouraged an angry mob of Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol. Then, he waited hours before authorizing the National Guard, buying the Proud Boys extra time. Trump has silenced the rare Republican who has tried \-- and failed \-- to stand up to him. Trump's hand-picked 2022 Senate candidates are raising millions. Like Hershel Walker running against Raphael Warnock in Georgia. Trump himself has already raised over $100 million for himself in less than a year. In short: Trump's comeback plan is working. It's working perfectly. "Biden's job performance rating is sinking like the Titanic," Trump now says. "According to the Washington Examiner, it's down to 36% - how embarrassing," Trump says. "However, this should come as no surprise to ANYONE (except maybe Joe Biden), considering the abysmal job he's done as President." Q: Is Trump planning to run again in 2024? A: Yes. In fact, Donald Trump has _already_ begun his campaign for President in 2024. (_The Washington Post_ reports: "Trump, talked out of announcing a 2024 bid for now, settles on a wink-and-nod unofficial candidacy.") And Donald J. Trump could win again in 2024. And Donald J. Trump could win again in 2024! DONALD. J. TRUMP. COULD. WIN. AGAIN. IN. 2024. In 2015, Donald Trump descended an elevator, called immigrants rapists (and very fine people), and then went on to defeat 16 other Republicans in the primary. And then he went on to defeat Hillary Clinton in the general election. As President, Donald J. Trump called white supremacists “very fine people.” He separated immigrant children from their families and put them in cages. He tear-gassed human beings for a photo op. He suggested injecting bleach to cure coronavirus. And he went on to _very nearly_ win reelection on Tuesday, November 3, 2020. In 2020, Joe Biden won Arizona's 11 electoral college votes by just 0.4%. In 2020, Joe Biden won Pennsylvania's 20 electoral college votes by just 1.2%. In 2020, Joe Biden won Wisconsin's 10 electoral college votes by just 0.6%. And in 2020, Joe Biden won Georgia's 16 electoral college votes by just 0.3%. Please, we know that imagining Donald Trump as president today is a very painful experience. But it's important, because Donald J. Trump knows he very nearly won in 2020. (And he's not the kind of guy who is going to let that kind of thing go...) Had just a few more Democrats stayed home (or failed to vote by mail), then Donald Trump would be president today. Had Donald Trump successfully _suppressed_ just a few more Democratic votes in 2020, then Donald Trump would be president today. A few more votes that just didn't arrive by mail, and Donald J. Trump is president today. (Trump mega-bundler Louis DeJoy did his very best to mess up the United States Postal Service in 2020. STILL somehow Postmaster General, he's continued to dismantle the Post Office.) There are many _many_ scenarios where Trump could have defeated Joe Biden in 2020. (For example, had Trump successfully suppressed just 42,921 more Democratic votes in Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, he would have tied Joe Biden in the Electoral College _even if_ Joe Biden still captured Pennsylvania. And despite the Democrats' slim House majority, when the Electoral College is tied each state's delegation gets a single vote to decide who's won the presidency. So California (42 Dems, 11 GOP) gets a single vote. Alaska, Wyoming, Montana, North Dakota, South Dakota each get a single vote, with just one GOP House member in each state's delegation. Spoiler: Trump wins.) Peter: Donald Trump is running for President again in 2024. And this time, he's not leaving anything to chance. “As of late September, 19 states had enacted 33 laws that will make it harder for their citizens to vote,” ex-Republican David Brock writes in _The New York Times_ , admitting he grossly underestimated the evil of Donald Trump. And the Senate GOP \-- led by Mitch McConnell \-- just filibustered the Freedom to Vote Act for the THIRD TIME this year, even though all 50 Democrats supported bringing the bill to a vote on the Senate Floor. That means millions of voters are still vulnerable to Trump's voter suppression scheme. Trump's plan is working. Perfectly. And _you_ will stop him. You stepped up after 2016 in a way we thought would be unimaginable the night of November 8, 2016. You spoke out. You marched. You knocked on doors. You donated. And Democrats voted even though 2018 was an off-year. And Democrats won. Democrats took back the House in 2018 because we all stepped up together. And then Democrats voted again in 2020, even though there was a global pandemic. And Democrats won. Democrats defeated Donald Trump and took back the Senate with the election of Senator Warnock and Senator Ossoff, both from Georgia. Because we all stepped up together. When Democrats Turn Out, Democrats Win. With only a year until November 2022, when Donald Trump tries to suppress the Democratic vote, we cannot let him succeed. We _cannot_ let Donald J. Trump succeed. We _will_ not let Donald J. Trump succeed. Now is the time to defy history and _expand_ our House Majority in 2022 by empowering a new generation of leaders who demand progress for America. That's what being a Democrat is all about: Democrats look back at the ugliness of the past and say: Let's make the future of America better than it's been before. And then we get to work. Let's get to work re-electing Raphael Warnock and defeating Trump's hand-picked challenger Hershel Walker. Let's get to work protecting endangered Senators like Maggie Hassan (who won by just 1,017 votes in 2016, her last election). And when Democrats Turn Out in 2022, we will replace GOP Senators with progressive Democrats in Wisconsin, in Pennsylvania, in Florida, and in North Carolina, giving Democrats a 54 seat majority in the Senate. We'll then repeal the Filibuster, give Puerto Rico and Washington DC statehood, and expel Mitch McConnell from the Senate. We'll do it together. Democrats can. And Democrats must. We cannot thank you enough for your commitment to taking America back from the evils of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the rank-and-file members of the GOP who sit by and let it happen, even though they know in their hearts that it's wrong. It's impossible to express the gratitude with which we have to thank you for all you've done and all you'll continue to do to save our country from Donald Trump and the evils of the Republican Party. Thank you. THANK YOU. THANK YOU!! THANK YOU 1,000 times over. \- When Democrats Turn Out | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38051209/313768760/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211028_GEN_FDR_K&refcode2=NG211029&refcode3=ASC1o4dSXGlZ4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1NzM5NThmLTUzMzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wPQppyBou2wkXQEHPut2SrnB1G42rVEjJPWVuC81eJo=)**

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi3Dk90mMX4VItuKzyF2olBBv4quFYS6fL5IiaIyHOf8HMT7reyvqnbZfGs1OtOOkwt3xgw-zG4aGg-OW_ZOUyquPHkwHkt_7AGSXf88N8oYZrI1I_AwUeuJ4ZiYj3PYcBT4oi88wjrl-NrZcyV4N5AwUx2y-KB-JAthSpzGqM1g4c9mUwXBWW6tKqmwzOlQ5eZEH9SvlPuPxl17Uo5iuIAqaVk_gi-erlvlTmIwPnjDvshJjtDL0pvmH6tS-HpixkA89GQcN7-9q3WvUc2l6Te3lV5R-WaUuzLM545_c6bs9CD6lucq8GxrpXllBxvvEaDO17losfATurz6OBXhGyFw/3gj/-Gh4v9ppQ5eUrCrnsZX00Q/h0/gUdxbk3PVojzqhtxJSZSX56LdHhmVX3VQkOfYGeetQk)
Derek,

Trump is already planning his return to power, and his plan begins in Virginia.

In Virginia, Democrat Terry McAullife is running for Governor against a Republican candidate who’s been endorsed SIX TIMES by Donald Trump.

This is 2021’s most important race.

Last year, we worked hard to defeat Donald Trump and his allies.

In Georgia, we turned out in record numbers to elect Joe Biden and win two historic Senate runoffs.

And in Virginia, voters rebuked Donald Trump by a double-digit margin.

Now, all of that work is threatened.

If Trump can get his guy elected in Virginia this year... let’s just say we can’t let that happen.

**[So right now, I’m humbly asking you to make a contribution to stop Donald Trump’s return to power. clean_body: | | | Derek, Trump is already planning his return to power, and his plan begins in Virginia. In Virginia, Democrat Terry McAullife is running for Governor against a Republican candidate who’s been endorsed SIX TIMES by Donald Trump. This is 2021’s most important race. Last year, we worked hard to defeat Donald Trump and his allies. In Georgia, we turned out in record numbers to elect Joe Biden and win two historic Senate runoffs. And in Virginia, voters rebuked Donald Trump by a double-digit margin. Now, all of that work is threatened. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Are you willing to give your life for American freedom? I am
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99e2f8a1c636470590416930993bde4e&_e=UTSD6k5hJxYwNxHAIaLZp8bIP_b3vGNJdzqX8qYI8Sl-Uk6kSoj2p_bIIfARhgTaSV9_ThmdToazSYkKnlKtNwLIct-rkj-P2TYaSllOTDON0lihM8Ad_utIeH_EYFHAEz1K5Y2cmpub5SeIc5SkLqhabsZ18s6WxLMVZXrHSmJFnEgl4_7K1DBK8Vgzh6ofDwpU_eJiUY-J8eCvkokFn9jay25_VQq0ECvZNi6Y8mdTlzN3Bftb3xs9wl1hVyXythYqL_CmUfIPx-HNzXJ29AHyRIkN25BTeyJqR8Iik9LBge7syjGh9rxwLIiGpeZpnXmN-1LIuK_SNDX-flhiIxOfxL11uZU0OVBLvZJW7uGjL68lfcS445a88Rf7Xh8_O-UN_NkYQeUst8ax6E-JDM1tjryAWKjhi6L6dm5OBzMYjXCDY9Wz4T3ybyVDcixT2aqx7_nA0u1pCUeTxv7qHQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99e2f8a1c636470590416930993bde4e&_e=UTSD6k5hJxYwNxHAIaLZp8bIP_b3vGNJdzqX8qYI8Sl-Uk6kSoj2p_bIIfARhgTaSV9_ThmdToazSYkKnlKtNwLIct-rkj-P2TYaSllOTDON0lihM8Ad_utIeH_EYFHAEz1K5Y2cmpub5SeIc5SkLqhabsZ18s6WxLMVZXrHSmJFnEgl4_7K1DBK8Vgzh6ofDwpU_eJiUY-J8eCvkokFn9jay25_VQq0ECvZNi6Y8mdTlzN3Bftb3xs9wl1hVyXy5M7Y60fqfJiom_q8BV81YCz23L-4kQfYZI6Z5xwtfF3xig10esEoeSMohH486xHtCk10RNLp_5bLJZH-QZCCJHFL5G4PpR7tSbpfTQCQ6jqULuY9AS2oPTXovfzpYKp9McrcOQvPJ5UPvuuDAl0363zyYtVZo7BV_NQD8YEL2qPCfgCzPFUlX5n3JiggdsxIR9NNWzmybhraKNnCfIlHkQ%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99e2f8a1c636470590416930993bde4e&_e=UTSD6k5hJxYwNxHAIaLZp8bIP_b3vGNJdzqX8qYI8Sl-Uk6kSoj2p_bIIfARhgTaSV9_ThmdToazSYkKnlKtNwLIct-rkj-P2TYaSllOTDON0lihM8Ad_utIeH_EYFHAEz1K5Y2cmpub5SeIc5SkLqhabsZ18s6WxLMVZXrHSmJFnEgl4_7K1DBK8Vgzh6ofDwpU_eJiUY-J8eCvkokFn9jay25_VQq0ECvZNi6Y8mdTlzN3Bftb3xs9wl1hVyXyZD0AhpzZm9AuOPhGRaMl2Li2tZRPi1bBnmZyYSFX1ckB9cJmdk2ki1RhpUNfCI8QADGEgDrzrWCNlNIDV-uB5zGFXZWqo8lSFUC832nWFBMbqfzZx8hjWHKgFwEZYkxdiWhXWDZIB40eHkivl5CkLvjrdgSIcR2qCUiJBCPt1m8LBcHnLlo--r9MUkvc4HR-8Tmd7rNTvHSZ_ZuQotPymg%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: [TAKE ACTION TODAY] Tell House progressives to hold the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
No climate, no deal.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3944?t=3&akid=12895%2E53494%2ESrcySD) Friend, This morning, President Biden released his new Build Back Better framework. **If passed, it would be the largest climate investment in American history.** Read that again: If passed, it would be the largest climate investment in American history. But for now, that's still a big "if." And right now, it's up to the House to keep it alive. House progressives must continue to hold the line against voting on the bipartisan infrastructure bill until _both bills_ are ready to pass the Senate and move to Biden's desk. Say it with me now: **No climate, no deal.** Today is a turning point in this debate, and we need to demonstrate that we're still 100% committed to passing both bills together. [**_Sign your name to support House progressives in withholding their support from the bipartisan infrastructure bill until BOTH bills are ready to move toward the president's desk. (After you add your name, we'll give you a chance to call your representative in the House directly to tell them you've got their back!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3944?t=4&akid=12895%2E53494%2ESrcySD) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3944?t=5&akid=12895%2E53494%2ESrcySD)
---
Here's what we're fighting for: Biden's new framework would be transformative and includes $555 billion for clean energy tax credits, environmental justice investments, a Clean Energy Accelerator, and a Civilian Climate Corps. In short, things you and I and the whole climate movement have been fighting for since day one.
This is good news from the White House—and it's coming just in time.
In a few days, Biden will travel to Glasgow to attempt to restore American credibility in the global fight against climate change. Armed with this framework—and leaders in the House who will continue to push for the two bills together—he could truthfully say the U.S. is ready for global climate leadership after four years of climate denial under Trump.
But anything short of an ironclad deal won't cut it, and we need to make that clear to our representatives.
[**_Will you sign on today to double down on our push to pass both bills together? House progressives proved they have the power to make this happen, and we need them to hold the line and stay strong until both bills are ready to be signed into law. (And after you sign on, give your rep a call! We even provide a quick and easy script if you have a minute.)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3944?t=6&akid=12895%2E53494%2ESrcySD)
The work continues,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3944?t=7&akid=12895%2E53494%2ESrcySD)
---

body:

| | Dear Friend,
**The Biden administration is nowhere to be found.** In the midst of a supply chain crisis, Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg’s office notified the media that he has been absent from Washington for the past two months! **And meanwhile, instead of getting to work fixing the problem, President Biden is obsessed with passing yet another massive spending bill that won’t help our economy but WILL add billions to our debt!** ****

name: Support Phil Murphy (via Team Nikki)
subject: Disastrous
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

It's New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy's team. Our election is next week, and both Team Nikki Fried and Team Phil Murphy know this is critical.

It’s clear that GOP candidate Jack Ciattarelli’s campaign strategy of spreading misinformation, anti-vaccine rhetoric, and conspiracy theories is having an impact. Over the past three-plus years, Governor Murphy has kept the Garden State moving forward despite countless challenges and an unprecedented pandemic.

So far in this race for Governor, we've been outspent — to the tune of $3 million.

And on top of that, the New Jersey Globe reports that our Republican opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, has now outraised us in each of the last four weeks.

That’s why we’re asking you to chip in right now to support our campaign. With just a few days until Election Day, it’s absolutely crucial we have the resources to go toe-to-toe with Ciattarelli — and win . Click here to split a contribution between Phil Murphy and Nikki Fried today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-murphy4gov-split]

Ciattarelli and his Republican allies are all over the airwaves. If they’re able to reach New Jersey voters and tip the scales in their favor, the consequences could be disastrous.

We can’t let Ciattarelli undo the progress we’ve made under Governor Murphy’s leadership. But to prevent that from happening, we need the resources to spread Governor Murphy’s message to as many voters as possible in these final weeks of the race.

Please, click here to split a contribution. Your support couldn’t be more critical than it is right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-murphy4gov-split]

Thank you for your support.

—Team Murphy

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

clean_body: Peter, Alabama’s farmers are the heart of our state. They make up 20% of our workforce and are the backbone of our economy and our largest industry. Right now, Katie’s opponent is on a mission to attack and undermine our farmers. That is totally unacceptable, Peter, but with your help, we will outraise him and ensure Alabama farmers have a champion in their next Senator. The choice is clearer than ever: YOU can pick between a career politician who trashes Alabama’s workers or a fired-up Alabama First candidate who will ALWAYS defend our farmers. We have a fundraising goal of $10,000 set for this Sunday at MIDNIGHT. Can we count on you to get us there? Katie is the only candidate endorsed by the Alabama Farmer Federation’s FarmPAC for a reason: she stands up for hardworking Alabamians. If you want to stand up, too, Thank you, Sean Team Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

Friends & Hoosiers,

I’m ALL about grassroots engagement. That’s one of my favorite things about being a Senator.

**Last week I finished visiting all 92 Indiana counties for the 3rd year in a row!**

_And Biden can’t even visit the border..._

I've been trailblazing through Indiana -- seeing as many grassroots supporters like you as I can.

I am so passionate about Hoosiers and the great state of Indiana. 92 is a piece of cake!

name: John Fetterman
subject: 5 days to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This race is locked in a statistical tie.
#
Election Day in Virginia is now just five (5) days away, Peter.
That’s why I'm emailing you tonight to ask: [** _Would you be willing to split a $10 donation between my campaign and Democrat Terry McAuliffe's campaign for Governor of Virginia?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211028-3245&t=1&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)
Look, there’s so much at stake for Democrats right now that **President Barack Obama himself hit the Virginia campaign trail over the weekend.** Here’s what he had to say about Terry McAuliffe:
_"When you’ve got someone in your corner who has shown that they will work for you, who has a track record of accomplishments, then you have to go out there and work for them. Not because everything suddenly is going to be perfect, but because it’s going to be better."_
**It probably comes as no surprise that I agree 💯% with our former president on this one.** While no candidate is ever perfect, the difference between the two candidates for VA's governor couldn't be more stark.
On one side there's Democratic former Governor Terry McAuliffe, who's got a track record of delivering for working people across their Commonwealth.
Then there’s his GOP opponent, a Trump-backed ultra-millionaire who wants to restrict abortion access + take a sledgehammer to our sacred right to vote.
Look, as Governor Wolf's right-hand (and occasional anger translator), I know what having a Democrat in a state's *highest office* means for working people — especially with this race locked in a statistical tie.
**Peter, if you agree with President Obama + me about the Virginia governor’s race, I gotta ask one more time:**
[**_Will you use this link to make a split contribution to Terry McAuliffe's campaign to keep Virginia blue + our campaign here in PA? Any amount would make a huge impact in these final five days before Election Day._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211028-3245&t=2&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211028-3245&t=21&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)**
Thank you for hearing me out,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211028-3245-footer&t=22&refcode2=3245_434096_GjZc41&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3245%2E434096%2EGjZc41)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: And we’re running out of time. | | | We don’t know about you, but we don’t want to wake up the day after Election Day knowing that Trump’s hand-picked guy will be sitting in the Virginia Governor’s office. We don’t want to wake up knowing the House of Delegates is filled with Trump extremists who still think that Donald Trump won in 2020. That’s why we're doing everything we can to reach every voter in Virginia ahead of next Tuesday. We don’t have much time left, Derek -- so we need to buckle down and do everything we can to ensure Trumpism loses next week. Don’t wake up the day after Election Day wishing you could have done more. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 6 years since a terrorist tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49Jbk40rJh1zBRMvq3lktG73guCtgaU8LI0e1ZCddpNSfqeHbKvFiUvh8MqzkQ9yQH5SnxkNZEEvbEoY38T35__wI1vNYh0cP6puDgjc7oNGHgVh9QtGWaoSHply6_XW0OE7wbM1pftzz5gWHJauEKW9BxXJxNYWIxndq-8UKJN0O-0Qd1K2MEUR9f7prHj0OB9uRjN8Ph4PiNdum35m1CLSpEw%3D%3D)
