Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49JbklNNNZONkC8Tx_3MzeHHDAqvPnmxQiOTViHcNnvN-aPvJziykQzrWPnwQyKmdOFzszbdkp7amjAK6wu8C419Fw4HujyUcgOnzuFTFs6a5uBNfdzg3miCFS3S1s_LyFH_B7YKcvKtlXVyC01bBIcailET5cp_35RmmC9K_qfwpTKwBHZhLJyT18IlTf_lQNedLFS4XZCdt7HIe-mS-I0mqRA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49JbkFc3tjD8ATTtjF3cbZ68YW59wksW3XDdt7PLN9e9I500CS2bOapBG1fyK7LHI9yKOEtoSw2yJOFVfVWOujca-QB6ZvPq179VPRq32bHedjJCziynTuK2V1ZyRlUBOtmNB4uAbmOSFtscIo3rz68G6SG0O4lBfQ1LhQqm-tf3rYKmaEH21PsknVSrxCXYlx6iRxBjYDVOTNkOZRL7IiyYUMA%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49JbkDkrRebivMSUds_HDlkcvbF63-a_3Hlrw0OcIvWJrKdmnhYhru2AG0rmzjoHTP2jaIOE44I2l25S7vNotM_b7My4iddrHG_CjuYrtQvsAidhvhJ0ayFgG0XDeNlaf9eX4R3qqEZucKXx0tc7N918ewwJ6RYj_D3GJFK34flh6O9Txrwbn6JPGmwwR1bvJW6a1STqeAyhbnhFx6dI6Qc6gcA%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49JbklCdpThmqHRhxTSFB-oDKk-lQA-hAenJqQ41ywbCVCM7aCgKLeoa4WRn2bb4unWHt3HerdFkBn1AIx0QTZOCNFCAtPN1OJ5986-IVsE1dPZhgcFSVZMIPB_yZCxpDVlrf8wH3yJnsD_ZLU9ogebhXFYZIdYZdDv_MFXnxJ4BOvp6Oaz6u2huQqknPcrQlopn6QNb1ycM5lTTntIORq7bAng%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a3406f44bd4c4f509b934da2ab62580b&_e=tEKp69x62faIpXzmjY7sXcBDLO4WwTXOpyCIKT4adOWkOAEoMAo_BUkB1cCAjNlv_5dU9aEhpHwxpWCx5rbE6YxnPayNS3K3JNcBpOlW8JaBHstOUU8o7CXantVRTXskVKOUwHcDBzU9uMODItNo_F7UKGZUhEjkynkTx8p1NFT7DGmhe5kSQ9wOyK-dM0Qdu0zaUERaw40vhxT7PH7fBhNU4bItNLlYLVgDnzWL9_-h0v3JFhH1qxwCpOa49JbkBXF9Cg49_huOFrKQY1ogl0LrrV5UtBhGPoXI3IJj8ZG5fHdbsDTE2_GZP-mlhoj5c6-H5kX-u8D72HV4o24W3z4qswjrTsXdDxKMwK1LDhkkUehIupQX5siIv3pnOgSEQpPXQiJBJ3nLPb0hgMUdICZfy_DNRbLmf_ZzJOY8NZU5ESTNd3AxT2Gjh9HlHyltBmzjO5EbbdqJsW6c6gO5IQ%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. | | Look, Derek, I know hitting a $2,000,000 goal is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I asked my team if anyone even reads these emails.

If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump six times — _and even endorsed Trump for President in 2024!_

They’ll also know that _The Cook Political Report_ recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.”

Not to mention, experts from _POLITICO_ to _The Washington Post_ are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win.

Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, and only 5 days left in this race, we have to drive this thing home with everything we’ve got.

_**[Please, Derek: chip in $30 right now to help us stay on track to hit this fundraising goal. clean_body: If you are, you know how important this race is | | | = | | Look, Derek, I know hitting a $2,000,000 goal is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I asked my team if anyone even reads these emails. If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump six times — and even endorsed Trump for President in 2024! They’ll also know that The Cook Political Report recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.” Not to mention, experts from POLITICO to The Washington Post are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win. Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, and only 5 days left in this race, we have to drive this thing home with everything we’ve got. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Peter, In just one day since we announced our campaign for governor, we’ve been blessed by the outpouring of support. Just in case you didn’t see the message I posted last night, I wanted to reach out and convey our sincere gratitude. You can check out the video below. I’m running to be your next Governor because the politicians we have elected protect their own special interests instead of serving the people that elected them. I love our state, but I’m not proud of the direction it’s going under our current governor. I believe in our state but we have to demand change. I’m ready to take on this challenge, to make sure YOU have a voice! This campaign won’t be easy, nothing this important ever is but our best days definitely lie ahead. Thank you for your support. Mark Ronchetti Candidate for Governor of New Mexico | | | Paid for by Mark Ronchetti for Governor. Anne Perez, Treasurer. Click to unsubscribe.
